authors_text: Seyda Senturk,Ibrahim Kok,Fatmana Senturk
title: Internet of Nano, Bio-Nano, Biodegradable and Ingestible Things: A Survey
title_zh: 纳米、生物纳米、可生物降解和可摄入物联网：一项调查
abstract: In recent years, advances in biotechnology, nanotechnology and materials science have led to development of revolutionizing applications in Internet of Things (IoT). In particular, the interconnection of nanomaterials, nanoimplants and nanobiosensors with existing IoT networks have inspired the concepts of Internet of Nano Things (IoNT), Internet of Bio-Nano Things (IoBNT), Internet of Biodegradable Things (IoBDT) and Internet of Ingestible Things (IoIT). To date, although there are several survey papers that addressed these concepts separately, there is no current survey covering all studies in IoNT, IoBNT, IoBDT and IoIT. Therefore, in this paper, we provide a complete overview of all recent work in these four areas. Furthermore, we emphasize the research challenges, potential applications, and open research areas.
summary: In recent years, advances in biotechnology, nanotechnology and materials science have led to development of revolutionizing applications in Internet of Things (IoT). In particular, the interconnection of nanomaterials, nanoimplants and nanobiosensors with existing IoT networks have inspired the concepts of Internet of Nano Things (IoNT), Internet of Bio-Nano Things (IoBNT), Internet of Biodegradable Things (IoBDT) and Internet of Ingestible Things (IoIT). To date, although there are several survey papers that addressed these concepts separately, there is no current survey covering all studies in IoNT, IoBNT, IoBDT and IoIT. Therefore, in this paper, we provide a complete overview of all recent work in these four areas. Furthermore, we emphasize the research challenges, potential applications, and open research areas.
abstract_zh: 近年来，生物技术、纳米技术和材料科学的进步带动了物联网（IoT）革命性应用的发展。特别是，纳米材料、纳米植入物和纳米生物传感器与现有物联网网络的互连激发了纳米物联网（IoNT）、生物纳米物联网（IoBNT）、可生物降解物联网（IoBDT）和可摄入物联网（IoIT）的概念。迄今为止，尽管有几篇调查论文分别讨论了这些概念，但目前还没有涵盖 IoNT、IoBNT、IoBDT 和 IoIT 中所有研究的调查。因此，在本文中，我们对这四个领域的所有近期工作进行了完整的概述。此外，我们强调研究挑战、潜在应用和开放研究领域。

AI.tldr: 本文对物联网相关领域（IoNT、IoBNT、IoBDT、IoIT）的最新研究进行系统性综述，分析其挑战与应用前景。
AI.motivation: 现有文献对IoNT、IoBNT、IoBDT和IoIT的研究多为独立综述，缺乏跨领域的整合性分析，阻碍了技术协同发展。
AI.method: 通过文献调研与分类整理，归纳四类技术的研究现状、关键技术难点及潜在应用场景，提出未来研究方向。
AI.result: 总结了四类技术的代表性成果，识别出生物相容性、能源管理、通信可靠性等共性挑战，并梳理了医疗健康、环境监测等典型应用。
AI.conclusion: 需加强跨学科协作以解决技术瓶颈，同时应建立标准化框架推动可降解/可吞咽设备的规模化应用。

search_text: Internet of Nano, Bio-Nano, Biodegradable and Ingestible Things: A Survey 纳米、生物纳米、可生物降解和可摄入物联网：一项调查 In recent years, advances in biotechnology, nanotechnology and materials science have led to development of revolutionizing applications in Internet of Things (IoT). In particular, the interconnection of nanomaterials, nanoimplants and nanobiosensors with existing IoT networks have inspired the concepts of Internet of Nano Things (IoNT), Internet of Bio-Nano Things (IoBNT), Internet of Biodegradable Things (IoBDT) and Internet of Ingestible Things (IoIT). To date, although there are several survey papers that addressed these concepts separately, there is no current survey covering all studies in IoNT, IoBNT, IoBDT and IoIT. Therefore, in this paper, we provide a complete overview of all recent work in these four areas. Furthermore, we emphasize the research challenges, potential applications, and open research areas. 近年来，生物技术、纳米技术和材料科学的进步带动了物联网（IoT）革命性应用的发展。特别是，纳米材料、纳米植入物和纳米生物传感器与现有物联网网络的互连激发了纳米物联网（IoNT）、生物纳米物联网（IoBNT）、可生物降解物联网（IoBDT）和可摄入物联网（IoIT）的概念。迄今为止，尽管有几篇调查论文分别讨论了这些概念，但目前还没有涵盖 IoNT、IoBNT、IoBDT 和 IoIT 中所有研究的调查。因此，在本文中，我们对这四个领域的所有近期工作进行了完整的概述。此外，我们强调研究挑战、潜在应用和开放研究领域。 本文对物联网相关领域（IoNT、IoBNT、IoBDT、IoIT）的最新研究进行系统性综述，分析其挑战与应用前景。 Seyda Senturk,Ibrahim Kok,Fatmana Senturk cs.ET,cs.NI

authors_text: Qi Heng Ho,Zachary N. Sunberg,Morteza Lahijanian
title: Gaussian Belief Trees for Chance Constrained Asymptotically Optimal Motion Planning
title_zh: 机会约束渐近最优运动规划的高斯置信树
abstract: In this paper, we address the problem of sampling-based motion planning under motion and measurement uncertainty with probabilistic guarantees. We generalize traditional sampling-based tree-based motion planning algorithms for deterministic systems and propose belief-$\mathcal{A}$, a framework that extends any kinodynamical tree-based planner to the belief space for linear (or linearizable) systems. We introduce appropriate sampling techniques and distance metrics for the belief space that preserve the probabilistic completeness and asymptotic optimality properties of the underlying planner. We demonstrate the efficacy of our approach for finding safe low-cost paths efficiently and asymptotically optimally in simulation, for both holonomic and non-holonomic systems.
summary: In this paper, we address the problem of sampling-based motion planning under motion and measurement uncertainty with probabilistic guarantees. We generalize traditional sampling-based tree-based motion planning algorithms for deterministic systems and propose belief-$\mathcal{A}$, a framework that extends any kinodynamical tree-based planner to the belief space for linear (or linearizable) systems. We introduce appropriate sampling techniques and distance metrics for the belief space that preserve the probabilistic completeness and asymptotic optimality properties of the underlying planner. We demonstrate the efficacy of our approach for finding safe low-cost paths efficiently and asymptotically optimally in simulation, for both holonomic and non-holonomic systems.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们通过概率保证解决了运动和测量不确定性下基于采样的运动规划问题。我们将传统的基于采样的基于树的运动规划算法推广到确定性系统，并提出belief-$\mathcal{A}$，这是一个将任何基于运动动力学树的规划器扩展到线性（或可线性化）系统的置信空间的框架。我们为置信空间引入适当的采样技术和距离度量，以保留底层规划器的概率完整性和渐近最优性属性。我们证明了我们的方法对于完整和非完整系统在模拟中有效且渐近最优地寻找安全低成本路径的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于高斯信念树的运动规划方法，用于在存在运动和测量不确定性的情况下实现渐近最优的路径规划。
AI.motivation: 传统采样-based运动规划算法难以处理不确定性环境下的概率约束，且缺乏对测量误差和动态不确定性的有效建模。
AI.method: 提出信念-$\\mathcal{A}$框架，将动力学树规划器扩展到信念空间，设计适用于信念空间的采样技术和距离度量，保留原算法的概率完备性和渐近最优性。
AI.result: 仿真结果表明该方法能在保证安全性的前提下，为全向和非全向系统高效生成低成本路径，满足概率约束。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为不确定性环境下的运动规划提供了理论保证和可扩展的解决方案，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Tingfeng Li,Shaobo Han,Martin Renqiang Min,Dimitris N. Metaxas
title: Learning Transferable Reward for Query Object Localization with Policy Adaptation
title_zh: 通过策略适应来学习查询对象本地化的可转移奖励
abstract: We propose a reinforcement learning based approach to query object localization, for which an agent is trained to localize objects of interest specified by a small exemplary set. We learn a transferable reward signal formulated using the exemplary set by ordinal metric learning. Our proposed method enables test-time policy adaptation to new environments where the reward signals are not readily available, and outperforms fine-tuning approaches that are limited to annotated images. In addition, the transferable reward allows repurposing the trained agent from one specific class to another class. Experiments on corrupted MNIST, CU-Birds, and COCO datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach.
summary: We propose a reinforcement learning based approach to query object localization, for which an agent is trained to localize objects of interest specified by a small exemplary set. We learn a transferable reward signal formulated using the exemplary set by ordinal metric learning. Our proposed method enables test-time policy adaptation to new environments where the reward signals are not readily available, and outperforms fine-tuning approaches that are limited to annotated images. In addition, the transferable reward allows repurposing the trained agent from one specific class to another class. Experiments on corrupted MNIST, CU-Birds, and COCO datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种基于强化学习的方法来查询对象定位，其中训练代理来定位由小型示例集指定的感兴趣对象。我们学习使用序数度量学习的示例集制定的可转移奖励信号。我们提出的方法可以使测试时策略适应奖励信号不易获得的新环境，并且优于仅限于带注释图像的微调方法。此外，可转移奖励允许将受过训练的代理从一个特定类别重新调整到另一类别。在损坏的 MNIST、CU-Birds 和 COCO 数据集上进行的实验证明了我们方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于强化学习的查询对象定位方法，通过小规模示例集学习可转移奖励信号，实现跨环境和跨类别的策略适应。
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖标注数据进行微调，难以适应新环境或跨类别任务，且需大量标注数据。
AI.method: 采用序数度量学习从小示例集构建可转移奖励信号，并结合测试时策略适应，无需目标环境的奖励信号。
AI.result: 在损坏MNIST、CU-Birds和COCO数据集上验证，优于微调方法，展现跨类别任务迁移能力。
AI.conclusion: 可转移奖励与策略适应机制有效解决了新环境和跨类别对象定位问题，验证了方法的通用性与鲁棒性。

authors_text: Enzo Tartaglione
title: The rise of the lottery heroes: why zero-shot pruning is hard
title_zh: 彩票英雄的崛起：为什么零样本剪枝很难
abstract: Recent advances in deep learning optimization showed that just a subset of parameters are really necessary to successfully train a model. Potentially, such a discovery has broad impact from the theory to application; however, it is known that finding these trainable sub-network is a typically costly process. This inhibits practical applications: can the learned sub-graph structures in deep learning models be found at training time? In this work we explore such a possibility, observing and motivating why common approaches typically fail in the extreme scenarios of interest, and proposing an approach which potentially enables training with reduced computational effort. The experiments on either challenging architectures and datasets suggest the algorithmic accessibility over such a computational gain, and in particular a trade-off between accuracy achieved and training complexity deployed emerges.
summary: Recent advances in deep learning optimization showed that just a subset of parameters are really necessary to successfully train a model. Potentially, such a discovery has broad impact from the theory to application; however, it is known that finding these trainable sub-network is a typically costly process. This inhibits practical applications: can the learned sub-graph structures in deep learning models be found at training time? In this work we explore such a possibility, observing and motivating why common approaches typically fail in the extreme scenarios of interest, and proposing an approach which potentially enables training with reduced computational effort. The experiments on either challenging architectures and datasets suggest the algorithmic accessibility over such a computational gain, and in particular a trade-off between accuracy achieved and training complexity deployed emerges.
abstract_zh: 深度学习优化的最新进展表明，成功训练模型只需要一部分参数。这样的发现可能会从理论到应用产生广泛的影响；然而，众所周知，找到这些可训练的子网络通常是一个成本高昂的过程。这抑制了实际应用：深度学习模型中学习到的子图结构能否在训练时找到？在这项工作中，我们探索了这种可能性，观察和激发了为什么常见方法通常在感兴趣的极端场景中失败，并提出了一种可能以减少计算量进行训练的方法。在具有挑战性的架构和数据集上进行的实验表明，这种计算增益的算法可访问性，特别是所实现的准确性和部署的训练复杂性之间出现的权衡。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了深度学习模型中零样本剪枝的困难，分析了现有方法在极端场景下的失效原因，并提出了一种降低计算成本的训练方法。
AI.motivation: 尽管研究发现深度学习模型只需部分参数即可训练，但寻找可训练子网络的过程成本高昂，阻碍了实际应用，需解决这一计算瓶颈。
AI.method: 通过分析常见方法的局限性，提出一种在训练过程中发现子网络结构的新方法，以减少计算资源消耗。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在复杂架构和数据集上实现了算法可行性，但准确率与训练复杂度之间存在权衡关系。
AI.conclusion: 虽提出降低计算成本的潜在方案，但准确率与训练效率的平衡仍是需进一步解决的关键挑战。

authors_text: Junhyeok Ahn,Seung Hyeon Bang,Carlos Gonzalez,Yuanchen Yuan,Luis Sentis
title: Data-Driven Safety Verification for Legged Robots
title_zh: 腿式机器人的数据驱动安全验证
comment: 8 pages, 8 figures, submitted to RA-L with IROS option
comments: 8 pages, 8 figures, submitted to RA-L with IROS option
abstract: Planning safe motions for legged robots requires sophisticated safety verification tools. However, designing such tools for such complex systems is challenging due to the nonlinear and high-dimensional nature of these systems' dynamics. In this letter, we present a probabilistic verification framework for legged systems, which evaluates the safety of planned trajectories by learning an assessment function from trajectories collected from a closed-loop system. Our approach does not require an analytic expression of the closed-loop dynamics, thus enabling safety verification of systems with complex models and controllers. Our framework consists of an offline stage that initializes a safety assessment function by simulating a nominal model and an online stage that adapts the function to address the sim-to-real gap. The performance of the proposed approach for safety verification is demonstrated using a quadruped balancing task and a humanoid reaching task. The results demonstrate that our framework accurately predicts the systems' safety both at the planning phase to generate robust trajectories and at execution phase to detect unexpected external disturbances.
summary: Planning safe motions for legged robots requires sophisticated safety verification tools. However, designing such tools for such complex systems is challenging due to the nonlinear and high-dimensional nature of these systems' dynamics. In this letter, we present a probabilistic verification framework for legged systems, which evaluates the safety of planned trajectories by learning an assessment function from trajectories collected from a closed-loop system. Our approach does not require an analytic expression of the closed-loop dynamics, thus enabling safety verification of systems with complex models and controllers. Our framework consists of an offline stage that initializes a safety assessment function by simulating a nominal model and an online stage that adapts the function to address the sim-to-real gap. The performance of the proposed approach for safety verification is demonstrated using a quadruped balancing task and a humanoid reaching task. The results demonstrate that our framework accurately predicts the systems' safety both at the planning phase to generate robust trajectories and at execution phase to detect unexpected external disturbances.
abstract_zh: 规划腿式机器人的安全运动需要复杂的安全验证工具。然而，由于这些系统动力学的非线性和高维性质，为此类复杂系统设计此类工具具有挑战性。在这封信中，我们提出了一种腿式系统的概率验证框架，该框架通过从闭环系统收集的轨迹中学习评估函数来评估计划轨迹的安全性。我们的方法不需要闭环动力学的分析表达式，从而能够对具有复杂模型和控制器的系统进行安全验证。我们的框架由一个离线阶段和一个在线阶段组成，离线阶段通过模拟名义模型来初始化安全评估函数，在线阶段调整该函数以解决模拟与真实的差距。使用四足平衡任务和人形机器人到达任务证明了所提出的安全验证方法的性能。结果表明，我们的框架可以在规划阶段准确预测系统的安全性，以生成稳健的轨迹，并在执行阶段准确预测系统的安全性，以检测意外的外部干扰。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需解析动态模型的数据驱动安全验证框架，通过学习评估函数验证足式机器人轨迹安全性。
AI.motivation: 足式机器人动态非线性且高维，传统安全验证工具难以处理复杂模型和控制器的系统。
AI.method: 构建概率验证框架，离线阶段用模拟模型初始化安全评估函数，在线阶段通过数据适应模拟到现实的差距。
AI.result: 在四足平衡和人形抓取任务中验证有效，能准确预测规划阶段安全性和检测执行阶段外部干扰。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为复杂足式机器人提供了高效安全验证方法，提升运动规划与执行的安全性。

authors_text: Karthik Urs,Challen Enninful Adu,Elliott J. Rouse,Talia Y. Moore
title: Design and Characterization of 3D Printed, Open-Source Actuators for Legged Locomotion
title_zh: 用于腿式运动的 3D 打印开源执行器的设计和表征
abstract: Impressive animal locomotion capabilities are mediated by the co-evolution of the skeletal morphology and muscular properties. Legged robot performance would also likely benefit from the co-optimization of actuators and leg morphology. However, development of custom actuators for legged robots is often expensive and time consuming, which discourages roboticists from pursuing performance gains afforded by application-specific actuator optimization. This paper presents open-source designs for two quasi-direct-drive actuators with performance regimes appropriate for an 8--15 kg robot, built completely with off the shelf and 3D-printed components for less than $200 USD each. The mechanical, electrical, and thermal properties of each actuator are characterized and compared to benchmark data. Actuators subjected to 420k strides of gait data experienced only a 2% reduction in efficiency and 26 mrad in backlash growth, demonstrating viability for rigorous and sustained research applications. We present a thermal solution that nearly doubles the thermally-driven torque limits of our plastic actuator design. The performance results are comparable to traditional metallic actuators for use in high-speed legged robots of the same scale. These 3D printed designs demonstrate an approach for designing and characterizing low-cost, highly customizable, and highly reproducible actuators, democratizing the field of actuator design and enabling co-design and optimization of actuators and robot legs.
summary: Impressive animal locomotion capabilities are mediated by the co-evolution of the skeletal morphology and muscular properties. Legged robot performance would also likely benefit from the co-optimization of actuators and leg morphology. However, development of custom actuators for legged robots is often expensive and time consuming, which discourages roboticists from pursuing performance gains afforded by application-specific actuator optimization. This paper presents open-source designs for two quasi-direct-drive actuators with performance regimes appropriate for an 8--15 kg robot, built completely with off the shelf and 3D-printed components for less than $200 USD each. The mechanical, electrical, and thermal properties of each actuator are characterized and compared to benchmark data. Actuators subjected to 420k strides of gait data experienced only a 2% reduction in efficiency and 26 mrad in backlash growth, demonstrating viability for rigorous and sustained research applications. We present a thermal solution that nearly doubles the thermally-driven torque limits of our plastic actuator design. The performance results are comparable to traditional metallic actuators for use in high-speed legged robots of the same scale. These 3D printed designs demonstrate an approach for designing and characterizing low-cost, highly customizable, and highly reproducible actuators, democratizing the field of actuator design and enabling co-design and optimization of actuators and robot legs.
abstract_zh: 令人印象深刻的动物运动能力是由骨骼形态和肌肉特性的共同进化介导的。腿式机器人的性能也可能受益于执行器和腿部形态的共同优化。然而，腿式机器人的定制执行器的开发通常既昂贵又耗时，这阻碍了机器人专家追求特定应用执行器优化所带来的性能提升。本文介绍了两个准直接驱动执行器的开源设计，其性能范围适合 8--15 公斤机器人，完全使用现成的 3D 打印组件构建，每个组件的价格不到 200 美元。对每个执行器的机械、电气和热性能进行表征并与基准数据进行比较。接受 42 万步步态数据处理的执行器效率仅下降 2%，间隙增长 26 mrad，证明了严格和持续研究应用的可行性。我们提出了一种热解决方案，可将塑料执行器设计的热驱动扭矩限制提高近一倍。其性能结果与用于相同规模的高速腿式机器人的传统金属执行器相当。这些 3D 打印设计展示了一种设计和表征低成本、高度可定制和高度可重复执行器的方法，使执行器设计领域民主化，并实现执行器和机器人腿的协同设计和优化。

AI.tldr: 本文设计并表征了两种适用于8-15公斤机器人的低成本3D打印开源执行器，用于腿部运动。
AI.motivation: 传统定制执行器开发成本高且耗时，阻碍了腿部机器人性能优化，需通过开源设计降低门槛并实现执行器与腿部形态的协同优化。
AI.method: 采用3D打印和现成部件构建执行器，通过机械、电气和热性能测试，并开发热解决方案以提升扭矩极限。
AI.result: 执行器经42万次步态测试后效率仅下降2%，回差增长26毫弧度；热解决方案使塑料执行器扭矩极限接近金属执行器水平。
AI.conclusion: 该设计实现了低成本、高可定制性与可重复性的执行器方案，推动了执行器与机器人腿部的协同设计优化。

motivation: 传统定制执行器开发成本高且耗时，阻碍了腿部机器人性能优化，需通过开源设计降低门槛并实现执行器与腿部形态的协同优化。

search_text: Design and Characterization of 3D Printed, Open-Source Actuators for Legged Locomotion 用于腿式运动的 3D 打印开源执行器的设计和表征 Impressive animal locomotion capabilities are mediated by the co-evolution of the skeletal morphology and muscular properties. Legged robot performance would also likely benefit from the co-optimization of actuators and leg morphology. However, development of custom actuators for legged robots is often expensive and time consuming, which discourages roboticists from pursuing performance gains afforded by application-specific actuator optimization. This paper presents open-source designs for two quasi-direct-drive actuators with performance regimes appropriate for an 8--15 kg robot, built completely with off the shelf and 3D-printed components for less than $200 USD each. The mechanical, electrical, and thermal properties of each actuator are characterized and compared to benchmark data. Actuators subjected to 420k strides of gait data experienced only a 2% reduction in efficiency and 26 mrad in backlash growth, demonstrating viability for rigorous and sustained research applications. We present a thermal solution that nearly doubles the thermally-driven torque limits of our plastic actuator design. The performance results are comparable to traditional metallic actuators for use in high-speed legged robots of the same scale. These 3D printed designs demonstrate an approach for designing and characterizing low-cost, highly customizable, and highly reproducible actuators, democratizing the field of actuator design and enabling co-design and optimization of actuators and robot legs. 令人印象深刻的动物运动能力是由骨骼形态和肌肉特性的共同进化介导的。腿式机器人的性能也可能受益于执行器和腿部形态的共同优化。然而，腿式机器人的定制执行器的开发通常既昂贵又耗时，这阻碍了机器人专家追求特定应用执行器优化所带来的性能提升。本文介绍了两个准直接驱动执行器的开源设计，其性能范围适合 8--15 公斤机器人，完全使用现成的 3D 打印组件构建，每个组件的价格不到 200 美元。对每个执行器的机械、电气和热性能进行表征并与基准数据进行比较。接受 42 万步步态数据处理的执行器效率仅下降 2%，间隙增长 26 mrad，证明了严格和持续研究应用的可行性。我们提出了一种热解决方案，可将塑料执行器设计的热驱动扭矩限制提高近一倍。其性能结果与用于相同规模的高速腿式机器人的传统金属执行器相当。这些 3D 打印设计展示了一种设计和表征低成本、高度可定制和高度可重复执行器的方法，使执行器设计领域民主化，并实现执行器和机器人腿的协同设计和优化。 本文设计并表征了两种适用于8-15公斤机器人的低成本3D打印开源执行器，用于腿部运动。 Karthik Urs,Challen Enninful Adu,Elliott J. Rouse,Talia Y. Moore cs.RO

authors_text: Paulo Rezeck,Hector Azpurua,Mauricio FS Correa,Luiz Chaimowicz
title: HeRo 2.0: A Low-Cost Robot for Swarm Robotics Research
title_zh: HeRo 2.0：用于群体机器人研究的低成本机器人
comment: Submitted to Autonomous Robots - S.I. 208: Robot Swarms in the Real World: from Design to Deployment
comments: Submitted to Autonomous Robots - S.I. 208: Robot Swarms in the Real World: from Design to Deployment
abstract: The current state of electronic component miniaturization coupled with the increasing efficiency in hardware and software allow the development of smaller and compact robotic systems. The convenience of using these small, simple, yet capable robots has gathered the research community's attention towards practical applications of swarm robotics. This paper presents the design of a novel platform for swarm robotics applications that is low cost, easy to assemble using off-the-shelf components, and deeply integrated with the most used robotic framework available today: ROS (Robot Operating System). The robotic platform is entirely open, composed of a 3D printed body and open-source software. We describe its architecture, present its main features, and evaluate its functionalities executing experiments using a couple of robots. Results demonstrate that the proposed mobile robot is very effective given its small size and reduced cost, being suitable for swarm robotics research and education.
summary: The current state of electronic component miniaturization coupled with the increasing efficiency in hardware and software allow the development of smaller and compact robotic systems. The convenience of using these small, simple, yet capable robots has gathered the research community's attention towards practical applications of swarm robotics. This paper presents the design of a novel platform for swarm robotics applications that is low cost, easy to assemble using off-the-shelf components, and deeply integrated with the most used robotic framework available today: ROS (Robot Operating System). The robotic platform is entirely open, composed of a 3D printed body and open-source software. We describe its architecture, present its main features, and evaluate its functionalities executing experiments using a couple of robots. Results demonstrate that the proposed mobile robot is very effective given its small size and reduced cost, being suitable for swarm robotics research and education.
abstract_zh: 电子元件小型化的现状加上硬件和软件效率的提高，允许开发更小、更紧凑的机器人系统。使用这些小型、简单但功能强大的机器人的便利性引起了研究界对群体机器人实际应用的关注。本文介绍了一种用于群体机器人应用的新颖平台的设计，该平台成本低廉，易于使用现成组件组装，并与当今最常用的机器人框架深度集成：ROS（机器人操作系统）。该机器人平台完全开放，由 3D 打印主体和开源软件组成。我们描述了它的架构，展示了它的主要特征，并使用几个机器人执行实验来评估它的功能。结果表明，所提出的移动机器人体积小、成本低，非常有效，适合群体机器人研究和教育。

AI.tldr: 本文设计了一种低成本、易组装的群体机器人平台HeRo 2.0，适用于群体机器人研究与教育。
AI.motivation: 电子元件微型化与软硬件效率提升推动了小型机器人实用化，但现有平台成本高或灵活性不足，需开发更经济的解决方案以促进群体机器人研究。
AI.method: 采用现成组件与3D打印技术构建机器人主体，深度集成ROS系统，通过多机器人实验验证平台功能。
AI.result: 实验表明，该机器人凭借小巧体积和低成本，在群体机器人研究与教育中表现出色。
AI.conclusion: HeRo 2.0平台有效满足群体机器人研究需求，为学术界和教育领域提供了经济高效的解决方案。

authors_text: Quinten Konyn,Ross L. Hatton
title: Scales and Locomotion: Non-Reversible Longitudinal Drag
title_zh: 尺度和运动：不可逆纵向阻力
abstract: Locomotion requires that an animal or robot be able to move itself forward farther than it moves backward in each gait cycle (formally, that it be able to break the symmetry of its interactions with the world). Previous work has established that a difference between lateral and longitudinal drag provides sufficient conditions for locomotion to be possible. The geometric mechanics community has used this principle to build a geometric framework for describing the effectiveness and efficiency of undulatory locomotion. Researchers in biology and robotics have observed that structures such as snake scales additionally provide a difference between forward and backward longitudinal drag. As yet, however, the impact of scales on the geometric features relevant to locomotion effectiveness and efficiency have not yet been explored. We present a geometric model for a single-joint undulating system with scales and identify the features needed to understand its motion. Mathematically, the scales can be treated as inducing a "Finsler metric" on the configuration space, and this paper lays the groundwork for further research into application of such Finsler metrics to robotic locomotion.
summary: Locomotion requires that an animal or robot be able to move itself forward farther than it moves backward in each gait cycle (formally, that it be able to break the symmetry of its interactions with the world). Previous work has established that a difference between lateral and longitudinal drag provides sufficient conditions for locomotion to be possible. The geometric mechanics community has used this principle to build a geometric framework for describing the effectiveness and efficiency of undulatory locomotion. Researchers in biology and robotics have observed that structures such as snake scales additionally provide a difference between forward and backward longitudinal drag. As yet, however, the impact of scales on the geometric features relevant to locomotion effectiveness and efficiency have not yet been explored. We present a geometric model for a single-joint undulating system with scales and identify the features needed to understand its motion. Mathematically, the scales can be treated as inducing a "Finsler metric" on the configuration space, and this paper lays the groundwork for further research into application of such Finsler metrics to robotic locomotion.
abstract_zh: 运动要求动物或机器人能够在每个步态周期中向前移动比向后移动更远的距离（正式来说，它能够打破与世界相互作用的对称性）。先前的工作已经证实，横向阻力和纵向阻力之间的差异为运动的可能性提供了充分的条件。几何力学界利用这一原理构建了一个几何框架来描述波动运动的有效性和效率。生物学和机器人学的研究人员观察到，蛇鳞等结构还提供了向前和向后纵向阻力之间的差异。然而，迄今为止，尺度对与运动有效性和效率相关的几何特征的影响尚未被探索。我们提出了一个带有尺度的单关节波动系统的几何模型，并确定了理解其运动所需的特征。从数学上讲，尺度可以被视为在配置空间上引入“芬斯勒度量”，本文为进一步研究此类芬斯勒度量在机器人运动中的应用奠定了基础。

AI.tldr: 本文研究鳞片如何通过纵向拖曳不对称性影响运动效率，并建立单关节波动系统的几何模型。
AI.motivation: 现有几何力学框架未考虑鳞片对运动的影响，而鳞片在生物与机器人运动中具有重要应用价值。
AI.method: 将鳞片视为构型空间中的Finsler度量，构建单关节波动系统的几何模型并分析其运动特征。
AI.result: 识别出鳞片改变纵向拖曳不对称性的几何特征，为Finsler度量在机器人运动中的应用奠定基础。
AI.conclusion: 鳞片通过引入非对称Finsler度量提升运动效率，未来可拓展至更复杂的机器人运动控制研究。

authors_text: Zhuoning Yuan,Yuexin Wu,Zi-Hao Qiu,Xianzhi Du,Lijun Zhang,Denny Zhou,Tianbao Yang
title: Provable Stochastic Optimization for Global Contrastive Learning: Small Batch Does Not Harm Performance
title_zh: 用于全局对比学习的可证明随机优化：小批量不会损害性能
abstract: In this paper, we study contrastive learning from an optimization perspective, aiming to analyze and address a fundamental issue of existing contrastive learning methods that either rely on a large batch size or a large dictionary of feature vectors. We consider a global objective for contrastive learning, which contrasts each positive pair with all negative pairs for an anchor point. From the optimization perspective, we explain why existing methods such as SimCLR require a large batch size in order to achieve a satisfactory result. In order to remove such requirement, we propose a memory-efficient Stochastic Optimization algorithm for solving the Global objective of Contrastive Learning of Representations, named SogCLR. We show that its optimization error is negligible under a reasonable condition after a sufficient number of iterations or is diminishing for a slightly different global contrastive objective. Empirically, we demonstrate that SogCLR with small batch size (e.g., 256) can achieve similar performance as SimCLR with large batch size (e.g., 8192) on self-supervised learning task on ImageNet-1K. We also attempt to show that the proposed optimization technique is generic and can be applied to solving other contrastive losses, e.g., two-way contrastive losses for bimodal contrastive learning. The proposed method is implemented in our open-sourced library LibAUC (www.libauc.org).
summary: In this paper, we study contrastive learning from an optimization perspective, aiming to analyze and address a fundamental issue of existing contrastive learning methods that either rely on a large batch size or a large dictionary of feature vectors. We consider a global objective for contrastive learning, which contrasts each positive pair with all negative pairs for an anchor point. From the optimization perspective, we explain why existing methods such as SimCLR require a large batch size in order to achieve a satisfactory result. In order to remove such requirement, we propose a memory-efficient Stochastic Optimization algorithm for solving the Global objective of Contrastive Learning of Representations, named SogCLR. We show that its optimization error is negligible under a reasonable condition after a sufficient number of iterations or is diminishing for a slightly different global contrastive objective. Empirically, we demonstrate that SogCLR with small batch size (e.g., 256) can achieve similar performance as SimCLR with large batch size (e.g., 8192) on self-supervised learning task on ImageNet-1K. We also attempt to show that the proposed optimization technique is generic and can be applied to solving other contrastive losses, e.g., two-way contrastive losses for bimodal contrastive learning. The proposed method is implemented in our open-sourced library LibAUC (www.libauc.org).
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们从优化的角度研究对比学习，旨在分析和解决现有对比学习方法依赖于大批量或大特征向量字典的基本问题。我们考虑对比学习的全局目标，它将每个正对与所有负对作为锚点进行对比。从优化的角度来看，我们解释了为什么 SimCLR 等现有方法需要大批量才能获得满意的结果。为了消除这样的要求，我们提出了一种内存高效的随机优化算法来解决表示对比学习的全局目标，称为 SogCLR。我们表明，在经过足够次数的迭代后，其优化误差在合理的条件下可以忽略不计，或者对于稍微不同的全局对比目标来说，其优化误差正在减小。根据经验，我们证明，在 ImageNet-1K 上的自监督学习任务中，小批量（例如 256）的 SogCLR 可以实现与大批量（例如 8192）的 SimCLR 相似的性能。我们还试图证明所提出的优化技术是通用的，可以应用于解决其他对比损失，例如双峰对比学习的双向对比损失。所提出的方法在我们的开源库 LibAUC (www.libauc.org) 中实现。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SogCLR的内存高效随机优化算法，用于解决全局对比学习中的表示学习问题，无需依赖大批次或大字典。
AI.motivation: 现有对比学习方法（如SimCLR）需要大批次或大特征向量字典才能获得良好性能，这限制了其在资源受限场景下的应用。
AI.method: 通过设计全局对比目标函数，提出SogCLR算法，证明其优化误差在合理条件下可忽略，并验证其适用于多模态对比学习等其他损失函数。
AI.result: 实验表明，SogCLR在小批次（如256）下于ImageNet-1K自监督任务中可达到与SimCLR大批次（如8192）相当的性能，且方法具有通用性。
AI.conclusion: SogCLR有效解决了对比学习中批次大小依赖问题，为高效训练提供了理论保障和实践方案，且方法可扩展至其他对比学习场景。

search_text: Provable Stochastic Optimization for Global Contrastive Learning: Small Batch Does Not Harm Performance 用于全局对比学习的可证明随机优化：小批量不会损害性能 In this paper, we study contrastive learning from an optimization perspective, aiming to analyze and address a fundamental issue of existing contrastive learning methods that either rely on a large batch size or a large dictionary of feature vectors. We consider a global objective for contrastive learning, which contrasts each positive pair with all negative pairs for an anchor point. From the optimization perspective, we explain why existing methods such as SimCLR require a large batch size in order to achieve a satisfactory result. In order to remove such requirement, we propose a memory-efficient Stochastic Optimization algorithm for solving the Global objective of Contrastive Learning of Representations, named SogCLR. We show that its optimization error is negligible under a reasonable condition after a sufficient number of iterations or is diminishing for a slightly different global contrastive objective. Empirically, we demonstrate that SogCLR with small batch size (e.g., 256) can achieve similar performance as SimCLR with large batch size (e.g., 8192) on self-supervised learning task on ImageNet-1K. We also attempt to show that the proposed optimization technique is generic and can be applied to solving other contrastive losses, e.g., two-way contrastive losses for bimodal contrastive learning. The proposed method is implemented in our open-sourced library LibAUC (www.libauc.org). 在本文中，我们从优化的角度研究对比学习，旨在分析和解决现有对比学习方法依赖于大批量或大特征向量字典的基本问题。我们考虑对比学习的全局目标，它将每个正对与所有负对作为锚点进行对比。从优化的角度来看，我们解释了为什么 SimCLR 等现有方法需要大批量才能获得满意的结果。为了消除这样的要求，我们提出了一种内存高效的随机优化算法来解决表示对比学习的全局目标，称为 SogCLR。我们表明，在经过足够次数的迭代后，其优化误差在合理的条件下可以忽略不计，或者对于稍微不同的全局对比目标来说，其优化误差正在减小。根据经验，我们证明，在 ImageNet-1K 上的自监督学习任务中，小批量（例如 256）的 SogCLR 可以实现与大批量（例如 8192）的 SimCLR 相似的性能。我们还试图证明所提出的优化技术是通用的，可以应用于解决其他对比损失，例如双峰对比学习的双向对比损失。所提出的方法在我们的开源库 LibAUC (www.libauc.org) 中实现。 本文提出了一种名为SogCLR的内存高效随机优化算法，用于解决全局对比学习中的表示学习问题，无需依赖大批次或大字典。 Zhuoning Yuan,Yuexin Wu,Zi-Hao Qiu,Xianzhi Du,Lijun Zhang,Denny Zhou,Tianbao Yang cs.LG,cs.CV,math.OC,stat.ML

authors_text: Jia-Ruei Chiu,Jean-Pierre Sleiman,Mayank Mittal,Farbod Farshidian,Marco Hutter
title: A Collision-Free MPC for Whole-Body Dynamic Locomotion and Manipulation
title_zh: 用于全身动态运动和操纵的无碰撞 MPC
comment: Accepted in IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA) 2022 in Philadelphia (PA), USA
comments: Accepted in IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA) 2022 in Philadelphia (PA), USA
abstract: In this paper, we present a real-time whole-body planner for collision-free legged mobile manipulation. We enforce both self-collision and environment-collision avoidance as soft constraints within a Model Predictive Control (MPC) scheme that solves a multi-contact optimal control problem. By penalizing the signed distances among a set of representative primitive collision bodies, the robot is able to safely execute a variety of dynamic maneuvers while preventing any self-collisions. Moreover, collision-free navigation and manipulation in both static and dynamic environments are made viable through efficient queries of distances and their gradients via a euclidean signed distance field. We demonstrate through a comparative study that our approach only slightly increases the computational complexity of the MPC planning. Finally, we validate the effectiveness of our framework through a set of hardware experiments involving dynamic mobile manipulation tasks with potential collisions, such as locomotion balancing with the swinging arm, weight throwing, and autonomous door opening.
summary: In this paper, we present a real-time whole-body planner for collision-free legged mobile manipulation. We enforce both self-collision and environment-collision avoidance as soft constraints within a Model Predictive Control (MPC) scheme that solves a multi-contact optimal control problem. By penalizing the signed distances among a set of representative primitive collision bodies, the robot is able to safely execute a variety of dynamic maneuvers while preventing any self-collisions. Moreover, collision-free navigation and manipulation in both static and dynamic environments are made viable through efficient queries of distances and their gradients via a euclidean signed distance field. We demonstrate through a comparative study that our approach only slightly increases the computational complexity of the MPC planning. Finally, we validate the effectiveness of our framework through a set of hardware experiments involving dynamic mobile manipulation tasks with potential collisions, such as locomotion balancing with the swinging arm, weight throwing, and autonomous door opening.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种用于无碰撞腿部移动操纵的实时全身规划器。我们将自碰撞和环境碰撞避免作为模型预测控制（MPC）方案中的软约束强制执行，以解决多接触最优控制问题。通过惩罚一组代表性原始碰撞体之间的有符号距离，机器人能够安全地执行各种动态动作，同时防止任何自碰撞。此外，通过欧几里德有符号距离场有效查询距离及其梯度，使得静态和动态环境中的无碰撞导航和操作变得可行。我们通过比较研究证明，我们的方法仅略微增加了 MPC 规划的计算复杂性。最后，我们通过一组硬件实验验证了我们框架的有效性，这些实验涉及具有潜在碰撞的动态移动操纵任务，例如摆臂的运动平衡、重量投掷和自动开门。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种实时全身规划器，用于实现腿式移动机器人的无碰撞动态移动与操作。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在动态环境中难以同时保证机器人自碰撞避免与复杂操作任务的实时性，需更高效的碰撞规避框架。
AI.method: 基于模型预测控制（MPC），将自碰撞与环境碰撞作为软约束，通过符号距离惩罚函数与欧几里得距离场梯度计算实现高效避障。
AI.result: 方法仅轻微增加计算复杂度，硬件实验证明可安全完成摆臂平衡、投掷、开门等高动态操作任务。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效解决了复杂动态场景下的全身运动规划问题，为移动操作机器人提供了实用解决方案。

authors_text: Mathieu Gonzalez,Eric Marchand,Amine Kacete,Jérôme Royan
title: TwistSLAM: Constrained SLAM in Dynamic Environment
title_zh: TwistSLAM：动态环境中的约束 SLAM
comment: This work has been accepted at IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters
comments: This work has been accepted at IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters
abstract: Classical visual simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM) algorithms usually assume the environment to be rigid. This assumption limits the applicability of those algorithms as they are unable to accurately estimate the camera poses and world structure in real life scenes containing moving objects (e.g. cars, bikes, pedestrians, etc.). To tackle this issue, we propose TwistSLAM: a semantic, dynamic and stereo SLAM system that can track dynamic objects in the environment. Our algorithm creates clusters of points according to their semantic class. Thanks to the definition of inter-cluster constraints modeled by mechanical joints (function of the semantic class), a novel constrained bundle adjustment is then able to jointly estimate both poses and velocities of moving objects along with the classical world structure and camera trajectory. We evaluate our approach on several sequences from the public KITTI dataset and demonstrate quantitatively that it improves camera and object tracking compared to state-of-the-art approaches.
summary: Classical visual simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM) algorithms usually assume the environment to be rigid. This assumption limits the applicability of those algorithms as they are unable to accurately estimate the camera poses and world structure in real life scenes containing moving objects (e.g. cars, bikes, pedestrians, etc.). To tackle this issue, we propose TwistSLAM: a semantic, dynamic and stereo SLAM system that can track dynamic objects in the environment. Our algorithm creates clusters of points according to their semantic class. Thanks to the definition of inter-cluster constraints modeled by mechanical joints (function of the semantic class), a novel constrained bundle adjustment is then able to jointly estimate both poses and velocities of moving objects along with the classical world structure and camera trajectory. We evaluate our approach on several sequences from the public KITTI dataset and demonstrate quantitatively that it improves camera and object tracking compared to state-of-the-art approaches.
abstract_zh: 经典的视觉同步定位与建图（SLAM）算法通常假设环境是刚性的。这种假设限制了这些算法的适用性，因为它们无法准确估计包含移动物体（例如汽车、自行车、行人等）的现实生活场景中的相机姿势和世界结构。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 TwistSLAM：一种语义、动态和立体 SLAM 系统，可以跟踪环境中的动态对象。我们的算法根据语义类别创建点簇。由于通过机械关节（语义类的函数）建模的簇间约束的定义，一种新颖的约束束调整能够联合估计移动物体的姿态和速度以及经典的世界结构和相机轨迹。我们在公共 KITTI 数据集中的几个序列上评估了我们的方法，并定量证明与最先进的方法相比，它改进了相机和对象跟踪。

AI.tldr: 本文提出TwistSLAM系统，在动态环境中通过语义约束实现同时定位与地图构建，提升相机和动态物体的跟踪精度。
AI.motivation: 传统SLAM算法假设环境静态，无法处理包含移动物体（如车辆、行人）的真实场景，导致定位和建图误差。
AI.method: 基于语义聚类动态物体点云，通过机械关节约束建模，结合立体视觉与语义信息，联合优化相机轨迹、静态地图及动态物体运动状态。
AI.result: 在KITTI数据集实验中，TwistSLAM相比现有方法显著提升了相机位姿估计和动态物体跟踪的准确性。
AI.conclusion: 通过语义驱动的动态约束建模，TwistSLAM有效解决了动态环境下的SLAM问题，为复杂场景应用提供了新思路。

search_text: TwistSLAM: Constrained SLAM in Dynamic Environment TwistSLAM：动态环境中的约束 SLAM Classical visual simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM) algorithms usually assume the environment to be rigid. This assumption limits the applicability of those algorithms as they are unable to accurately estimate the camera poses and world structure in real life scenes containing moving objects (e.g. cars, bikes, pedestrians, etc.). To tackle this issue, we propose TwistSLAM: a semantic, dynamic and stereo SLAM system that can track dynamic objects in the environment. Our algorithm creates clusters of points according to their semantic class. Thanks to the definition of inter-cluster constraints modeled by mechanical joints (function of the semantic class), a novel constrained bundle adjustment is then able to jointly estimate both poses and velocities of moving objects along with the classical world structure and camera trajectory. We evaluate our approach on several sequences from the public KITTI dataset and demonstrate quantitatively that it improves camera and object tracking compared to state-of-the-art approaches. 经典的视觉同步定位与建图（SLAM）算法通常假设环境是刚性的。这种假设限制了这些算法的适用性，因为它们无法准确估计包含移动物体（例如汽车、自行车、行人等）的现实生活场景中的相机姿势和世界结构。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 TwistSLAM：一种语义、动态和立体 SLAM 系统，可以跟踪环境中的动态对象。我们的算法根据语义类别创建点簇。由于通过机械关节（语义类的函数）建模的簇间约束的定义，一种新颖的约束束调整能够联合估计移动物体的姿态和速度以及经典的世界结构和相机轨迹。我们在公共 KITTI 数据集中的几个序列上评估了我们的方法，并定量证明与最先进的方法相比，它改进了相机和对象跟踪。 本文提出TwistSLAM系统，在动态环境中通过语义约束实现同时定位与地图构建，提升相机和动态物体的跟踪精度。 Mathieu Gonzalez,Eric Marchand,Amine Kacete,Jérôme Royan cs.RO,cs.CV

authors_text: Tiziano Fagni,Stefano Cresci
title: Fine-Grained Prediction of Political Leaning on Social Media with Unsupervised Deep Learning
title_zh: 利用无监督深度学习对社交媒体上的政治倾向进行细粒度预测
abstract: Predicting the political leaning of social media users is an increasingly popular task, given its usefulness for electoral forecasts, opinion dynamics models and for studying the political dimension of polarization and disinformation. Here, we propose a novel unsupervised technique for learning fine-grained political leaning from the textual content of social media posts. Our technique leverages a deep neural network for learning latent political ideologies in a representation learning task. Then, users are projected in a low-dimensional ideology space where they are subsequently clustered. The political leaning of a user is automatically derived from the cluster to which the user is assigned. We evaluated our technique in two challenging classification tasks and we compared it to baselines and other state-of-the-art approaches. Our technique obtains the best results among all unsupervised techniques, with micro F1 = 0.426 in the 8-class task and micro F1 = 0.772 in the 3-class task. Other than being interesting on their own, our results also pave the way for the development of new and better unsupervised approaches for the detection of fine-grained political leaning.
summary: Predicting the political leaning of social media users is an increasingly popular task, given its usefulness for electoral forecasts, opinion dynamics models and for studying the political dimension of polarization and disinformation. Here, we propose a novel unsupervised technique for learning fine-grained political leaning from the textual content of social media posts. Our technique leverages a deep neural network for learning latent political ideologies in a representation learning task. Then, users are projected in a low-dimensional ideology space where they are subsequently clustered. The political leaning of a user is automatically derived from the cluster to which the user is assigned. We evaluated our technique in two challenging classification tasks and we compared it to baselines and other state-of-the-art approaches. Our technique obtains the best results among all unsupervised techniques, with micro F1 = 0.426 in the 8-class task and micro F1 = 0.772 in the 3-class task. Other than being interesting on their own, our results also pave the way for the development of new and better unsupervised approaches for the detection of fine-grained political leaning.
abstract_zh: 预测社交媒体用户的政治倾向是一项越来越受欢迎的任务，因为它对于选举预测、舆论动态模型以及研究两极分化和虚假信息的政治维度非常有用。在这里，我们提出了一种新颖的无监督技术，用于从社交媒体帖子的文本内容中学习细粒度的政治倾向。我们的技术利用深度神经网络来学习表征学习任务中潜在的政治意识形态。然后，用户被投射到一个低维意识形态空间中，随后他们被聚集在一起。用户的政治倾向是从用户所分配到的集群中自动得出的。我们在两个具有挑战性的分类任务中评估了我们的技术，并将其与基线和其他最先进的方法进行了比较。我们的技术在所有无监督技术中获得了最好的结果，在 8 类任务中微 F1 = 0.426，在 3 类任务中微 F1 = 0.772。除了本身有趣之外，我们的结果还为开发新的、更好的无监督方法来检测细粒度的政治倾向铺平了道路。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无监督深度学习方法，通过社交媒体文本内容预测用户的细粒度政治倾向。
AI.motivation: 预测社交媒体用户政治倾向对选举预测、意见动态分析及研究极化现象具有重要意义，但现有方法多依赖标注数据且难以实现细粒度划分。
AI.method: 利用深度神经网络学习文本的潜在政治意识形态表示，将用户映射到低维意识形态空间后通过聚类确定其政治倾向。
AI.result: 在8类任务中微F1达0.426，在3类任务中微F1达0.772，优于其他无监督方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为细粒度政治倾向检测提供了新思路，推动了无监督学习在该领域的应用发展。

authors_text: Sandya Mannarswamy,Dibyendu Das
title: Learning to Combine Instructions in LLVM Compiler
title_zh: 学习在 LLVM 编译器中组合指令
abstract: Instruction combiner (IC) is a critical compiler optimization pass, which replaces a sequence of instructions with an equivalent and optimized instruction sequence at basic block level. There can be thousands of instruction-combining patterns which need to be frequently updated as new coding idioms/applications and novel hardware evolve over time. This results in frequent updates to the IC optimization pass thereby incurring considerable human effort and high software maintenance costs. To mitigate these challenges associated with the traditional IC, we design and implement a Neural Instruction Combiner (NIC) and demonstrate its feasibility by integrating it into the standard LLVM compiler optimization pipeline. NIC leverages neural sequence-to-sequence (Seq2Seq) models for generating optimized encoded IR sequence from the unoptimized encoded IR sequence. To the best of our knowledge, ours is the first work demonstrating the feasibility of a neural instruction combiner built into a full-fledged compiler pipeline. Given the novelty of this task, we built a new dataset for training our NIC neural model. We show that NIC achieves exact match results percentage of 72% for optimized sequences as compared to traditional IC and neural machine translation metric Bleu precision score of 0.94, demonstrating its feasibility in a production compiler pipeline.
summary: Instruction combiner (IC) is a critical compiler optimization pass, which replaces a sequence of instructions with an equivalent and optimized instruction sequence at basic block level. There can be thousands of instruction-combining patterns which need to be frequently updated as new coding idioms/applications and novel hardware evolve over time. This results in frequent updates to the IC optimization pass thereby incurring considerable human effort and high software maintenance costs. To mitigate these challenges associated with the traditional IC, we design and implement a Neural Instruction Combiner (NIC) and demonstrate its feasibility by integrating it into the standard LLVM compiler optimization pipeline. NIC leverages neural sequence-to-sequence (Seq2Seq) models for generating optimized encoded IR sequence from the unoptimized encoded IR sequence. To the best of our knowledge, ours is the first work demonstrating the feasibility of a neural instruction combiner built into a full-fledged compiler pipeline. Given the novelty of this task, we built a new dataset for training our NIC neural model. We show that NIC achieves exact match results percentage of 72% for optimized sequences as compared to traditional IC and neural machine translation metric Bleu precision score of 0.94, demonstrating its feasibility in a production compiler pipeline.
abstract_zh: 指令组合器 (IC) 是一个关键的编译器优化过程，它在基本块级别用等效且优化的指令序列替换指令序列。随着新的编码习惯/应用程序和新颖的硬件随着时间的推移而发展，可能有数千种指令组合模式需要经常更新。这导致 IC 优化过程频繁更新，从而产生大量的人力和高昂的软件维护成本。为了缓解与传统 IC 相关的这些挑战，我们设计并实现了神经指令组合器 (NIC)，并通过将其集成到标准 LLVM 编译器优化管道中来证明其可行性。 NIC 利用神经序列到序列 (Seq2Seq) 模型从未优化的编码 IR 序列生成优化的编码 IR 序列。据我们所知，我们的工作是第一个证明将神经指令组合器内置到成熟的编译器管道中的可行性的工作。鉴于此任务的新颖性，我们构建了一个新的数据集来训练 NIC 神经模型。我们表明，与传统 IC 和神经机器翻译指标 Bleu 精度得分 0.94 相比，NIC 对于优化序列实现了 72% 的精确匹配结果百分比，证明了其在生产编译器管道中的可行性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种神经指令组合器（NIC），通过神经序列到序列模型优化LLVM编译器中的指令组合过程。
AI.motivation: 传统指令组合器需要频繁更新以适应新硬件和应用，导致维护成本高且依赖人工规则。
AI.method: 设计基于神经序列到序列（Seq2Seq）模型的NIC，将未优化的中间表示（IR）编码为优化后的IR序列，并构建新数据集进行训练。
AI.result: NIC在优化序列精确匹配率上达到72%，BLEU精度得分0.94，验证了其在生产编译器中的可行性。
AI.conclusion: NIC是首个集成到完整编译器流水线的神经指令组合方案，为自动编译优化提供了新方向。

authors_text: Bruno Ferrarini,Michael Milford,Klaus D. McDonald-Maier,Shoaib Ehsan
title: Highly-Efficient Binary Neural Networks for Visual Place Recognition
title_zh: 用于视觉地点识别的高效二元神经网络
abstract: VPR is a fundamental task for autonomous navigation as it enables a robot to localize itself in the workspace when a known location is detected. Although accuracy is an essential requirement for a VPR technique, computational and energy efficiency are not less important for real-world applications. CNN-based techniques archive state-of-the-art VPR performance but are computationally intensive and energy demanding. Binary neural networks (BNN) have been recently proposed to address VPR efficiently. Although a typical BNN is an order of magnitude more efficient than a CNN, its processing time and energy usage can be further improved. In a typical BNN, the first convolution is not completely binarized for the sake of accuracy. Consequently, the first layer is the slowest network stage, requiring a large share of the entire computational effort. This paper presents a class of BNNs for VPR that combines depthwise separable factorization and binarization to replace the first convolutional layer to improve computational and energy efficiency. Our best model achieves state-of-the-art VPR performance while spending considerably less time and energy to process an image than a BNN using a non-binary convolution as a first stage.
summary: VPR is a fundamental task for autonomous navigation as it enables a robot to localize itself in the workspace when a known location is detected. Although accuracy is an essential requirement for a VPR technique, computational and energy efficiency are not less important for real-world applications. CNN-based techniques archive state-of-the-art VPR performance but are computationally intensive and energy demanding. Binary neural networks (BNN) have been recently proposed to address VPR efficiently. Although a typical BNN is an order of magnitude more efficient than a CNN, its processing time and energy usage can be further improved. In a typical BNN, the first convolution is not completely binarized for the sake of accuracy. Consequently, the first layer is the slowest network stage, requiring a large share of the entire computational effort. This paper presents a class of BNNs for VPR that combines depthwise separable factorization and binarization to replace the first convolutional layer to improve computational and energy efficiency. Our best model achieves state-of-the-art VPR performance while spending considerably less time and energy to process an image than a BNN using a non-binary convolution as a first stage.
abstract_zh: VPR 是自主导航的一项基本任务，因为它使机器人能够在检测到已知位置时在工作空间中进行自身定位。尽管准确性是 VPR 技术的基本要求，但计算和能源效率对于实际应用也同样重要。基于 CNN 的技术可实现最先进的 VPR 性能，但计算量大且能耗高。最近提出了二元神经网络（BNN）来有效解决 VPR 问题。虽然典型的 BNN 比 CNN 效率高一个数量级，但其处理时间和能源使用还可以进一步改进。在典型的 BNN 中，为了准确性，第一个卷积并未完全二值化。因此，第一层是最慢的网络阶段，需要整个计算工作的大部分。本文提出了一类用于 VPR 的 BNN，它结合了深度可分离分解和二值化来取代第一个卷积层，以提高计算和能源效率。我们的最佳模型实现了最先进的 VPR 性能，同时与使用非二值卷积作为第一阶段的 BNN 相比，处理图像所花费的时间和精力要少得多。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种高效的二进制神经网络（BNN）用于视觉地点识别（VPR），以提高计算和能量效率。
AI.motivation: 虽然基于CNN的VPR方法性能优异，但计算和能耗较高。尽管BNN比CNN更高效，但其第一层卷积未完全二值化，导致计算效率受限，因此需要进一步优化。
AI.method: 本文通过结合深度可分离分解和二值化技术，替换BNN中的第一层卷积，以提升计算和能量效率。
AI.result: 该方法在保持VPR性能的同时，显著降低了图像处理的时间和能耗。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为VPR任务提供了一种高效且节能的BNN解决方案，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Xuanlong Yu,Gianni Franchi,Emanuel Aldea
title: On Monocular Depth Estimation and Uncertainty Quantification using Classification Approaches for Regression
title_zh: 使用回归分类方法进行单目深度估计和不确定性量化
comment: 4 pages (main paper), 2 pages (supp.) Main paper is accepted at ICIP 2022
comments: 4 pages (main paper), 2 pages (supp.) Main paper is accepted at ICIP 2022
abstract: Monocular depth is important in many tasks, such as 3D reconstruction and autonomous driving. Deep learning based models achieve state-of-the-art performance in this field. A set of novel approaches for estimating monocular depth consists of transforming the regression task into a classification one. However, there is a lack of detailed descriptions and comparisons for Classification Approaches for Regression (CAR) in the community and no in-depth exploration of their potential for uncertainty estimation. To this end, this paper will introduce a taxonomy and summary of CAR approaches, a new uncertainty estimation solution for CAR, and a set of experiments on depth accuracy and uncertainty quantification for CAR-based models on KITTI dataset. The experiments reflect the differences in the portability of various CAR methods on two backbones. Meanwhile, the newly proposed method for uncertainty estimation can outperform the ensembling method with only one forward propagation.
summary: Monocular depth is important in many tasks, such as 3D reconstruction and autonomous driving. Deep learning based models achieve state-of-the-art performance in this field. A set of novel approaches for estimating monocular depth consists of transforming the regression task into a classification one. However, there is a lack of detailed descriptions and comparisons for Classification Approaches for Regression (CAR) in the community and no in-depth exploration of their potential for uncertainty estimation. To this end, this paper will introduce a taxonomy and summary of CAR approaches, a new uncertainty estimation solution for CAR, and a set of experiments on depth accuracy and uncertainty quantification for CAR-based models on KITTI dataset. The experiments reflect the differences in the portability of various CAR methods on two backbones. Meanwhile, the newly proposed method for uncertainty estimation can outperform the ensembling method with only one forward propagation.
abstract_zh: 单目深度在许多任务中都很重要，例如 3D 重建和自动驾驶。基于深度学习的模型在该领域实现了最先进的性能。一组估计单眼深度的新颖方法包括将回归任务转换为分类任务。然而，社区中缺乏对回归分类方法（CAR）的详细描述和比较，也没有对其不确定性估计的潜力进行深入探索。为此，本文将介绍 CAR 方法的分类和总结、一种新的 CAR 不确定性估计解决方案，以及在 KITTI 数据集上基于 CAR 的模型的深度精度和不确定性量化的一组实验。实验反映了不同 CAR 方法在两个骨干网上可移植性的差异。同时，新提出的不确定性估计方法可以优于仅一次前向传播的集成方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用分类方法进行单目深度估计与不确定性量化，通过分类回归（CAR）方法改进深度估计并提出新的不确定性评估方案。
AI.motivation: 现有单目深度估计模型缺乏对分类回归（CAR）方法的系统性比较和不确定性量化研究，需探索其潜力并优化实际应用效果。
AI.method: 构建CAR方法分类体系，设计无需集成的单次前向传播不确定性估计方法，并在KITTI数据集上对比不同主干网络的深度精度与不确定性量化性能。
AI.result: 新方法在单次前向传播下优于集成方法，不同CAR方法在两种主干网络上的可移植性存在显著差异，实验验证了深度精度与不确定性量化的有效性。
AI.conclusion: CAR方法适用于单目深度估计，所提不确定性方案兼具效率与精度，但其性能受主干网络选择影响显著。

authors_text: Ambareesh Revanur,Ananyananda Dasari,Conrad S. Tucker,Laszlo A. Jeni
title: Instantaneous Physiological Estimation using Video Transformers
title_zh: 使用视频转换器进行瞬时生理估计
comment: 13 pages, 4 figures, AAAI workshop and Springer Studies in Computational Intelligence 2022. For project page see https://github.com/revanurambareesh/instantaneous_transformer
comments: 13 pages, 4 figures, AAAI workshop and Springer Studies in Computational Intelligence 2022. For project page see https://github.com/revanurambareesh/instantaneous_transformer
abstract: Video-based physiological signal estimation has been limited primarily to predicting episodic scores in windowed intervals. While these intermittent values are useful, they provide an incomplete picture of patients' physiological status and may lead to late detection of critical conditions. We propose a video Transformer for estimating instantaneous heart rate and respiration rate from face videos. Physiological signals are typically confounded by alignment errors in space and time. To overcome this, we formulated the loss in the frequency domain. We evaluated the method on the large scale Vision-for-Vitals (V4V) benchmark. It outperformed both shallow and deep learning based methods for instantaneous respiration rate estimation. In the case of heart-rate estimation, it achieved an instantaneous-MAE of 13.0 beats-per-minute.
summary: Video-based physiological signal estimation has been limited primarily to predicting episodic scores in windowed intervals. While these intermittent values are useful, they provide an incomplete picture of patients' physiological status and may lead to late detection of critical conditions. We propose a video Transformer for estimating instantaneous heart rate and respiration rate from face videos. Physiological signals are typically confounded by alignment errors in space and time. To overcome this, we formulated the loss in the frequency domain. We evaluated the method on the large scale Vision-for-Vitals (V4V) benchmark. It outperformed both shallow and deep learning based methods for instantaneous respiration rate estimation. In the case of heart-rate estimation, it achieved an instantaneous-MAE of 13.0 beats-per-minute.
abstract_zh: 基于视频的生理信号估计主要限于预测窗口间隔内的情景分数。虽然这些间歇值很有用，但它们不能完整地反映患者的生理状态，并可能导致危急情况的延迟检测。我们提出了一个视频 Transformer，用于根据面部视频估计瞬时心率和呼吸率。生理信号通常会因空间和时间的对准误差而混淆。为了克服这个问题，我们在频域中制定了损耗。我们在大规模 Vision-for-Vitals (V4V) 基准测试中评估了该方法。它优于基于浅层和深度学习的瞬时呼吸率估计方法。在心率估计方面，它实现了每分钟 13.0 次的瞬时 MAE。

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用视频Transformer模型实时估计心率和呼吸率，解决传统方法在时间窗口内间断性评估的不足。
AI.motivation: 传统视频生理信号估计方法依赖时间窗口内的间断性评分，无法提供连续数据，可能导致关键病情的延迟检测。
AI.method: 设计基于视频Transformer的模型，通过频域损失函数解决时空对齐误差，实现生理信号的实时估计。
AI.result: 在V4V基准测试中，该方法在瞬时呼吸率估计上优于浅层和深度学习方法，心率估计的瞬时MAE为13.0 BPM。
AI.conclusion: 视频Transformer方法能有效实现实时生理信号监测，提升关键病情的早期检测能力。

search_text: Instantaneous Physiological Estimation using Video Transformers 使用视频转换器进行瞬时生理估计 Video-based physiological signal estimation has been limited primarily to predicting episodic scores in windowed intervals. While these intermittent values are useful, they provide an incomplete picture of patients' physiological status and may lead to late detection of critical conditions. We propose a video Transformer for estimating instantaneous heart rate and respiration rate from face videos. Physiological signals are typically confounded by alignment errors in space and time. To overcome this, we formulated the loss in the frequency domain. We evaluated the method on the large scale Vision-for-Vitals (V4V) benchmark. It outperformed both shallow and deep learning based methods for instantaneous respiration rate estimation. In the case of heart-rate estimation, it achieved an instantaneous-MAE of 13.0 beats-per-minute. 基于视频的生理信号估计主要限于预测窗口间隔内的情景分数。虽然这些间歇值很有用，但它们不能完整地反映患者的生理状态，并可能导致危急情况的延迟检测。我们提出了一个视频 Transformer，用于根据面部视频估计瞬时心率和呼吸率。生理信号通常会因空间和时间的对准误差而混淆。为了克服这个问题，我们在频域中制定了损耗。我们在大规模 Vision-for-Vitals (V4V) 基准测试中评估了该方法。它优于基于浅层和深度学习的瞬时呼吸率估计方法。在心率估计方面，它实现了每分钟 13.0 次的瞬时 MAE。 本文提出使用视频Transformer模型实时估计心率和呼吸率，解决传统方法在时间窗口内间断性评估的不足。 Ambareesh Revanur,Ananyananda Dasari,Conrad S. Tucker,Laszlo A. Jeni cs.CV

authors_text: Karthik Urs,Challen Enninful Adu,Elliott J. Rouse,Talia Y. Moore
title: Alternative Metrics to Select Motors for Quasi-Direct Drive Actuators
title_zh: 为准直接驱动执行器选择电机的替代指标
abstract: Robotic systems for legged locomotion -- including legged robots, exoskeletons, and prosthetics -- require actuators with low inertia and high output torque. Traditionally, motors have been selected for these applications by maximizing the motor gap radius. We present alternative metrics for motor selection that are invariant to transmission ratio. The proposed metrics reward minimizing the motor inertia while maximizing the torque and motor constants without special consideration for gap radius, providing a better balance of properties for legged locomotion applications. We rigorously characterize the T-Motor RI50 and demonstrate the use of the metrics by comparing the RI50 to the widely-used T-Motor U8 as a case study.
summary: Robotic systems for legged locomotion -- including legged robots, exoskeletons, and prosthetics -- require actuators with low inertia and high output torque. Traditionally, motors have been selected for these applications by maximizing the motor gap radius. We present alternative metrics for motor selection that are invariant to transmission ratio. The proposed metrics reward minimizing the motor inertia while maximizing the torque and motor constants without special consideration for gap radius, providing a better balance of properties for legged locomotion applications. We rigorously characterize the T-Motor RI50 and demonstrate the use of the metrics by comparing the RI50 to the widely-used T-Motor U8 as a case study.
abstract_zh: 用于腿式运动的机器人系统——包括腿式机器人、外骨骼和假肢——需要具有低惯性和高输出扭矩的执行器。传统上，通过最大化电机间隙半径来为这些应用选择电机。我们提出了与传动比无关的电机选择替代指标。所提出的指标奖励最小化电机惯量，同时最大化扭矩和电机常数，而无需特别考虑间隙半径，从而为腿式运动应用提供更好的性能平衡。我们严格描述了 T-Motor RI50 的特征，并通过将 RI50 与广泛使用的 T-Motor U8 作为案例研究进行比较来演示这些指标的使用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于选择准直驱执行器电机的替代指标，以优化腿部运动系统的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统方法通过最大化电机间隙半径选择电机，但该方法未充分平衡惯性、扭矩等关键参数，影响腿部机器人等应用的性能。
AI.method: 提出与传动比无关的指标，综合考虑电机惯性、扭矩常数等参数，并通过对比T-Motor RI50与U8电机验证指标有效性。
AI.result: 量化表征RI50电机性能，证明新指标能更优平衡动力学特性，优于传统选型方法。
AI.conclusion: 新指标为腿部运动系统电机选型提供了更科学的评估框架，可提升系统整体性能。

authors_text: Peter Schaldenbrand,Zhixuan Liu,Jean Oh
title: StyleCLIPDraw: Coupling Content and Style in Text-to-Drawing Translation
title_zh: StyleCLIPDraw：在文本到绘图翻译中耦合内容和风格
abstract: Generating images that fit a given text description using machine learning has improved greatly with the release of technologies such as the CLIP image-text encoder model; however, current methods lack artistic control of the style of image to be generated. We present an approach for generating styled drawings for a given text description where a user can specify a desired drawing style using a sample image. Inspired by a theory in art that style and content are generally inseparable during the creative process, we propose a coupled approach, known here as StyleCLIPDraw, whereby the drawing is generated by optimizing for style and content simultaneously throughout the process as opposed to applying style transfer after creating content in a sequence. Based on human evaluation, the styles of images generated by StyleCLIPDraw are strongly preferred to those by the sequential approach. Although the quality of content generation degrades for certain styles, overall considering both content \textit{and} style, StyleCLIPDraw is found far more preferred, indicating the importance of style, look, and feel of machine generated images to people as well as indicating that style is coupled in the drawing process itself. Our code (https://github.com/pschaldenbrand/StyleCLIPDraw), a demonstration (https://replicate.com/pschaldenbrand/style-clip-draw), and style evaluation data (https://www.kaggle.com/pittsburghskeet/drawings-with-style-evaluation-styleclipdraw) are publicly available.
summary: Generating images that fit a given text description using machine learning has improved greatly with the release of technologies such as the CLIP image-text encoder model; however, current methods lack artistic control of the style of image to be generated. We present an approach for generating styled drawings for a given text description where a user can specify a desired drawing style using a sample image. Inspired by a theory in art that style and content are generally inseparable during the creative process, we propose a coupled approach, known here as StyleCLIPDraw, whereby the drawing is generated by optimizing for style and content simultaneously throughout the process as opposed to applying style transfer after creating content in a sequence. Based on human evaluation, the styles of images generated by StyleCLIPDraw are strongly preferred to those by the sequential approach. Although the quality of content generation degrades for certain styles, overall considering both content \textit{and} style, StyleCLIPDraw is found far more preferred, indicating the importance of style, look, and feel of machine generated images to people as well as indicating that style is coupled in the drawing process itself. Our code (https://github.com/pschaldenbrand/StyleCLIPDraw), a demonstration (https://replicate.com/pschaldenbrand/style-clip-draw), and style evaluation data (https://www.kaggle.com/pittsburghskeet/drawings-with-style-evaluation-styleclipdraw) are publicly available.
abstract_zh: 随着 CLIP 图文编码器模型等技术的发布，使用机器学习生成适合给定文本描述的图像有了很大的改进；然而，当前的方法缺乏对生成图像风格的艺术控制。我们提出了一种为给定文本描述生成样式绘图的方法，其中用户可以使用示例图像指定所需的绘图样式。受到艺术理论的启发，即风格和内容在创作过程中通常是不可分割的，我们提出了一种耦合方法，此处称为 StyleCLIPDraw，通过在整个过程中同时优化风格和内容来生成绘图，而不是在按顺序创建内容后应用风格转移。根据人类评估，StyleCLIPDraw 生成的图像风格明显优于顺序方法生成的图像风格。尽管某些样式的内容生成质量会下降，但总体而言，考虑到内容 \textit{和} 样式，StyleCLIPDraw 更受欢迎，这表明了机器生成图像的样式、外观和感觉对人们的重要性，并表明样式在绘图过程本身中是耦合的。我们的代码（https://github.com/pschaldenbrand/StyleCLIPDraw）、演示（https://replicate.com/pschaldenbrand/style-clip-draw）和风格评估数据（https://www.kaggle.com/pittsburghskeet/drawings-with-style-evaluation-styleclipdraw）都是公开的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出StyleCLIPDraw方法，通过同时优化内容与风格生成符合文本描述的风格化插画。
AI.motivation: 现有文本到图像生成方法缺乏对艺术风格的控制能力，而艺术创作中风格与内容本应不可分割。
AI.method: 基于CLIP模型，设计耦合优化框架，在生成过程中同步考虑文本内容与参考样例的风格特征。
AI.result: 人类评估显示生成图像的风格偏好度显著提升，尽管部分风格的内容质量略有下降。
AI.conclusion: 风格与内容的耦合优化能显著提升生成图像的审美接受度，验证了风格在机器创作中的核心地位。

authors_text: Maryam Rahnemoonfar,Tashnim Chowdhury,Robin Murphy
title: RescueNet: A High Resolution UAV Semantic Segmentation Benchmark Dataset for Natural Disaster Damage Assessment
title_zh: RescueNet：用于自然灾害损失评估的高分辨率无人机语义分割基准数据集
abstract: Recent advancements in computer vision and deep learning techniques have facilitated notable progress in scene understanding, thereby assisting rescue teams in achieving precise damage assessment. In this paper, we present RescueNet, a meticulously curated high-resolution post-disaster dataset that includes detailed classification and semantic segmentation annotations. This dataset aims to facilitate comprehensive scene understanding in the aftermath of natural disasters. RescueNet comprises post-disaster images collected after Hurricane Michael, obtained using Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) from multiple impacted regions. The uniqueness of RescueNet lies in its provision of high-resolution post-disaster imagery, accompanied by comprehensive annotations for each image. Unlike existing datasets that offer annotations limited to specific scene elements such as buildings, RescueNet provides pixel-level annotations for all classes, including buildings, roads, pools, trees, and more. Furthermore, we evaluate the utility of the dataset by implementing state-of-the-art segmentation models on RescueNet, demonstrating its value in enhancing existing methodologies for natural disaster damage assessment.
summary: Recent advancements in computer vision and deep learning techniques have facilitated notable progress in scene understanding, thereby assisting rescue teams in achieving precise damage assessment. In this paper, we present RescueNet, a meticulously curated high-resolution post-disaster dataset that includes detailed classification and semantic segmentation annotations. This dataset aims to facilitate comprehensive scene understanding in the aftermath of natural disasters. RescueNet comprises post-disaster images collected after Hurricane Michael, obtained using Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) from multiple impacted regions. The uniqueness of RescueNet lies in its provision of high-resolution post-disaster imagery, accompanied by comprehensive annotations for each image. Unlike existing datasets that offer annotations limited to specific scene elements such as buildings, RescueNet provides pixel-level annotations for all classes, including buildings, roads, pools, trees, and more. Furthermore, we evaluate the utility of the dataset by implementing state-of-the-art segmentation models on RescueNet, demonstrating its value in enhancing existing methodologies for natural disaster damage assessment.
abstract_zh: 计算机视觉和深度学习技术的最新进展促进了场景理解的显着进步，从而帮助救援团队实现精确的损害评估。在本文中，我们提出了 RescueNet，这是一个精心策划的高分辨率灾后数据集，其中包括详细的分类和语义分割注释。该数据集旨在促进自然灾害发生后的全面场景理解。 RescueNet 包含飓风迈克尔之后使用无人机 (UAV) 从多个受影响地区收集的灾后图像。 RescueNet 的独特之处在于它提供高分辨率的灾后图像，并附有每张图像的全面注释。与现有数据集提供仅限于特定场景元素（例如建筑物）的注释不同，RescueNet 为所有类别提供像素级注释，包括建筑物、道路、水池、树木等。此外，我们通过在 RescueNet 上实施最先进的分割模型来评估数据集的实用性，证明其在增强现有自然灾害损失评估方法方面的价值。

AI.tldr: 本文提出RescueNet，一个用于自然灾害损毁评估的高分辨率无人机语义分割基准数据集。
AI.motivation: 现有数据集的标注范围有限，无法满足自然灾害后复杂场景的精细损毁评估需求，需更全面的像素级标注数据支持。
AI.method: 通过无人机采集飓风后的高分辨率影像，对建筑、道路、水池、树木等多类别进行像素级语义分割标注，并测试先进分割模型验证数据集有效性。
AI.result: RescueNet显著提升了现有分割模型在自然灾害场景下的损毁识别精度，验证了其在实际应用中的价值。
AI.conclusion: RescueNet填补了高分辨率多类别标注数据的空白，为灾害评估算法研究提供了关键基准支持。

ai_content.result: RescueNet显著提升了现有分割模型在自然灾害场景下的损毁识别精度，验证了其在实际应用中的价值。

search_text: RescueNet: A High Resolution UAV Semantic Segmentation Benchmark Dataset for Natural Disaster Damage Assessment RescueNet：用于自然灾害损失评估的高分辨率无人机语义分割基准数据集 Recent advancements in computer vision and deep learning techniques have facilitated notable progress in scene understanding, thereby assisting rescue teams in achieving precise damage assessment. In this paper, we present RescueNet, a meticulously curated high-resolution post-disaster dataset that includes detailed classification and semantic segmentation annotations. This dataset aims to facilitate comprehensive scene understanding in the aftermath of natural disasters. RescueNet comprises post-disaster images collected after Hurricane Michael, obtained using Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) from multiple impacted regions. The uniqueness of RescueNet lies in its provision of high-resolution post-disaster imagery, accompanied by comprehensive annotations for each image. Unlike existing datasets that offer annotations limited to specific scene elements such as buildings, RescueNet provides pixel-level annotations for all classes, including buildings, roads, pools, trees, and more. Furthermore, we evaluate the utility of the dataset by implementing state-of-the-art segmentation models on RescueNet, demonstrating its value in enhancing existing methodologies for natural disaster damage assessment. 计算机视觉和深度学习技术的最新进展促进了场景理解的显着进步，从而帮助救援团队实现精确的损害评估。在本文中，我们提出了 RescueNet，这是一个精心策划的高分辨率灾后数据集，其中包括详细的分类和语义分割注释。该数据集旨在促进自然灾害发生后的全面场景理解。 RescueNet 包含飓风迈克尔之后使用无人机 (UAV) 从多个受影响地区收集的灾后图像。 RescueNet 的独特之处在于它提供高分辨率的灾后图像，并附有每张图像的全面注释。与现有数据集提供仅限于特定场景元素（例如建筑物）的注释不同，RescueNet 为所有类别提供像素级注释，包括建筑物、道路、水池、树木等。此外，我们通过在 RescueNet 上实施最先进的分割模型来评估数据集的实用性，证明其在增强现有自然灾害损失评估方法方面的价值。 本文提出RescueNet，一个用于自然灾害损毁评估的高分辨率无人机语义分割基准数据集。 Maryam Rahnemoonfar,Tashnim Chowdhury,Robin Murphy cs.CV

authors_text: Daniel Khashabi,Yeganeh Kordi,Hannaneh Hajishirzi
title: UnifiedQA-v2: Stronger Generalization via Broader Cross-Format Training
title_zh: UnifiedQA-v2：通过更广泛的跨格式训练增强泛化能力
abstract: We present UnifiedQA-v2, a QA model built with the same process as UnifiedQA, except that it utilizes more supervision -- roughly 3x the number of datasets used for UnifiedQA. This generally leads to better in-domain and cross-domain results.
summary: We present UnifiedQA-v2, a QA model built with the same process as UnifiedQA, except that it utilizes more supervision -- roughly 3x the number of datasets used for UnifiedQA. This generally leads to better in-domain and cross-domain results.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 UnifiedQA-v2，这是一种使用与 UnifiedQA 相同流程构建的 QA 模型，不同之处在于它利用了更多监督——大约是 UnifiedQA 所用数据集数量的 3 倍。这通常会带来更好的域内和跨域结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出UnifiedQA-v2问答模型，通过更广泛的跨格式训练提升模型泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 为提升问答模型在领域内和跨领域的性能，通过增加训练数据集数量和多样性来增强模型泛化能力。
AI.method: 在原有UnifiedQA基础上扩展三倍数据集规模，采用相同训练流程进行跨格式训练。
AI.result: 模型在领域内和跨领域任务中均取得优于原有版本的性能表现。
AI.conclusion: 增加跨格式训练数据量能有效提升问答模型的泛化能力，验证了数据多样性对模型性能的关键作用。

authors_text: Benjamin Wu,Oliver Hennigh,Jan Kautz,Sanjay Choudhry,Wonmin Byeon
title: Physics Informed RNN-DCT Networks for Time-Dependent Partial Differential Equations
title_zh: 用于时相关偏微分方程的物理学 RNN-DCT 网络
comment: Benjamin Wu and Wonmin Byeon contributed equally to this work. 12 pages, 3 figures
comments: Benjamin Wu and Wonmin Byeon contributed equally to this work. 12 pages, 3 figures
abstract: Physics-informed neural networks allow models to be trained by physical laws described by general nonlinear partial differential equations. However, traditional architectures struggle to solve more challenging time-dependent problems due to their architectural nature. In this work, we present a novel physics-informed framework for solving time-dependent partial differential equations. Using only the governing differential equations and problem initial and boundary conditions, we generate a latent representation of the problem's spatio-temporal dynamics. Our model utilizes discrete cosine transforms to encode spatial frequencies and recurrent neural networks to process the time evolution. This efficiently and flexibly produces a compressed representation which is used for additional conditioning of physics-informed models. We show experimental results on the Taylor-Green vortex solution to the Navier-Stokes equations. Our proposed model achieves state-of-the-art performance on the Taylor-Green vortex relative to other physics-informed baseline models.
summary: Physics-informed neural networks allow models to be trained by physical laws described by general nonlinear partial differential equations. However, traditional architectures struggle to solve more challenging time-dependent problems due to their architectural nature. In this work, we present a novel physics-informed framework for solving time-dependent partial differential equations. Using only the governing differential equations and problem initial and boundary conditions, we generate a latent representation of the problem's spatio-temporal dynamics. Our model utilizes discrete cosine transforms to encode spatial frequencies and recurrent neural networks to process the time evolution. This efficiently and flexibly produces a compressed representation which is used for additional conditioning of physics-informed models. We show experimental results on the Taylor-Green vortex solution to the Navier-Stokes equations. Our proposed model achieves state-of-the-art performance on the Taylor-Green vortex relative to other physics-informed baseline models.
abstract_zh: 基于物理的神经网络允许通过一般非线性偏微分方程描述的物理定律来训练模型。然而，由于其架构性质，传统架构很难解决更具挑战性的时间相关问题。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的物理知识框架，用于求解瞬态偏微分方程。仅使用控制微分方程以及问题初始条件和边界条件，我们生成问题时空动力学的潜在表示。我们的模型利用离散余弦变换来编码空间频率，并利用循环神经网络来处理时间演化。这有效且灵活地产生压缩表示，用于物理信息模型的附加条件。我们展示了纳维-斯托克斯方程的泰勒-格林涡旋解的实验结果。相对于其他基于物理的基线模型，我们提出的模型在泰勒格林涡旋上实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合离散余弦变换（DCT）和循环神经网络（RNN）的物理信息框架，用于求解时间依赖偏微分方程。
AI.motivation: 传统物理信息神经网络在处理复杂时间依赖问题时存在架构局限性，需更高效的时空动态建模方法。
AI.method: 利用DCT编码空间频率，RNN处理时间演化，通过物理方程和边界条件生成压缩的时空表示以增强模型条件。
AI.result: 在Navier-Stokes方程的Taylor-Green涡旋问题上，模型性能优于其他物理信息基线方法，达到最先进水平。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了时间依赖PDE问题，展示了物理信息模型在时空动态建模中的潜力。

authors_text: Nitay Calderon,Eyal Ben-David,Amir Feder,Roi Reichart
title: DoCoGen: Domain Counterfactual Generation for Low Resource Domain Adaptation
title_zh: DoCoGen：低资源域适应的域反事实生成
comment: Our code and data are available at https://github.com/nitaytech/DoCoGen
comments: Our code and data are available at https://github.com/nitaytech/DoCoGen
abstract: Natural language processing (NLP) algorithms have become very successful, but they still struggle when applied to out-of-distribution examples. In this paper we propose a controllable generation approach in order to deal with this domain adaptation (DA) challenge. Given an input text example, our DoCoGen algorithm generates a domain-counterfactual textual example (D-con) - that is similar to the original in all aspects, including the task label, but its domain is changed to a desired one. Importantly, DoCoGen is trained using only unlabeled examples from multiple domains - no NLP task labels or parallel pairs of textual examples and their domain-counterfactuals are required. We show that DoCoGen can generate coherent counterfactuals consisting of multiple sentences. We use the D-cons generated by DoCoGen to augment a sentiment classifier and a multi-label intent classifier in 20 and 78 DA setups, respectively, where source-domain labeled data is scarce. Our model outperforms strong baselines and improves the accuracy of a state-of-the-art unsupervised DA algorithm.
summary: Natural language processing (NLP) algorithms have become very successful, but they still struggle when applied to out-of-distribution examples. In this paper we propose a controllable generation approach in order to deal with this domain adaptation (DA) challenge. Given an input text example, our DoCoGen algorithm generates a domain-counterfactual textual example (D-con) - that is similar to the original in all aspects, including the task label, but its domain is changed to a desired one. Importantly, DoCoGen is trained using only unlabeled examples from multiple domains - no NLP task labels or parallel pairs of textual examples and their domain-counterfactuals are required. We show that DoCoGen can generate coherent counterfactuals consisting of multiple sentences. We use the D-cons generated by DoCoGen to augment a sentiment classifier and a multi-label intent classifier in 20 and 78 DA setups, respectively, where source-domain labeled data is scarce. Our model outperforms strong baselines and improves the accuracy of a state-of-the-art unsupervised DA algorithm.
abstract_zh: 自然语言处理 (NLP) 算法已经非常成功，但在应用于分布外示例时仍然遇到困难。在本文中，我们提出了一种可控生成方法来应对域适应（DA）挑战。给定一个输入文本示例，我们的 DoCoGen 算法会生成一个域反事实文本示例 (D-con) - 该示例在所有方面都与原始示例相似，包括任务标签，但其域已更改为所需的域。重要的是，DoCoGen 仅使用来自多个领域的未标记示例进行训练 - 不需要 NLP 任务标签或并行文本示例对及其域反事实。我们证明 DoCoGen 可以生成由多个句子组成的连贯的反事实。我们使用 DoCoGen 生成的 D-cons 分别在 20 个和 78 个 DA 设置中增强情感分类器和多标签意图分类器，其中源域标记数据稀缺。我们的模型优于强大的基线，并提高了最先进的无监督 DA 算法的准确性。

AI.tldr: 提出DoCoGen方法生成领域反事实文本以解决低资源领域自适应问题
AI.motivation: 现有NLP模型在分布外数据表现不佳，而领域自适应需大量标注数据，低资源场景下难以获取目标领域标注数据
AI.method: 基于无监督学习框架，利用多领域无标签数据训练生成模型，通过可控生成改变文本领域属性同时保持任务标签不变
AI.result: 在20个情感分类和78个意图分类任务中，使用生成数据增强后分类准确率超越强基线和现有最优无监督领域自适应方法
AI.conclusion: DoCoGen通过生成领域反事实数据有效提升低资源场景下领域自适应性能，为无监督领域自适应提供新解决方案
