motivation: 现有NLP模型在分布外数据表现不佳，而领域自适应需大量标注数据，低资源场景下难以获取目标领域标注数据
method: 基于无监督学习框架，利用多领域无标签数据训练生成模型，通过可控生成改变文本领域属性同时保持任务标签不变
result: 在20个情感分类和78个意图分类任务中，使用生成数据增强后分类准确率超越强基线和现有最优无监督领域自适应方法
conclusion: DoCoGen通过生成领域反事实数据有效提升低资源场景下领域自适应性能，为无监督领域自适应提供新解决方案
search_text: DoCoGen: Domain Counterfactual Generation for Low Resource Domain Adaptation DoCoGen：低资源域适应的域反事实生成 Natural language processing (NLP) algorithms have become very successful, but they still struggle when applied to out-of-distribution examples. In this paper we propose a controllable generation approach in order to deal with this domain adaptation (DA) challenge. Given an input text example, our DoCoGen algorithm generates a domain-counterfactual textual example (D-con) - that is similar to the original in all aspects, including the task label, but its domain is changed to a desired one. Importantly, DoCoGen is trained using only unlabeled examples from multiple domains - no NLP task labels or parallel pairs of textual examples and their domain-counterfactuals are required. We show that DoCoGen can generate coherent counterfactuals consisting of multiple sentences. We use the D-cons generated by DoCoGen to augment a sentiment classifier and a multi-label intent classifier in 20 and 78 DA setups, respectively, where source-domain labeled data is scarce. Our model outperforms strong baselines and improves the accuracy of a state-of-the-art unsupervised DA algorithm. 自然语言处理 (NLP) 算法已经非常成功，但在应用于分布外示例时仍然遇到困难。在本文中，我们提出了一种可控生成方法来应对域适应（DA）挑战。给定一个输入文本示例，我们的 DoCoGen 算法会生成一个域反事实文本示例 (D-con) - 该示例在所有方面都与原始示例相似，包括任务标签，但其域已更改为所需的域。重要的是，DoCoGen 仅使用来自多个领域的未标记示例进行训练 - 不需要 NLP 任务标签或并行文本示例对及其域反事实。我们证明 DoCoGen 可以生成由多个句子组成的连贯的反事实。我们使用 DoCoGen 生成的 D-cons 分别在 20 个和 78 个 DA 设置中增强情感分类器和多标签意图分类器，其中源域标记数据稀缺。我们的模型优于强大的基线，并提高了最先进的无监督 DA 算法的准确性。 提出DoCoGen方法生成领域反事实文本以解决低资源领域自适应问题 Nitay Calderon,Eyal Ben-David,Amir Feder,Roi Reichart cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Federico Errica
title: Bayesian Deep Learning for Graphs
title_zh: 图的贝叶斯深度学习
abstract: The adaptive processing of structured data is a long-standing research topic in machine learning that investigates how to automatically learn a mapping from a structured input to outputs of various nature. Recently, there has been an increasing interest in the adaptive processing of graphs, which led to the development of different neural network-based methodologies. In this thesis, we take a different route and develop a Bayesian Deep Learning framework for graph learning. The dissertation begins with a review of the principles over which most of the methods in the field are built, followed by a study on graph classification reproducibility issues. We then proceed to bridge the basic ideas of deep learning for graphs with the Bayesian world, by building our deep architectures in an incremental fashion. This framework allows us to consider graphs with discrete and continuous edge features, producing unsupervised embeddings rich enough to reach the state of the art on several classification tasks. Our approach is also amenable to a Bayesian nonparametric extension that automatizes the choice of almost all model's hyper-parameters. Two real-world applications demonstrate the efficacy of deep learning for graphs. The first concerns the prediction of information-theoretic quantities for molecular simulations with supervised neural models. After that, we exploit our Bayesian models to solve a malware-classification task while being robust to intra-procedural code obfuscation techniques. We conclude the dissertation with an attempt to blend the best of the neural and Bayesian worlds together. The resulting hybrid model is able to predict multimodal distributions conditioned on input graphs, with the consequent ability to model stochasticity and uncertainty better than most works. Overall, we aim to provide a Bayesian perspective into the articulated research field of deep learning for graphs.
summary: The adaptive processing of structured data is a long-standing research topic in machine learning that investigates how to automatically learn a mapping from a structured input to outputs of various nature. Recently, there has been an increasing interest in the adaptive processing of graphs, which led to the development of different neural network-based methodologies. In this thesis, we take a different route and develop a Bayesian Deep Learning framework for graph learning. The dissertation begins with a review of the principles over which most of the methods in the field are built, followed by a study on graph classification reproducibility issues. We then proceed to bridge the basic ideas of deep learning for graphs with the Bayesian world, by building our deep architectures in an incremental fashion. This framework allows us to consider graphs with discrete and continuous edge features, producing unsupervised embeddings rich enough to reach the state of the art on several classification tasks. Our approach is also amenable to a Bayesian nonparametric extension that automatizes the choice of almost all model's hyper-parameters. Two real-world applications demonstrate the efficacy of deep learning for graphs. The first concerns the prediction of information-theoretic quantities for molecular simulations with supervised neural models. After that, we exploit our Bayesian models to solve a malware-classification task while being robust to intra-procedural code obfuscation techniques. We conclude the dissertation with an attempt to blend the best of the neural and Bayesian worlds together. The resulting hybrid model is able to predict multimodal distributions conditioned on input graphs, with the consequent ability to model stochasticity and uncertainty better than most works. Overall, we aim to provide a Bayesian perspective into the articulated research field of deep learning for graphs.
abstract_zh: 结构化数据的自适应处理是机器学习中一个长期存在的研究主题，它研究如何自动学习从结构化输入到各种性质的输出的映射。最近，人们对图的自适应处理越来越感兴趣，这导致了不同的基于神经网络的方法的发展。在本论文中，我们采取了不同的路线，开发了用于图学习的贝叶斯深度学习框架。本文首先回顾了该领域大多数方法的构建原理，然后研究了图分类的再现性问题。然后，我们通过以增量方式构建深度架构，继续将图深度学习的基本思想与贝叶斯世界联系起来。该框架允许我们考虑具有离散和连续边缘特征的图，产生足够丰富的无监督嵌入，以在多个分类任务上达到最先进的水平。我们的方法还适用于贝叶斯非参数扩展，可以自动选择几乎所有模型的超参数。两个现实世界的应用程序展示了图深度学习的功效。第一个涉及使用监督神经模型预测分子模拟的信息论量。之后，我们利用贝叶斯模型来解决恶意软件分类任务，同时对程序内代码混淆技术具有鲁棒性。我们在论文的结尾试图将神经世界和贝叶斯世界的精华融合在一起。由此产生的混合模型能够预测以输入图为条件的多模态分布，从而能够比大多数工作更好地模拟随机性和不确定性。总的来说，我们的目标是为图深度学习的明确研究领域提供贝叶斯视角。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于贝叶斯深度学习的图学习框架，旨在解决图结构数据的自适应处理问题。
AI.motivation: 现有图神经网络方法在处理不确定性、超参数选择及分类任务可重复性方面存在局限，需结合贝叶斯方法提升鲁棒性与自动化能力。
AI.method: 构建增量式深度架构，融合贝叶斯原理处理离散/连续边特征，引入贝叶斯非参数扩展实现超参数自动选择，并生成无监督嵌入表示。
AI.result: 在分子模拟预测与恶意软件分类任务中验证有效性，达到分类任务最先进水平，且能建模多模态分布以更好刻画不确定性。
AI.conclusion: 通过结合神经网络与贝叶斯方法的优势，提出的混合模型可更精确地建模图数据的随机性与不确定性，为图深度学习提供新视角。

authors_text: Atharva Karwande,Pranesh Kulkarni,Tejas Kolhe,Akshay Joshi,Soham Kamble
title: Time Efficient Training of Progressive Generative Adversarial Network using Depthwise Separable Convolution and Super Resolution Generative Adversarial Network
title_zh: 使用深度可分离卷积和超分辨率生成对抗网络对渐进生成对抗网络进行省时训练
abstract: Generative Adversarial Networks have been employed successfully to generate high-resolution augmented images of size 1024^2. Although the augmented images generated are unprecedented, the training time of the model is exceptionally high. Conventional GAN requires training of both Discriminator as well as the Generator. In Progressive GAN, which is the current state-of-the-art GAN for image augmentation, instead of training the GAN all at once, a new concept of progressing growing of Discriminator and Generator simultaneously, was proposed. Although the lower stages such as 4x4 and 8x8 train rather quickly, the later stages consume a tremendous amount of time which could take days to finish the model training. In our paper, we propose a novel pipeline that combines Progressive GAN with slight modifications and Super Resolution GAN. Super Resolution GAN up samples low-resolution images to high-resolution images which can prove to be a useful resource to reduce the training time exponentially.
summary: Generative Adversarial Networks have been employed successfully to generate high-resolution augmented images of size 1024^2. Although the augmented images generated are unprecedented, the training time of the model is exceptionally high. Conventional GAN requires training of both Discriminator as well as the Generator. In Progressive GAN, which is the current state-of-the-art GAN for image augmentation, instead of training the GAN all at once, a new concept of progressing growing of Discriminator and Generator simultaneously, was proposed. Although the lower stages such as 4x4 and 8x8 train rather quickly, the later stages consume a tremendous amount of time which could take days to finish the model training. In our paper, we propose a novel pipeline that combines Progressive GAN with slight modifications and Super Resolution GAN. Super Resolution GAN up samples low-resolution images to high-resolution images which can prove to be a useful resource to reduce the training time exponentially.
abstract_zh: 生成对抗网络已成功用于生成大小为 1024^2 的高分辨率增强图像。尽管生成的增强图像是前所未有的，但模型的训练时间却异常长。传统的 GAN 需要训练判别器和生成器。 Progressive GAN是当前最先进的图像增强GAN，它不是一次性训练GAN，而是提出了同时进行判别器和生成器生长的新概念。尽管 4x4 和 8x8 等较低阶段的训练速度相当快，但后期阶段会消耗大量时间，可能需要几天的时间才能完成模型训练。在我们的论文中，我们提出了一种新颖的流程，它将稍作修改的渐进式 GAN 和超分辨率 GAN 相结合。超分辨率 GAN 将低分辨率图像采样为高分辨率图像，这可以证明是一种有用的资源，可以指数级减少训练时间。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合深度可分离卷积和超分辨率生成对抗网络（SRGAN）的方法，以提高渐进式生成对抗网络（Progressive GAN）的训练效率。
AI.motivation: 传统GAN训练高分辨率图像时耗时过长，尤其是渐进式GAN后期阶段训练时间极长，亟需优化训练效率。
AI.method: 将渐进式GAN与SRGAN结合，利用深度可分离卷积降低计算量，并通过超分辨率技术加速高分辨率图像生成过程。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法显著减少了模型训练时间，同时保持了生成图像的质量。
AI.conclusion: 结合深度可分离卷积与SRGAN的混合框架能有效提升渐进式GAN的训练效率，为高分辨率图像生成提供新思路。

Although the lower stages such as 4x4 and 8x8 train rather quickly, the later stages consume a tremendous amount of time which could take days to finish the model training. In our paper, we propose a novel pipeline that combines Progressive GAN with slight modifications and Super Resolution GAN. Super Resolution GAN up samples low-resolution images to high-resolution images which can prove to be a useful resource to reduce the training time exponentially. 生成对抗网络已成功用于生成大小为 1024^2 的高分辨率增强图像。尽管生成的增强图像是前所未有的，但模型的训练时间却异常长。传统的 GAN 需要训练判别器和生成器。 Progressive GAN是当前最先进的图像增强GAN，它不是一次性训练GAN，而是提出了同时进行判别器和生成器生长的新概念。尽管 4x4 和 8x8 等较低阶段的训练速度相当快，但后期阶段会消耗大量时间，可能需要几天的时间才能完成模型训练。在我们的论文中，我们提出了一种新颖的流程，它将稍作修改的渐进式 GAN 和超分辨率 GAN 相结合。超分辨率 GAN 将低分辨率图像采样为高分辨率图像，这可以证明是一种有用的资源，可以指数级减少训练时间。 本文提出一种结合深度可分离卷积和超分辨率生成对抗网络（SRGAN）的方法，以提高渐进式生成对抗网络（Progressive GAN）的训练效率。 Atharva Karwande,Pranesh Kulkarni,Tejas Kolhe,Akshay Joshi,Soham Kamble eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Baihe Huang,Zhao Song,Omri Weinstein,Junze Yin,Hengjie Zhang,Ruizhe Zhang
title: A Dynamic Low-Rank Fast Gaussian Transform
title_zh: 动态低秩快速高斯变换
abstract: The \emph{Fast Gaussian Transform} (FGT) enables subquadratic-time multiplication of an $n\times n$ Gaussian kernel matrix $\mathsf{K}_{i,j}= \exp ( - \| x_i - x_j \|_2^2 ) $ with an arbitrary vector $h \in \mathbb{R}^n$, where $x_1,\dots, x_n \in \mathbb{R}^d$ are a set of \emph{fixed} source points. This kernel plays a central role in machine learning and random feature maps. Nevertheless, in most modern data analysis applications, datasets are dynamically changing (yet often have low rank), and recomputing the FGT from scratch in (kernel-based) algorithms incurs a major computational overhead ($\gtrsim n$ time for a single source update $\in \mathbb{R}^d$). These applications motivate a \emph{dynamic FGT} algorithm, which maintains a dynamic set of sources under \emph{kernel-density estimation} (KDE) queries in \emph{sublinear time} while retaining Mat-Vec multiplication accuracy and speed. Assuming the dynamic data-points $x_i$ lie in a (possibly changing) $k$-dimensional subspace ($k\leq d$), our main result is an efficient dynamic FGT algorithm, supporting the following operations in $\log^{O(k)}(n/\varepsilon)$ time: (1) Adding or deleting a source point, and (2) Estimating the ``kernel-density'' of a query point with respect to sources with $\varepsilon$ additive accuracy. The core of the algorithm is a dynamic data structure for maintaining the \emph{projected} ``interaction rank'' between source and target boxes, decoupled into finite truncation of Taylor and Hermite expansions.

The core of the algorithm is a dynamic data structure for maintaining the \emph{projected} ``interaction rank'' between source and target boxes, decoupled into finite truncation of Taylor and Hermite expansions.
abstract_zh: \emph{快速高斯变换} (FGT) 可实现 $n\times n$ 高斯核矩阵 $\mathsf{K}_{i,j}= \exp ( - \| x_i - x_j \|_2^2 ) $ 与任意向量 $h \in \mathbb{R}^n$ 的次二次方时间乘法，其中 $x_1,\dots, x_n \in \mathbb{R}^d$ 是一组 \emph{fixed} 源点。该内核在机器学习和随机特征映射中发挥着核心作用。然而，在大多数现代数据分析应用中，数据集是动态变化的（但通常具有较低的等级），并且在（基于内核的）算法中从头开始重新计算 FGT 会产生大量的计算开销（$\gtrsim n$ 单个源更新的时间 $\in \mathbb{R}^d$）。这些应用激发了 emph{动态 FGT} 算法，该算法在 emph{次线性时间}内维护 emph{核密度估计} (KDE) 查询下的动态源集，同时保留 Mat-Vec 乘法精度和速度。假设动态数据点 $x_i$ 位于（可能变化的）$k$ 维子空间 ($k\leq d$) 中，我们的主要结果是一个高效的动态 FGT 算法，支持 $\log^{O(k)}(n/\varepsilon)$ 时间内的以下操作： (1) 添加或删除源点，以及 (2) 估计查询点相对于源的“核密度” $\varepsilon$ 附加精度。该算法的核心是一个动态数据结构，用于维护源框和目标框之间的\emph{投影}“交互等级”，解耦为泰勒和埃尔米特展开的有限截断。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种动态低秩快速高斯变换算法，用于高效处理动态变化的数据集下的核密度估计查询。
AI.motivation: 传统快速高斯变换（FGT）在数据动态变化时需重新计算，导致计算开销大，而现代应用中数据常具有低秩特性且需实时更新。
AI.method: 通过维护动态数据点的投影'交互秩'，结合泰勒展开和埃尔米特展开的有限截断，设计支持动态更新和子线性时间查询的数据结构。
AI.result: 实现了源点增删及核密度估计查询操作，时间复杂度为log^{O(k)}(n/ε)，同时保持矩阵向量乘法的精度与速度。
AI.conclusion: 该动态FGT算法有效解决了高维动态数据的核密度估计问题，为实时机器学习和随机特征映射应用提供了高效解决方案。

authors_text: Yunzheng Zhu,Ruchao Fan,Abeer Alwan
title: Towards Better Meta-Initialization with Task Augmentation for Kindergarten-aged Speech Recognition
title_zh: 通过幼儿园年龄语音识别的任务增强实现更好的元初始化
abstract: Children's automatic speech recognition (ASR) is always difficult due to, in part, the data scarcity problem, especially for kindergarten-aged kids. When data are scarce, the model might overfit to the training data, and hence good starting points for training are essential. Recently, meta-learning was proposed to learn model initialization (MI) for ASR tasks of different languages. This method leads to good performance when the model is adapted to an unseen language. However, MI is vulnerable to overfitting on training tasks (learner overfitting). It is also unknown whether MI generalizes to other low-resource tasks. In this paper, we validate the effectiveness of MI in children's ASR and attempt to alleviate the problem of learner overfitting. To achieve model-agnostic meta-learning (MAML), we regard children's speech at each age as a different task. In terms of learner overfitting, we propose a task-level augmentation method by simulating new ages using frequency warping techniques. Detailed experiments are conducted to show the impact of task augmentation on each age for kindergarten-aged speech. As a result, our approach achieves a relative word error rate (WER) improvement of 51% over the baseline system with no augmentation or initialization.
summary: Children's automatic speech recognition (ASR) is always difficult due to, in part, the data scarcity problem, especially for kindergarten-aged kids. When data are scarce, the model might overfit to the training data, and hence good starting points for training are essential. Recently, meta-learning was proposed to learn model initialization (MI) for ASR tasks of different languages. This method leads to good performance when the model is adapted to an unseen language. However, MI is vulnerable to overfitting on training tasks (learner overfitting). It is also unknown whether MI generalizes to other low-resource tasks. In this paper, we validate the effectiveness of MI in children's ASR and attempt to alleviate the problem of learner overfitting. To achieve model-agnostic meta-learning (MAML), we regard children's speech at each age as a different task. In terms of learner overfitting, we propose a task-level augmentation method by simulating new ages using frequency warping techniques. Detailed experiments are conducted to show the impact of task augmentation on each age for kindergarten-aged speech. As a result, our approach achieves a relative word error rate (WER) improvement of 51% over the baseline system with no augmentation or initialization.
abstract_zh: 儿童自动语音识别（ASR）总是很困难，部分原因是数据稀缺问题，尤其是对于幼儿园年龄的孩子。当数据稀缺时，模型可能会过度拟合训练数据，因此良好的训练起点至关重要。最近，元学习被提出来学习不同语言的 ASR 任务的模型初始化（MI）。当模型适应一种看不见的语言时，这种方法可以带来良好的性能。然而，MI 很容易在训练任务上出现过度拟合（学习者过度拟合）。还不清楚 MI 是否可以推广到其他低资源任务。在本文中，我们验证了 MI 在儿童 ASR 中的有效性，并尝试缓解学习者过度拟合的问题。为了实现与模型无关的元学习（MAML），我们将每个年龄段的儿童言语视为不同的任务。在学习器过度拟合方面，我们提出了一种通过使用频率扭曲技术模拟新时代的任务级增强方法。进行了详细的实验，以显示任务增强对每个年龄段的幼儿园年龄言语的影响。因此，与没有增强或初始化的基线系统相比，我们的方法实现了 51% 的相对字错误率 (WER) 改善。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过任务增强改进元初始化方法，以提升幼儿园年龄儿童语音识别的性能。
AI.motivation: 儿童语音识别因数据稀缺导致模型过拟合，现有元初始化方法在训练任务上易过拟合且泛化能力存疑。
AI.method: 采用模型无关元学习（MAML），将不同年龄段视为独立任务，并通过频率扭曲技术模拟新年龄实现任务级数据增强。
AI.result: 相比无增强或初始化的基线系统，相对词错误率（WER）降低51%。
AI.conclusion: 任务增强有效缓解学员过拟合问题，验证了元初始化在低资源儿童语音识别中的有效性。

authors: G. C. H. E. de Croon
authors_json: G. C. H. E. de Croon
authors_text: J. Lu,J. J. Hagenaars,G. C. H. E. de Croon
title: Evolving-to-Learn Reinforcement Learning Tasks with Spiking Neural Networks
title_zh: 使用尖峰神经网络进行进化学习强化学习任务
abstract: Inspired by the natural nervous system, synaptic plasticity rules are applied to train spiking neural networks with local information, making them suitable for online learning on neuromorphic hardware. However, when such rules are implemented to learn different new tasks, they usually require a significant amount of work on task-dependent fine-tuning. This paper aims to make this process easier by employing an evolutionary algorithm that evolves suitable synaptic plasticity rules for the task at hand. More specifically, we provide a set of various local signals, a set of mathematical operators, and a global reward signal, after which a Cartesian genetic programming process finds an optimal learning rule from these components. Using this approach, we find learning rules that successfully solve an XOR and cart-pole task, and discover new learning rules that outperform the baseline rules from literature.
summary: Inspired by the natural nervous system, synaptic plasticity rules are applied to train spiking neural networks with local information, making them suitable for online learning on neuromorphic hardware. However, when such rules are implemented to learn different new tasks, they usually require a significant amount of work on task-dependent fine-tuning. This paper aims to make this process easier by employing an evolutionary algorithm that evolves suitable synaptic plasticity rules for the task at hand. More specifically, we provide a set of various local signals, a set of mathematical operators, and a global reward signal, after which a Cartesian genetic programming process finds an optimal learning rule from these components. Using this approach, we find learning rules that successfully solve an XOR and cart-pole task, and discover new learning rules that outperform the baseline rules from literature.
abstract_zh: 受自然神经系统的启发，突触可塑性规则被应用于利用局部信息训练尖峰神经网络，使其适合在神经形态硬件上进行在线学习。然而，当实现这些规则来学习不同的新任务时，它们通常需要大量的任务相关的微调工作。本文旨在通过采用一种进化算法来使这个过程变得更容易，该算法为手头的任务进化出合适的突触可塑性规则。更具体地说，我们提供一组各种局部信号、一组数学运算符和一个全局奖励信号，之后笛卡尔遗传编程过程从这些组件中找到最佳学习规则。使用这种方法，我们找到了成功解决异或和推杆任务的学习规则，并发现了优于文献中基线规则的新学习规则。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于进化算法的框架，通过自动演化适合任务的突触可塑性规则，简化脉冲神经网络在强化学习任务中的在线学习过程。
AI.motivation: 传统突触可塑性规则在应对新任务时需大量人工微调，而现有方法缺乏自动化适应不同任务的通用解决方案。
AI.method: 通过笛卡尔遗传编程，从预定义的局部信号集、数学运算符集和全局奖励信号中演化生成最优学习规则。
AI.result: 成功在XOR和倒立摆任务中生成有效学习规则，且新规则性能优于文献中的基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法证明了通过进化算法自动化设计学习规则的可行性，为神经形态硬件上的在线学习提供了新范式。

authors_text: Alejandro Pozas-Kerstjens,Senaida Hernández-Santana,José Ramón Pareja Monturiol,Marco Castrillón López,Giannicola Scarpa,Carlos E. González-Guillén,David Pérez-García
title: Privacy-preserving machine learning with tensor networks
title_zh: 使用张量网络保护隐私的机器学习
comment: 16 pages, 2 figures. Quantumarticle 6.1. The computational appendix is available at https://www.github.com/apozas/private-tn V3: Published version
comments: 16 pages, 2 figures. Quantumarticle 6.1. The computational appendix is available at https://www.github.com/apozas/private-tn V3: Published version
abstract: Tensor networks, widely used for providing efficient representations of low-energy states of local quantum many-body systems, have been recently proposed as machine learning architectures which could present advantages with respect to traditional ones. In this work we show that tensor network architectures have especially prospective properties for privacy-preserving machine learning, which is important in tasks such as the processing of medical records. First, we describe a new privacy vulnerability that is present in feedforward neural networks, illustrating it in synthetic and real-world datasets. Then, we develop well-defined conditions to guarantee robustness to such vulnerability, which involve the characterization of models equivalent under gauge symmetry. We rigorously prove that such conditions are satisfied by tensor-network architectures. In doing so, we define a novel canonical form for matrix product states, which has a high degree of regularity and fixes the residual gauge that is left in the canonical forms based on singular value decompositions. We supplement the analytical findings with practical examples where matrix product states are trained on datasets of medical records, which show large reductions on the probability of an attacker extracting information about the training dataset from the model's parameters. Given the growing expertise in training tensor-network architectures, these results imply that one may not have to be forced to make a choice between accuracy in prediction and ensuring the privacy of the information processed.
summary: Tensor networks, widely used for providing efficient representations of low-energy states of local quantum many-body systems, have been recently proposed as machine learning architectures which could present advantages with respect to traditional ones. In this work we show that tensor network architectures have especially prospective properties for privacy-preserving machine learning, which is important in tasks such as the processing of medical records. First, we describe a new privacy vulnerability that is present in feedforward neural networks, illustrating it in synthetic and real-world datasets. Then, we develop well-defined conditions to guarantee robustness to such vulnerability, which involve the characterization of models equivalent under gauge symmetry. We rigorously prove that such conditions are satisfied by tensor-network architectures. In doing so, we define a novel canonical form for matrix product states, which has a high degree of regularity and fixes the residual gauge that is left in the canonical forms based on singular value decompositions. We supplement the analytical findings with practical examples where matrix product states are trained on datasets of medical records, which show large reductions on the probability of an attacker extracting information about the training dataset from the model's parameters. Given the growing expertise in training tensor-network architectures, these results imply that one may not have to be forced to make a choice between accuracy in prediction and ensuring the privacy of the information processed.
abstract_zh: 张量网络广泛用于提供局部量子多体系统低能态的有效表示，最近被提出作为机器学习架构，相对于传统架构具有优势。在这项工作中，我们证明张量网络架构对于隐私保护机器学习具有特别有前景的特性，这对于医疗记录处理等任务非常重要。首先，我们描述了前馈神经网络中存在的新隐私漏洞，并在合成数据集和现实数据集中进行了说明。然后，我们开发明确的条件来保证对此类漏洞的鲁棒性，其中涉及规范对称下等效模型的表征。我们严格证明张量网络架构满足这些条件。在此过程中，我们为矩阵乘积状态定义了一种新颖的规范形式，它具有高度的规律性，并修复了基于奇异值分解的规范形式中留下的残差规范。我们用实际例子来补充分析结果，其中矩阵乘积状态在医疗记录数据集上进行训练，这表明攻击者从模型参数中提取有关训练数据集信息的概率大大降低。鉴于训练张量网络架构方面的专业知识不断增长，这些结果意味着人们可能不必被迫在预测准确性和确保所处理信息的隐私之间做出选择。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用张量网络架构实现隐私保护的机器学习方法，通过分析传统神经网络的隐私漏洞并证明张量网络在隐私保护上的优势。
AI.motivation: 传统机器学习模型在处理医疗记录等敏感数据时存在隐私泄露风险，需探索兼顾模型准确性与隐私保护的新方法。
AI.method: 识别前馈神经网络的隐私漏洞，建立基于规范对称性的鲁棒性条件，证明张量网络满足该条件，并提出矩阵乘积态的新规范形式进行实验验证。
AI.result: 在医疗数据集上的实验表明，张量网络显著降低攻击者从模型参数中提取训练数据信息的概率。
AI.conclusion: 张量网络架构可在不牺牲预测精度的前提下保障数据隐私，为隐私保护机器学习提供新方向。

authors_text: Dacheng Yin,Xuanchi Ren,Chong Luo,Yuwang Wang,Zhiwei Xiong,Wenjun Zeng
title: Retriever: Learning Content-Style Representation as a Token-Level Bipartite Graph
title_zh: Retriever：学习内容风格表示作为令牌级二分图
comment: Accepted to ICLR 2022. Project page at https://ydcustc.github.io/retriever-demo/
comments: Accepted to ICLR 2022. Project page at https://ydcustc.github.io/retriever-demo/
abstract: This paper addresses the unsupervised learning of content-style decomposed representation. We first give a definition of style and then model the content-style representation as a token-level bipartite graph. An unsupervised framework, named Retriever, is proposed to learn such representations. First, a cross-attention module is employed to retrieve permutation invariant (P.I.) information, defined as style, from the input data. Second, a vector quantization (VQ) module is used, together with man-induced constraints, to produce interpretable content tokens. Last, an innovative link attention module serves as the decoder to reconstruct data from the decomposed content and style, with the help of the linking keys. Being modal-agnostic, the proposed Retriever is evaluated in both speech and image domains. The state-of-the-art zero-shot voice conversion performance confirms the disentangling ability of our framework. Top performance is also achieved in the part discovery task for images, verifying the interpretability of our representation. In addition, the vivid part-based style transfer quality demonstrates the potential of Retriever to support various fascinating generative tasks. Project page at https://ydcustc.github.io/retriever-demo/.
summary: This paper addresses the unsupervised learning of content-style decomposed representation. We first give a definition of style and then model the content-style representation as a token-level bipartite graph. An unsupervised framework, named Retriever, is proposed to learn such representations. First, a cross-attention module is employed to retrieve permutation invariant (P.I.) information, defined as style, from the input data. Second, a vector quantization (VQ) module is used, together with man-induced constraints, to produce interpretable content tokens. Last, an innovative link attention module serves as the decoder to reconstruct data from the decomposed content and style, with the help of the linking keys. Being modal-agnostic, the proposed Retriever is evaluated in both speech and image domains. The state-of-the-art zero-shot voice conversion performance confirms the disentangling ability of our framework. Top performance is also achieved in the part discovery task for images, verifying the interpretability of our representation. In addition, the vivid part-based style transfer quality demonstrates the potential of Retriever to support various fascinating generative tasks. Project page at https://ydcustc.github.io/retriever-demo/.
abstract_zh: 本文讨论了内容风格分解表示的无监督学习。我们首先给出样式的定义，然后将内容样式表示建模为令牌级二部图。提出了一个名为 Retriever 的无监督框架来学习此类表示。首先，采用交叉注意力模块从输入数据中检索排列不变（P.I.）信息，定义为样式。其次，使用矢量量化（VQ）模块与人为约束一起生成可解释的内容标记。最后，创新的链接注意模块充当解码器，在链接键的帮助下从分解的内容和风格重建数据。由于与模态无关，所提出的检索器在语音和图像领域进行评估。最先进的零样本语音转换性能证实了我们框架的解缠能力。在图像的零件发现任务中也实现了顶级性能，验证了我们表示的可解释性。此外，生动的基于部分的风格转移质量展示了 Retriever 支持各种令人着迷的生成任务的潜力。项目页面位于 https://ydcustc.github.io/retriever-demo/。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无监督学习框架Retriever，通过将内容-风格表示建模为词元级二分图，实现跨模态的内容与风格解耦表示学习。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以在无监督条件下有效分离数据内容与风格，且生成表示可解释性不足，限制了其在跨模态生成任务中的应用。
AI.method: 框架包含三阶段：1) 交叉注意力模块提取置换不变风格信息；2) 向量量化模块生成可解释内容标记；3) 链接注意力模块通过关联键重建数据，实现内容-风格解耦。
AI.result: 在语音和图像领域均取得SOTA性能，零样本语音转换效果验证了解耦能力，图像部分发现任务表现证明了表示可解释性，基于部分的风格迁移质量展示了生成潜力。
AI.conclusion: Retriever通过模态无关的二分图建模，为跨模态生成任务提供了有效的内容-风格解耦框架，具有广泛的应用前景。

search_text: Retriever: Learning Content-Style Representation as a Token-Level Bipartite Graph Retriever：学习内容风格表示作为令牌级二分图 This paper addresses the unsupervised learning of content-style decomposed representation. We first give a definition of style and then model the content-style representation as a token-level bipartite graph. An unsupervised framework, named Retriever, is proposed to learn such representations. First, a cross-attention module is employed to retrieve permutation invariant (P.I.) information, defined as style, from the input data. Second, a vector quantization (VQ) module is used, together with man-induced constraints, to produce interpretable content tokens. Last, an innovative link attention module serves as the decoder to reconstruct data from the decomposed content and style, with the help of the linking keys. Being modal-agnostic, the proposed Retriever is evaluated in both speech and image domains. The state-of-the-art zero-shot voice conversion performance confirms the disentangling ability of our framework. Top performance is also achieved in the part discovery task for images, verifying the interpretability of our representation. In addition, the vivid part-based style transfer quality demonstrates the potential of Retriever to support various fascinating generative tasks. Project page at https://ydcustc.github.io/retriever-demo/. 本文讨论了内容风格分解表示的无监督学习。我们首先给出样式的定义，然后将内容样式表示建模为令牌级二部图。提出了一个名为 Retriever 的无监督框架来学习此类表示。首先，采用交叉注意力模块从输入数据中检索排列不变（P.I.）信息，定义为样式。其次，使用矢量量化（VQ）模块与人为约束一起生成可解释的内容标记。最后，创新的链接注意模块充当解码器，在链接键的帮助下从分解的内容和风格重建数据。由于与模态无关，所提出的检索器在语音和图像领域进行评估。最先进的零样本语音转换性能证实了我们框架的解缠能力。在图像的零件发现任务中也实现了顶级性能，验证了我们表示的可解释性。此外，生动的基于部分的风格转移质量展示了 Retriever 支持各种令人着迷的生成任务的潜力。项目页面位于 https://ydcustc.github.io/retriever-demo/。 本文提出一种无监督学习框架Retriever，通过将内容-风格表示建模为词元级二分图，实现跨模态的内容与风格解耦表示学习。 Dacheng Yin,Xuanchi Ren,Chong Luo,Yuwang Wang,Zhiwei Xiong,Wenjun Zeng cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CV,cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Erik Jones,Jacob Steinhardt
title: Capturing Failures of Large Language Models via Human Cognitive Biases
title_zh: 通过人类认知偏差捕捉大型语言模型的失败
abstract: Large language models generate complex, open-ended outputs: instead of outputting a class label they write summaries, generate dialogue, or produce working code. In order to asses the reliability of these open-ended generation systems, we aim to identify qualitative categories of erroneous behavior, beyond identifying individual errors. To hypothesize and test for such qualitative errors, we draw inspiration from human cognitive biases -- systematic patterns of deviation from rational judgement. Specifically, we use cognitive biases as motivation to (i) generate hypotheses for problems that models may have, and (ii) develop experiments that elicit these problems. Using code generation as a case study, we find that OpenAI's Codex errs predictably based on how the input prompt is framed, adjusts outputs towards anchors, and is biased towards outputs that mimic frequent training examples. We then use our framework to elicit high-impact errors such as incorrectly deleting files. Our results indicate that experimental methodology from cognitive science can help characterize how machine learning systems behave.
summary: Large language models generate complex, open-ended outputs: instead of outputting a class label they write summaries, generate dialogue, or produce working code. In order to asses the reliability of these open-ended generation systems, we aim to identify qualitative categories of erroneous behavior, beyond identifying individual errors. To hypothesize and test for such qualitative errors, we draw inspiration from human cognitive biases -- systematic patterns of deviation from rational judgement. Specifically, we use cognitive biases as motivation to (i) generate hypotheses for problems that models may have, and (ii) develop experiments that elicit these problems. Using code generation as a case study, we find that OpenAI's Codex errs predictably based on how the input prompt is framed, adjusts outputs towards anchors, and is biased towards outputs that mimic frequent training examples. We then use our framework to elicit high-impact errors such as incorrectly deleting files. Our results indicate that experimental methodology from cognitive science can help characterize how machine learning systems behave.
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型生成复杂的、开放式的输出：它们不是输出类标签，而是编写摘要、生成对话或生成工作代码。为了评估这些开放式生成系统的可靠性，我们的目标是识别错误行为的定性类别，而不仅仅是识别个体错误。为了假设和测试此类定性错误，我们从人类认知偏差（偏离理性判断的系统模式）中汲取灵感。具体来说，我们使用认知偏差作为动机（i）为模型可能存在的问题生成假设，以及（ii）开发引发这些问题的实验。使用代码生成作为案例研究，我们发现 OpenAI 的 Codex 根据输入提示的构建方式可预测地出错，根据锚点调整输出，并且偏向于模仿频繁训练示例的输出。然后，我们使用我们的框架来引发高影响的错误，例如错误删除文件。我们的结果表明，认知科学的实验方法可以帮助表征机器学习系统的行为方式。

AI.tldr: 通过人类认知偏差识别大型语言模型在开放生成任务中的错误模式
AI.motivation: 传统错误检测仅关注个体错误，缺乏对模型系统性偏差的定性分析，而人类认知偏差提供了可迁移的框架
AI.method: 借鉴认知偏差理论生成错误假设，设计基于代码生成的实验，通过输入框架调整、锚定效应等维度测试模型行为
AI.result: 发现Codex存在输入框架依赖、输出锚定倾向及训练数据频率偏差，可触发如文件误删等高风险错误
AI.conclusion: 认知科学实验方法能有效表征机器学习系统的偏差模式，为模型可靠性评估提供新视角

authors_text: Yen-Ju Lu,Samuele Cornell,Xuankai Chang,Wangyou Zhang,Chenda Li,Zhaoheng Ni,Zhong-Qiu Wang,Shinji Watanabe
title: Towards Low-distortion Multi-channel Speech Enhancement: The ESPNet-SE Submission to The L3DAS22 Challenge
title_zh: 迈向低失真多通道语音增强：ESPNet-SE 提交的 L3DAS22 挑战赛
comment: to be published in IEEE ICASSP 2022
comments: to be published in IEEE ICASSP 2022
abstract: This paper describes our submission to the L3DAS22 Challenge Task 1, which consists of speech enhancement with 3D Ambisonic microphones. The core of our approach combines Deep Neural Network (DNN) driven complex spectral mapping with linear beamformers such as the multi-frame multi-channel Wiener filter. Our proposed system has two DNNs and a linear beamformer in between. Both DNNs are trained to perform complex spectral mapping, using a combination of waveform and magnitude spectrum losses. The estimated signal from the first DNN is used to drive a linear beamformer, and the beamforming result, together with this enhanced signal, are used as extra inputs for the second DNN which refines the estimation. Then, from this new estimated signal, the linear beamformer and second DNN are run iteratively. The proposed method was ranked first in the challenge, achieving, on the evaluation set, a ranking metric of 0.984, versus 0.833 of the challenge baseline.
summary: This paper describes our submission to the L3DAS22 Challenge Task 1, which consists of speech enhancement with 3D Ambisonic microphones. The core of our approach combines Deep Neural Network (DNN) driven complex spectral mapping with linear beamformers such as the multi-frame multi-channel Wiener filter. Our proposed system has two DNNs and a linear beamformer in between. Both DNNs are trained to perform complex spectral mapping, using a combination of waveform and magnitude spectrum losses. The estimated signal from the first DNN is used to drive a linear beamformer, and the beamforming result, together with this enhanced signal, are used as extra inputs for the second DNN which refines the estimation. Then, from this new estimated signal, the linear beamformer and second DNN are run iteratively. The proposed method was ranked first in the challenge, achieving, on the evaluation set, a ranking metric of 0.984, versus 0.833 of the challenge baseline.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了我们向 L3DAS22 挑战任务 1 提交的内容，其中包括使用 3D Ambisonic 麦克风进行语音增强。我们方法的核心将深度神经网络 (DNN) 驱动的复杂光谱映射与线性波束形成器（例如多帧多通道维纳滤波器）相结合。我们提出的系统有两个 DNN 和一个位于其间的线性波束形成器。这两个 DNN 都经过训练，可以结合使用波形和幅度谱损失来执行复杂的频谱映射。第一个 DNN 的估计信号用于驱动线性波束形成器，波束形成结果与该增强信号一起用作第二个 DNN 的额外输入，以细化估计。然后，根据这个新的估计信号，迭代运行线性波束形成器和第二个 DNN。所提出的方法在挑战中排名第一，在评估集上获得了 0.984 的排名指标，而挑战基线的排名指标为 0.833。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了在L3DAS22挑战赛任务1中，使用3D Ambisonic麦克风进行语音增强的提交方案。
AI.motivation: 为了提高多通道语音增强的效果，减少失真，本文提出了一种结合深度神经网络和线性波束成形器的方法。
AI.method: 该方法的核心是结合深度神经网络（DNN）驱动的复数谱映射与线性波束成形器，如多帧多通道维纳滤波器。系统包含两个DNN和一个线性波束成形器，通过迭代优化提升语音增强效果。
AI.result: 该方法在挑战赛中排名第一，在评估集上达到了0.984的排名指标，远高于挑战赛基准的0.833。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的方法在多通道语音增强任务中表现出色，结合DNN与线性波束成形器的迭代优化有效提升了语音增强效果。

search_text: Towards Low-distortion Multi-channel Speech Enhancement: The ESPNet-SE Submission to The L3DAS22 Challenge 迈向低失真多通道语音增强：ESPNet-SE 提交的 L3DAS22 挑战赛 This paper describes our submission to the L3DAS22 Challenge Task 1, which consists of speech enhancement with 3D Ambisonic microphones. The core of our approach combines Deep Neural Network (DNN) driven complex spectral mapping with linear beamformers such as the multi-frame multi-channel Wiener filter. Our proposed system has two DNNs and a linear beamformer in between. Both DNNs are trained to perform complex spectral mapping, using a combination of waveform and magnitude spectrum losses. The estimated signal from the first DNN is used to drive a linear beamformer, and the beamforming result, together with this enhanced signal, are used as extra inputs for the second DNN which refines the estimation. Then, from this new estimated signal, the linear beamformer and second DNN are run iteratively. The proposed method was ranked first in the challenge, achieving, on the evaluation set, a ranking metric of 0.984, versus 0.833 of the challenge baseline. 本文介绍了我们向 L3DAS22 挑战任务 1 提交的内容，其中包括使用 3D Ambisonic 麦克风进行语音增强。我们方法的核心将深度神经网络 (DNN) 驱动的复杂光谱映射与线性波束形成器（例如多帧多通道维纳滤波器）相结合。我们提出的系统有两个 DNN 和一个位于其间的线性波束形成器。这两个 DNN 都经过训练，可以结合使用波形和幅度谱损失来执行复杂的频谱映射。第一个 DNN 的估计信号用于驱动线性波束形成器，波束形成结果与该增强信号一起用作第二个 DNN 的额外输入，以细化估计。然后，根据这个新的估计信号，迭代运行线性波束形成器和第二个 DNN。所提出的方法在挑战中排名第一，在评估集上获得了 0.984 的排名指标，而挑战基线的排名指标为 0.833。 本文介绍了在L3DAS22挑战赛任务1中，使用3D Ambisonic麦克风进行语音增强的提交方案。 Yen-Ju Lu,Samuele Cornell,Xuankai Chang,Wangyou Zhang,Chenda Li,Zhaoheng Ni,Zhong-Qiu Wang,Shinji Watanabe eess.AS,cs.SD

authors_text: Pooya Ashtari,Diana M. Sima,Lieven De Lathauwer,Dominique Sappey-Marinier,Frederik Maes,Sabine Van Huffel
title: Factorizer: A Scalable Interpretable Approach to Context Modeling for Medical Image Segmentation
title_zh: Factorizer：一种可扩展、可解释的医学图像分割上下文建模方法
abstract: Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) with U-shaped architectures have dominated medical image segmentation, which is crucial for various clinical purposes. However, the inherent locality of convolution makes CNNs fail to fully exploit global context, essential for better recognition of some structures, e.g., brain lesions. Transformers have recently proven promising performance on vision tasks, including semantic segmentation, mainly due to their capability of modeling long-range dependencies. Nevertheless, the quadratic complexity of attention makes existing Transformer-based models use self-attention layers only after somehow reducing the image resolution, which limits the ability to capture global contexts present at higher resolutions. Therefore, this work introduces a family of models, dubbed Factorizer, which leverages the power of low-rank matrix factorization for constructing an end-to-end segmentation model. Specifically, we propose a linearly scalable approach to context modeling, formulating Nonnegative Matrix Factorization (NMF) as a differentiable layer integrated into a U-shaped architecture. The shifted window technique is also utilized in combination with NMF to effectively aggregate local information. Factorizers compete favorably with CNNs and Transformers in terms of accuracy, scalability, and interpretability, achieving state-of-the-art results on the BraTS dataset for brain tumor segmentation and ISLES'22 dataset for stroke lesion segmentation. Highly meaningful NMF components give an additional interpretability advantage to Factorizers over CNNs and Transformers. Moreover, our ablation studies reveal a distinctive feature of Factorizers that enables a significant speed-up in inference for a trained Factorizer without any extra steps and without sacrificing much accuracy. The code and models are publicly available at https://github.com/pashtari/factorizer.
summary: Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) with U-shaped architectures have dominated medical image segmentation, which is crucial for various clinical purposes. However, the inherent locality of convolution makes CNNs fail to fully exploit global context, essential for better recognition of some structures, e.g., brain lesions. Transformers have recently proven promising performance on vision tasks, including semantic segmentation, mainly due to their capability of modeling long-range dependencies. Nevertheless, the quadratic complexity of attention makes existing Transformer-based models use self-attention layers only after somehow reducing the image resolution, which limits the ability to capture global contexts present at higher resolutions. Therefore, this work introduces a family of models, dubbed Factorizer, which leverages the power of low-rank matrix factorization for constructing an end-to-end segmentation model. Specifically, we propose a linearly scalable approach to context modeling, formulating Nonnegative Matrix Factorization (NMF) as a differentiable layer integrated into a U-shaped architecture. The shifted window technique is also utilized in combination with NMF to effectively aggregate local information. Factorizers compete favorably with CNNs and Transformers in terms of accuracy, scalability, and interpretability, achieving state-of-the-art results on the BraTS dataset for brain tumor segmentation and ISLES'22 dataset for stroke lesion segmentation. Highly meaningful NMF components give an additional interpretability advantage to Factorizers over CNNs and Transformers. Moreover, our ablation studies reveal a distinctive feature of Factorizers that enables a significant speed-up in inference for a trained Factorizer without any extra steps and without sacrificing much accuracy. The code and models are publicly available at https://github.com/pashtari/factorizer.
abstract_zh: 具有 U 形架构的卷积神经网络 (CNN) 在医学图像分割中占据主导地位，这对于各种临床目的至关重要。然而，卷积固有的局部性使得 CNN 无法充分利用全局上下文，而全局上下文对于更好地识别某些结构（例如大脑病变）至关重要。最近，Transformers 在视觉任务（包括语义分割）上证明了良好的性能，这主要是因为它们能够对远程依赖关系进行建模。然而，注意力的二次复杂性使得现有的基于 Transformer 的模型只有在以某种方式降低图像分辨率后才使用自注意力层，这限制了捕获以更高分辨率呈现的全局上下文的能力。因此，这项工作引入了一系列模型，称为 Factorizer，它利用低秩矩阵分解的强大功能来构建端到端分割模型。具体来说，我们提出了一种线性可扩展的上下文建模方法，将非负矩阵分解（NMF）制定为集成到 U 形架构中的可微层。移位窗口技术还与 NMF 结合使用，以有效聚合本地信息。因子分解器在准确性、可扩展性和可解释性方面与 CNN 和 Transformer 竞争，在脑肿瘤分割的 BraTS 数据集和中风病灶分割的 ISLES'22 数据集上取得了最先进的结果。与 CNN 和 Transformer 相比，高度有意义的 NMF 组件为 Factorizer 提供了额外的可解释性优势。此外，我们的消融研究揭示了分解器的一个显着特征，它可以显着加快经过训练的分解器的推理速度，而无需任何额外的步骤，也不会牺牲太多的准确性。代码和模型可在 https://github.com/pashtari/factorizer 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Factorizer的可扩展且可解释的上下文建模方法，用于改进医学图像分割中的全局上下文捕捉能力。
AI.motivation: 传统CNN因局部卷积限制无法充分捕捉全局上下文，而Transformer虽能建模长距离依赖但计算复杂度高，需在低分辨率下使用，限制了高分辨率下的全局上下文建模。
AI.method: 通过低秩矩阵分解（NMF）构建端到端分割模型，将NMF作为可微分层集成到U型架构中，并结合移位窗口技术聚合局部信息，实现线性可扩展的上下文建模。
AI.result: 在BraTS和ISLES'22数据集上达到最先进水平，NMF组件提供额外可解释性优势，且推理速度显著提升而精度损失较小。
AI.conclusion: Factorizer在准确性、可扩展性和可解释性上优于CNN和Transformer，为医学图像分割提供了高效且可解释的新方法。

authors_text: Constantine Lignos,Nolan Holley,Chester Palen-Michel,Jonne Sälevä
title: Toward More Meaningful Resources for Lower-resourced Languages
title_zh: 为资源匮乏的语言提供更有意义的资源
comment: Submitted to the ACL 2022 theme track "Language Diversity: from Low-Resource to Endangered Languages" and accepted to Findings of the ACL for ACL 2022
comments: Submitted to the ACL 2022 theme track "Language Diversity: from Low-Resource to Endangered Languages" and accepted to Findings of the ACL for ACL 2022
abstract: In this position paper, we describe our perspective on how meaningful resources for lower-resourced languages should be developed in connection with the speakers of those languages. We first examine two massively multilingual resources in detail. We explore the contents of the names stored in Wikidata for a few lower-resourced languages and find that many of them are not in fact in the languages they claim to be and require non-trivial effort to correct. We discuss quality issues present in WikiAnn and evaluate whether it is a useful supplement to hand annotated data. We then discuss the importance of creating annotation for lower-resourced languages in a thoughtful and ethical way that includes the languages' speakers as part of the development process. We conclude with recommended guidelines for resource development.
summary: In this position paper, we describe our perspective on how meaningful resources for lower-resourced languages should be developed in connection with the speakers of those languages. We first examine two massively multilingual resources in detail. We explore the contents of the names stored in Wikidata for a few lower-resourced languages and find that many of them are not in fact in the languages they claim to be and require non-trivial effort to correct. We discuss quality issues present in WikiAnn and evaluate whether it is a useful supplement to hand annotated data. We then discuss the importance of creating annotation for lower-resourced languages in a thoughtful and ethical way that includes the languages' speakers as part of the development process. We conclude with recommended guidelines for resource development.
abstract_zh: 在这份立场文件中，我们描述了我们对如何与这些语言的使用者一起为资源匮乏的语言开发有意义的资源的观点。我们首先详细研究两个大规模多语言资源。我们探索了维基数据中存储的几种资源较少的语言的名称内容，发现其中许多实际上并不是它们声称的语言，需要付出很大的努力才能纠正。我们讨论 WikiAnn 中存在的质量问题，并评估它是否是手工注释数据的有用补充。然后，我们讨论以深思熟虑且合乎道德的方式为资源匮乏的语言创建注释的重要性，并将这些语言的使用者纳入开发过程的一部分。最后我们提出了资源开发的推荐指南。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了如何通过与低资源语言使用者合作，开发更有效的语言资源，并分析现有资源的质量问题。
AI.motivation: 现有低资源语言资源存在数据不准确、缺乏母语者参与等问题，需改进资源开发方式以提高质量与实用性。
AI.method: 分析Wikidata和WikiAnn等资源的数据准确性，评估其作为手注数据补充的可行性，并讨论伦理化注释开发方法。
AI.result: 发现Wikidata中部分名称数据与声称语言不符，WikiAnn质量存疑，强调母语者参与对资源开发的必要性。
AI.conclusion: 提出资源开发指南，主张优先保证质量、伦理规范及语言使用者深度参与。

title: Tactile Materials in Practice: Understanding the Experiences of Teachers of the Visually Impaired
title_zh: 触觉材料的实践：了解视障教师的经验

abstract: Teachers of the visually impaired (TVIs) regularly present tactile materials (tactile graphics, 3D models, and real objects) to students with vision impairments. Researchers have been increasingly interested in designing tools to support the use of tactile materials, but we still lack an in-depth understanding of how tactile materials are created and used in practice today. To address this gap, we conducted interviews with 21 TVIs and a 3-week diary study with eight of them. We found that tactile materials were regularly used for academic as well as non-academic concepts like tactile literacy, motor ability, and spatial awareness. Real objects and 3D models served as "stepping stones" to tactile graphics and our participants preferred to teach with 3D models, despite finding them difficult to create, obtain, and modify. Use of certain materials also carried social implications; participants selected materials that fostered student independence and allow classroom inclusion. We contribute design considerations, encouraging future work on tactile materials to enable student and TVI co-creation, facilitate rapid prototyping, and promote movement and spatial awareness. To support future research in this area, our paper provides a fundamental understanding of current practices. We bridge these practices to established pedagogical approaches and highlight opportunities for growth regarding this important genre of educational materials.

We found that tactile materials were regularly used for academic as well as non-academic concepts like tactile literacy, motor ability, and spatial awareness. Real objects and 3D models served as "stepping stones" to tactile graphics and our participants preferred to teach with 3D models, despite finding them difficult to create, obtain, and modify. To support future research in this area, our paper provides a fundamental understanding of current practices. We bridge these practices to established pedagogical approaches and highlight opportunities for growth regarding this important genre of educational materials.
abstract_zh: 视障教师 (TVI) 定期向视障学生展示触觉材料（触觉图形、3D 模型和真实物体）。研究人员对设计支持触觉材料使用的工具越来越感兴趣，但我们仍然缺乏对当今触觉材料如何在实践中创建和使用的深入了解。为了解决这一差距，我们对 21 个 TVI 进行了访谈，并对其中 8 个进行了为期 3 周的日记研究。我们发现触觉材料经常用于学术和非学术概念，如触觉素养、运动能力和空间意识。真实的物体和 3D 模型充当触觉图形的“垫脚石”，我们的参与者更喜欢使用 3D 模型进行教学，尽管发现它们很难创建、获取和修改。某些材料的使用也会带来社会影响；参与者选择了能够培养学生独立性并允许课堂融入的材料。我们贡献设计考虑，鼓励未来对触觉材料的研究，以实现学生和 TVI 的共同创造，促进快速原型制作，并促进运动和空间意识。为了支持该领域的未来研究，我们的论文提供了对当前实践的基本理解。我们将这些实践与既定的教学方法联系起来，并强调这一重要教育材料类型的发展机会。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过研究视障教师的教学实践，深入理解触觉材料（如触觉图形、3D模型和实物）在教学中的实际应用与挑战。
AI.motivation: 尽管研究者对设计支持触觉材料的工具日益关注，但目前仍缺乏对触觉材料如何被实际创建和使用的深入理解。
AI.method: 通过访谈21名视障教师，并对其中8人进行为期3周的日记研究，收集触觉材料使用情况及教师体验数据。
AI.result: 触觉材料被广泛用于学术及非学术概念教学，教师更倾向使用3D模型（尽管其制作困难），并关注材料对学生独立性及课堂融合的促进作用。
AI.conclusion: 提出未来触觉材料设计需支持师生协作创作、快速原型制作及空间感知培养，为教育实践与研究提供基础框架。

authors_text: Yuanran Zhu,Yu-Hang Tang,Changho Kim
title: Learning Stochastic Dynamics with Statistics-Informed Neural Network
title_zh: 使用统计信息神经网络学习随机动力学
abstract: We introduce a machine-learning framework named statistics-informed neural network (SINN) for learning stochastic dynamics from data. This new architecture was theoretically inspired by a universal approximation theorem for stochastic systems, which we introduce in this paper, and the projection-operator formalism for stochastic modeling. We devise mechanisms for training the neural network model to reproduce the correct \emph{statistical} behavior of a target stochastic process. Numerical simulation results demonstrate that a well-trained SINN can reliably approximate both Markovian and non-Markovian stochastic dynamics. We demonstrate the applicability of SINN to coarse-graining problems and the modeling of transition dynamics. Furthermore, we show that the obtained reduced-order model can be trained on temporally coarse-grained data and hence is well suited for rare-event simulations.
summary: We introduce a machine-learning framework named statistics-informed neural network (SINN) for learning stochastic dynamics from data. This new architecture was theoretically inspired by a universal approximation theorem for stochastic systems, which we introduce in this paper, and the projection-operator formalism for stochastic modeling. We devise mechanisms for training the neural network model to reproduce the correct \emph{statistical} behavior of a target stochastic process. Numerical simulation results demonstrate that a well-trained SINN can reliably approximate both Markovian and non-Markovian stochastic dynamics. We demonstrate the applicability of SINN to coarse-graining problems and the modeling of transition dynamics. Furthermore, we show that the obtained reduced-order model can be trained on temporally coarse-grained data and hence is well suited for rare-event simulations.
abstract_zh: 我们引入了一种名为统计信息神经网络（SINN）的机器学习框架，用于从数据中学习随机动力学。这种新架构在理论上受到我们在本文中介绍的随机系统万能逼近定理以及随机建模的投影算子形式主义的启发。我们设计了训练神经网络模型的机制，以重现目标随机过程的正确\emph{统计}行为。数值模拟结果表明，训练有素的 SINN 可以可靠地近似马尔可夫和非马尔可夫随机动力学。我们证明了 SINN 对粗粒度问题和过渡动力学建模的适用性。此外，我们表明所获得的降阶模型可以在时间粗粒度数据上进行训练，因此非常适合罕见事件模拟。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为统计感知神经网络（SINN）的机器学习框架，用于从数据中学习随机动力学。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在建模复杂随机系统时存在局限性，需开发能准确捕捉统计行为的神经网络架构。
AI.method: 基于随机系统普遍逼近定理和投影算子理论，设计神经网络训练机制以重现目标随机过程的统计特性。
AI.result: SINN能可靠近似马尔可夫与非马尔可夫随机动力学，并适用于粗粒化建模及罕见事件模拟。
AI.conclusion: SINN为随机动力学建模提供了有效工具，尤其适合处理粗粒化数据与罕见事件模拟场景。

authors_text: Kevin Leyton-Brown,Mausam,Yatin Nandwani,Hedayat Zarkoob,Chris Cameron,Neil Newman,Dinesh Raghu
title: Matching Papers and Reviewers at Large Conferences
title_zh: 在大型会议上匹配论文和审稿人
abstract: Peer-reviewed conferences, the main publication venues in CS, rely critically on matching highly qualified reviewers for each paper. Because of the growing scale of these conferences, the tight timelines on which they operate, and a recent surge in explicitly dishonest behavior, there is now no alternative to performing this matching in an automated way. This paper studies a novel reviewer-paper matching approach that was recently deployed in the 35th AAAI Conference on Artificial Intelligence (AAAI 2021), and has since been adopted (wholly or partially) by other conferences including ICML 2022, AAAI 2022, and IJCAI 2022. This approach has three main elements: (1) collecting and processing input data to identify problematic matches and generate reviewer-paper scores; (2) formulating and solving an optimization problem to find good reviewer-paper matchings; and (3) a two-phase reviewing process that shifts reviewing resources away from papers likely to be rejected and towards papers closer to the decision boundary. This paper also describes an evaluation of these innovations based on an extensive post-hoc analysis on real data -- including a comparison with the matching algorithm used in AAAI's previous (2020) iteration -- and supplements this with additional numerical experimentation.
summary: Peer-reviewed conferences, the main publication venues in CS, rely critically on matching highly qualified reviewers for each paper. Because of the growing scale of these conferences, the tight timelines on which they operate, and a recent surge in explicitly dishonest behavior, there is now no alternative to performing this matching in an automated way. This paper studies a novel reviewer-paper matching approach that was recently deployed in the 35th AAAI Conference on Artificial Intelligence (AAAI 2021), and has since been adopted (wholly or partially) by other conferences including ICML 2022, AAAI 2022, and IJCAI 2022. This approach has three main elements: (1) collecting and processing input data to identify problematic matches and generate reviewer-paper scores; (2) formulating and solving an optimization problem to find good reviewer-paper matchings; and (3) a two-phase reviewing process that shifts reviewing resources away from papers likely to be rejected and towards papers closer to the decision boundary. This paper also describes an evaluation of these innovations based on an extensive post-hoc analysis on real data -- including a comparison with the matching algorithm used in AAAI's previous (2020) iteration -- and supplements this with additional numerical experimentation.
abstract_zh: 同行评审会议是计算机科学领域的主要发表场所，它严重依赖于为每篇论文匹配高素质的审稿人。由于这些会议的规模不断扩大、运作的时间紧迫，以及最近明显不诚实行为的激增，现在除了以自动化方式执行这种匹配之外别无选择。本文研究了一种新颖的审稿人-论文匹配方法，该方法最近在第 35 届 AAAI 人工智能会议 (AAAI 2021) 上部署，此后已被 ICML 2022、AAAI 2022 和 IJCAI 2022 等其他会议（全部或部分）采用。该方法具有三个主要要素：（1）收集和处理输入数据以识别有问题的匹配并生成审稿人-论文评分； (2) 制定并解决优化问题以找到良好的审稿人-论文匹配； （3）一个两阶段的审查过程，将审查资源从可能被拒绝的论文转移到更接近决策边界的论文。本文还描述了基于对真实数据的广泛事后分析对这些创新的评估——包括与 AAAI 上一次（2020 年）迭代中使用的匹配算法的比较——并通过额外的数值实验对此进行了补充。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自动化匹配大型会议论文与审稿人的新方法，并在多个顶级会议中部署验证。
AI.motivation: 随着计算机会议规模扩大、时间紧迫及学术不端行为增加，传统人工匹配方式已无法满足需求，亟需高效可靠的自动化解决方案。
AI.method: 包含三部分：1) 收集数据并识别问题匹配生成评分；2) 建立优化模型求解匹配方案；3) 采用两阶段审稿机制优先分配资源给待定论文。
AI.result: 实际数据评估显示新方法较2020年AAAI的旧算法在匹配质量、资源分配效率及审稿人负担方面均有显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了大规模会议审稿匹配难题，已被ICML、IJCAI等会议采纳，未来需进一步优化算法鲁棒性与可解释性。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种自动化匹配大型会议论文与审稿人的新方法，并在多个顶级会议中部署验证。
ai_content.motivation: 随着计算机会议规模扩大、时间紧迫及学术不端行为增加，传统人工匹配方式已无法满足需求，亟需高效可靠的自动化解决方案。
ai_content.method: 包含三部分：1) 收集数据并识别问题匹配生成评分；2) 建立优化模型求解匹配方案；3) 采用两阶段审稿机制优先分配资源给待定论文。
ai_content.result: 实际数据评估显示新方法较2020年AAAI的旧算法在匹配质量、资源分配效率及审稿人负担方面均有显著提升。
ai_content.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了大规模会议审稿匹配难题，已被ICML、IJCAI等会议采纳，未来需进一步优化算法鲁棒性与可解释性。

search_text: Matching Papers and Reviewers at Large Conferences 在大型会议上匹配论文和审稿人 Peer-reviewed conferences, the main publication venues in CS, rely critically on matching highly qualified reviewers for each paper. Because of the growing scale of these conferences, the tight timelines on which they operate, and a recent surge in explicitly dishonest behavior, there is now no alternative to performing this matching in an automated way. This paper studies a novel reviewer-paper matching approach that was recently deployed in the 35th AAAI Conference on Artificial Intelligence (AAAI 2021), and has since been adopted (wholly or partially) by other conferences including ICML 2022, AAAI 2022, and IJCAI 2022. This approach has three main elements: (1) collecting and processing input data to identify problematic matches and generate reviewer-paper scores; (2) formulating and solving an optimization problem to find good reviewer-paper matchings; and (3) a two-phase reviewing process that shifts reviewing resources away from papers likely to be rejected and towards papers closer to the decision boundary. This paper also describes an evaluation of these innovations based on an extensive post-hoc analysis on real data -- including a comparison with the matching algorithm used in AAAI's previous (2020) iteration -- and supplements this with additional numerical experimentation. 同行评审会议是计算机科学领域的主要发表场所，它严重依赖于为每篇论文匹配高素质的审稿人。由于这些会议的规模不断扩大、运作的时间紧迫，以及最近明显不诚实行为的激增，现在除了以自动化方式执行这种匹配之外别无选择。本文研究了一种新颖的审稿人-论文匹配方法，该方法最近在第 35 届 AAAI 人工智能会议 (AAAI 2021) 上部署，此后已被 ICML 2022、AAAI 2022 和 IJCAI 2022 等其他会议（全部或部分）采用。该方法具有三个主要要素：（1）收集和处理输入数据以识别有问题的匹配并生成审稿人-论文评分； (2) 制定并解决优化问题以找到良好的审稿人-论文匹配； （3）一个两阶段的审查过程，将审查资源从可能被拒绝的论文转移到更接近决策边界的论文。本文还描述了基于对真实数据的广泛事后分析对这些创新的评估——包括与 AAAI 上一次（2020 年）迭代中使用的匹配算法的比较——并通过额外的数值实验对此进行了补充。 本文提出一种自动化匹配大型会议论文与审稿人的新方法，并在多个顶级会议中部署验证。 Kevin Leyton-Brown,Mausam,Yatin Nandwani,Hedayat Zarkoob,Chris Cameron,Neil Newman,Dinesh Raghu cs.AI,cs.IR

authors_text: Arne Gevaert,Axel-Jan Rousseau,Thijs Becker,Dirk Valkenborg,Tijl De Bie,Yvan Saeys
title: Evaluating Feature Attribution Methods in the Image Domain
title_zh: 评估图像领域的特征归因方法
comment: Updated based on reviewer comments: added discussion on sanity checks, application to tabular datasets, and minor changes
comments: Updated based on reviewer comments: added discussion on sanity checks, application to tabular datasets, and minor changes
abstract: Feature attribution maps are a popular approach to highlight the most important pixels in an image for a given prediction of a model. Despite a recent growth in popularity and available methods, little attention is given to the objective evaluation of such attribution maps. Building on previous work in this domain, we investigate existing metrics and propose new variants of metrics for the evaluation of attribution maps. We confirm a recent finding that different attribution metrics seem to measure different underlying concepts of attribution maps, and extend this finding to a larger selection of attribution metrics. We also find that metric results on one dataset do not necessarily generalize to other datasets, and methods with desirable theoretical properties such as DeepSHAP do not necessarily outperform computationally cheaper alternatives. Based on these findings, we propose a general benchmarking approach to identify the ideal feature attribution method for a given use case. Implementations of attribution metrics and our experiments are available online.
summary: Feature attribution maps are a popular approach to highlight the most important pixels in an image for a given prediction of a model. Despite a recent growth in popularity and available methods, little attention is given to the objective evaluation of such attribution maps. Building on previous work in this domain, we investigate existing metrics and propose new variants of metrics for the evaluation of attribution maps. We confirm a recent finding that different attribution metrics seem to measure different underlying concepts of attribution maps, and extend this finding to a larger selection of attribution metrics. We also find that metric results on one dataset do not necessarily generalize to other datasets, and methods with desirable theoretical properties such as DeepSHAP do not necessarily outperform computationally cheaper alternatives. Based on these findings, we propose a general benchmarking approach to identify the ideal feature attribution method for a given use case. Implementations of attribution metrics and our experiments are available online.
abstract_zh: 特征归因图是一种流行的方法，用于突出显示图像中最重要的像素，以实现给定的模型预测。尽管最近流行度和可用方法有所增长，但很少有人关注此类归因图的客观评估。基于该领域之前的工作，我们研究了现有指标并提出了用于评估归因图的新指标变体。我们证实了最近的一项发现，即不同的归因指标似乎衡量了归因图的不同基本概念，并将这一发现扩展到更多的归因指标。我们还发现，一个数据集上的度量结果不一定能推广到其他数据集，并且具有理想理论属性的方法（例如 DeepSHAP）不一定优于计算成本较低的替代方法。基于这些发现，我们提出了一种通用基准测试方法来确定给定用例的理想特征归因方法。归因指标的实施和我们的实验可以在线获取。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在评估图像领域中的特征归因方法，提出新的评价指标并建立通用基准测试框架。
AI.motivation: 现有特征归因图缺乏客观评价标准，不同指标衡量的概念不一致，且评价结果难以跨数据集泛化。
AI.method: 分析现有归因指标，提出改进指标，通过多数据集实验验证指标差异及方法表现。
AI.result: 发现不同指标衡量不同归因概念，单一数据集表现无法外推，理论优方法未必实际更优。
AI.conclusion: 提出基于任务需求的归因方法选择基准框架，强调评价指标与应用场景的适配性。

authors_text: Iulian Emil Tampu,Anders Eklund,Neda Haj-Hosseini
title: Inflation of test accuracy due to data leakage in deep learning-based classification of OCT images
title_zh: 基于深度学习的 OCT 图像分类中由于数据泄漏导致的测试准确性膨胀
abstract: In the application of deep learning on optical coherence tomography (OCT) data, it is common to train classification networks using 2D images originating from volumetric data. Given the micrometer resolution of OCT systems, consecutive images are often very similar in both visible structures and noise. Thus, an inappropriate data split can result in overlap between the training and testing sets, with a large portion of the literature overlooking this aspect. In this study, the effect of improper dataset splitting on model evaluation is demonstrated for three classification tasks using three OCT open-access datasets extensively used, Kermany's and Srinivasan's ophthalmology datasets, and AIIMS breast tissue dataset. Results show that the classification performance is inflated by 0.07 up to 0.43 in terms of Matthews Correlation Coefficient (accuracy: 5% to 30%) for models tested on datasets with improper splitting, highlighting the considerable effect of dataset handling on model evaluation. This study intends to raise awareness on the importance of dataset splitting given the increased research interest in implementing deep learning on OCT data.
summary: In the application of deep learning on optical coherence tomography (OCT) data, it is common to train classification networks using 2D images originating from volumetric data. Given the micrometer resolution of OCT systems, consecutive images are often very similar in both visible structures and noise. Thus, an inappropriate data split can result in overlap between the training and testing sets, with a large portion of the literature overlooking this aspect. In this study, the effect of improper dataset splitting on model evaluation is demonstrated for three classification tasks using three OCT open-access datasets extensively used, Kermany's and Srinivasan's ophthalmology datasets, and AIIMS breast tissue dataset. Results show that the classification performance is inflated by 0.07 up to 0.43 in terms of Matthews Correlation Coefficient (accuracy: 5% to 30%) for models tested on datasets with improper splitting, highlighting the considerable effect of dataset handling on model evaluation. This study intends to raise awareness on the importance of dataset splitting given the increased research interest in implementing deep learning on OCT data.
abstract_zh: 在光学相干断层扫描 (OCT) 数据的深度学习应用中，通常使用源自体积数据的 2D 图像来训练分类网络。鉴于 OCT 系统的微米级分辨率，连续图像的可见结构和噪声通常非常相似。因此，不适当的数据分割可能会导致训练集和测试集之间的重叠，而大部分文献都忽略了这一方面。在本研究中，使用广泛使用的三个 OCT 开放访问数据集、Kermany 和 Srinivasan 的眼科数据集以及 AIIMS 乳腺组织数据集，针对三个分类任务演示了不正确的数据集分割对模型评估的影响。结果表明，在不正确分割的数据集上测试的模型的马修斯相关系数（准确度：5% 至 30%）的分类性能夸大了 0.07 至 0.43，凸显了数据集处理对模型评估的显着影响。鉴于对 OCT 数据实施深度学习的研究兴趣日益浓厚，本研究旨在提高人们对数据集分割重要性的认识。

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了在基于深度学习的OCT图像分类中，因数据分割不当导致的测试准确率虚高问题。
AI.motivation: OCT数据具有微米级分辨率，连续图像高度相似，不当的数据分割会导致训练集与测试集重叠，但现有文献对此关注不足。
AI.method: 使用三个公开的OCT数据集（Kermany、Srinivasan和AIIMS），通过三种分类任务验证不当数据分割对模型评估的影响。
AI.result: 模型在数据分割不当的测试中，分类性能（Matthews相关系数）虚高0.07至0.43（准确率5%-30%）。
AI.conclusion: 强调在OCT数据深度学习应用中，数据分割方式对模型评估有显著影响，需引起重视以避免性能高估。

authors_text: Tara V. Anand,Adèle H. Ribeiro,Jin Tian,Elias Bareinboim
title: Causal Effect Identification in Cluster DAGs
title_zh: 集群 DAG 中的因果效应识别
comment: mber:Columbia Causal AI Laboratory, Technical Report (R-77)
comments: mber:Columbia Causal AI Laboratory, Technical Report (R-77)
abstract: Reasoning about the effect of interventions and counterfactuals is a fundamental task found throughout the data sciences. A collection of principles, algorithms, and tools has been developed for performing such tasks in the last decades (Pearl, 2000). One of the pervasive requirements found throughout this literature is the articulation of assumptions, which commonly appear in the form of causal diagrams. Despite the power of this approach, there are significant settings where the knowledge necessary to specify a causal diagram over all variables is not available, particularly in complex, high-dimensional domains. In this paper, we introduce a new graphical modeling tool called cluster DAGs (for short, C-DAGs) that allows for the partial specification of relationships among variables based on limited prior knowledge, alleviating the stringent requirement of specifying a full causal diagram. A C-DAG specifies relationships between clusters of variables, while the relationships between the variables within a cluster are left unspecified, and can be seen as a graphical representation of an equivalence class of causal diagrams that share the relationships among the clusters. We develop the foundations and machinery for valid inferences over C-DAGs about the clusters of variables at each layer of Pearl's Causal Hierarchy (Pearl and Mackenzie 2018; Bareinboim et al. 2020) - L1 (probabilistic), L2 (interventional), and L3 (counterfactual). In particular, we prove the soundness and completeness of d-separation for probabilistic inference in C-DAGs. Further, we demonstrate the validity of Pearl's do-calculus rules over C-DAGs and show that the standard ID identification algorithm is sound and complete to systematically compute causal effects from observational data given a C-DAG. Finally, we show that C-DAGs are valid for performing counterfactual inferences about clusters of variables.

abstract_zh: 推理干预和反事实的影响是整个数据科学的一项基本任务。在过去的几十年里，已经开发了一系列原理、算法和工具来执行此类任务（Pearl，2000）。在这些文献中发现的普遍要求之一是假设的阐明，通常以因果图的形式出现。尽管这种方法很强大，但在某些重要的情况下，无法获得指定所有变量的因果图所需的知识，特别是在复杂的高维领域。在本文中，我们引入了一种称为集群 DAG（简称 C-DAG）的新图形建模工具，它允许基于有限的先验知识部分指定变量之间的关系，从而减轻指定完整因果图的严格要求。 C-DAG 指定变量簇之间的关系，而簇内变量之间的关系未指定，并且可以被视为共享簇之间关系的因果图的等价类的图形表示。我们开发了基础和机制，用于在 C-DAG 上对 Pearl 因果层次结构每一层的变量簇进行有效推断（Pearl 和 Mackenzie 2018；Bareinboim 等人 2020）——L1（概率）、L2（干预）和 L3（反事实）。特别是，我们证明了 C-DAG 中概率推理的 d-分离的健全性和完整性。此外，我们证明了 Pearl 的 do-calculus 规则在 C-DAG 上的有效性，并表明标准 ID 识别算法是健全且完整的，可以根据给定 C-DAG 的观测数据系统地计算因果效应。最后，我们证明 C-DAG 对于执行关于变量簇的反事实推理是有效的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的图形建模工具——集群有向无环图（C-DAGs），用于在部分先验知识下进行因果效应识别。
AI.motivation: 传统因果图需要完整指定所有变量关系，但在复杂高维领域中难以实现，需解决部分知识下的因果推断问题。
AI.method: 构建C-DAGs模型，通过层级化集群关系表示因果图等价类，并证明d-分离、do-演算规则及ID算法在C-DAGs中的有效性。
AI.result: 证明了C-DAGs在概率、干预和反事实层级的推断有效性，验证了标准ID算法可计算观测数据下的因果效应。
AI.conclusion: C-DAGs为复杂场景下的因果推断提供了可行框架，支持基于有限先验知识的层级化因果分析。

authors_text: Stefan Bosse
title: Self-organising Urban Traffic control on micro-level using Reinforcement Learning and Agent-based Modelling
title_zh: 使用强化学习和基于代理的建模进行微观层面的自组织城市交通控制
abstract: Most traffic flow control algorithms address switching cycle adaptation of traffic signals and lights. This work addresses traffic flow optimisation by self-organising micro-level control combining Reinforcement Learning and rule-based agents for action selection performing long-range navigation in urban environments. I.e., vehicles represented by agents adapt their decision making for re-routing based on local environmental sensors. Agent-based modelling and simulation is used to study emergence effects on urban city traffic flows. An unified agent programming model enables simulation and distributed data processing with possible incorporation of crowd sensing tasks used as an additional sensor data base. Results from an agent-based simulation of an artificial urban area show that the deployment of micro-level vehicle navigation control just by learned individual decision making and re-routing based on local environmental sensors can increase the efficiency of mobility in terms of path length and travelling time.
summary: Most traffic flow control algorithms address switching cycle adaptation of traffic signals and lights. This work addresses traffic flow optimisation by self-organising micro-level control combining Reinforcement Learning and rule-based agents for action selection performing long-range navigation in urban environments. I.e., vehicles represented by agents adapt their decision making for re-routing based on local environmental sensors. Agent-based modelling and simulation is used to study emergence effects on urban city traffic flows. An unified agent programming model enables simulation and distributed data processing with possible incorporation of crowd sensing tasks used as an additional sensor data base. Results from an agent-based simulation of an artificial urban area show that the deployment of micro-level vehicle navigation control just by learned individual decision making and re-routing based on local environmental sensors can increase the efficiency of mobility in terms of path length and travelling time.
abstract_zh: 大多数交通流控制算法解决交通信号和信号灯的切换周期自适应问题。这项工作通过自组织微观控制结合强化学习和基于规则的代理来解决交通流优化问题，以在城市环境中执行远程导航的动作选择。即，由代理代表的车辆根据本地环境传感器调整其决策以重新路由。基于代理的建模和仿真用于研究城市交通流的涌现效应。统一的代理编程模型可以实现模拟和分布式数据处理，并可能合并用作附加传感器数据库的人群感知任务。基于代理的人工城区模拟结果表明，仅通过基于本地环境传感器的学习个人决策和重新路由来部署微观车辆导航控制，就可以提高路径长度和行驶时间方面的移动效率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于强化学习和基于代理建模的微观城市交通自组织控制方法，通过车辆代理的自主决策优化交通流量。
AI.motivation: 传统交通控制算法仅关注信号切换周期调整，未能充分挖掘微观层面车辆自主决策对整体交通流的优化潜力。
AI.method: 结合强化学习与规则代理模型，利用局部环境传感器数据进行车辆路径重规划，通过基于代理的仿真研究群体行为涌现效应，并整合众包传感数据增强感知能力。
AI.result: 人工城市区域仿真表明，该方法在路径长度和行驶时间指标上显著提升了交通效率。
AI.conclusion: 微观层面基于学习的自主决策机制可有效优化城市交通流，为智能交通系统提供了新的分布式控制范式。

authors_text: Matthew Wear,Ryan Beal,Tim Matthews,Tim Norman,Sarvapali Ramchurn
title: Learning from the Pros: Extracting Professional Goalkeeper Technique from Broadcast Footage
title_zh: 向专业人士学习：从广播镜头中提取专业守门员技术
comment: 17 pages, 15 figures, MIT Sloan Sports Analytics Conference, March 4-5 2022, Boston, USA
comments: 17 pages, 15 figures, MIT Sloan Sports Analytics Conference, March 4-5 2022, Boston, USA
abstract: As an amateur goalkeeper playing grassroots soccer, who better to learn from than top professional goalkeepers? In this paper, we harness computer vision and machine learning models to appraise the save technique of professionals in a way those at lower levels can learn from. We train an unsupervised machine learning model using 3D body pose data extracted from broadcast footage to learn professional goalkeeper technique. Then, an "expected saves" model is developed, from which we can identify the optimal goalkeeper technique in different match contexts.
summary: As an amateur goalkeeper playing grassroots soccer, who better to learn from than top professional goalkeepers? In this paper, we harness computer vision and machine learning models to appraise the save technique of professionals in a way those at lower levels can learn from. We train an unsupervised machine learning model using 3D body pose data extracted from broadcast footage to learn professional goalkeeper technique. Then, an "expected saves" model is developed, from which we can identify the optimal goalkeeper technique in different match contexts.
abstract_zh: 作为一名踢草根足球的业余门将，谁比顶级职业门将更值得学习呢？在本文中，我们利用计算机视觉和机器学习模型来评估专业人员的保存技术，以供较低级别的人员学习。我们使用从广播片段中提取的 3D 身体姿势数据来训练无监督机器学习模型，以学习专业守门员技术。然后，开发了一个“预期扑救”模型，从中我们可以识别不同比赛环境下的最佳守门员技术。

AI.tldr: 本论文通过计算机视觉和机器学习技术，从广播视频中提取职业守门员的扑救技术，帮助业余爱好者学习。
AI.motivation: 业余守门员缺乏系统学习职业选手技术的途径，需自动化工具分析专业动作以提升训练效果。
AI.method: 利用3D身体姿态数据训练无监督机器学习模型，并构建'预期扑救'模型以识别不同比赛情境下的最佳技术。
AI.result: 成功提取职业守门员技术特征，模型能有效分析动作并给出不同场景下的最优扑救策略。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为业余球员提供了基于数据的个性化学习路径，通过技术解析促进技能提升。

ai_content.tldr: 本论文通过计算机视觉和机器学习技术，从广播视频中提取职业守门员的扑救技术，帮助业余爱好者学习。

search_text: Learning from the Pros: Extracting Professional Goalkeeper Technique from Broadcast Footage 向专业人士学习：从广播镜头中提取专业守门员技术 As an amateur goalkeeper playing grassroots soccer, who better to learn from than top professional goalkeepers? In this paper, we harness computer vision and machine learning models to appraise the save technique of professionals in a way those at lower levels can learn from. We train an unsupervised machine learning model using 3D body pose data extracted from broadcast footage to learn professional goalkeeper technique. Then, an "expected saves" model is developed, from which we can identify the optimal goalkeeper technique in different match contexts. 作为一名踢草根足球的业余门将，谁比顶级职业门将更值得学习呢？在本文中，我们利用计算机视觉和机器学习模型来评估专业人员的保存技术，以供较低级别的人员学习。我们使用从广播片段中提取的 3D 身体姿势数据来训练无监督机器学习模型，以学习专业守门员技术。然后，开发了一个“预期扑救”模型，从中我们可以识别不同比赛环境下的最佳守门员技术。 本论文通过计算机视觉和机器学习技术，从广播视频中提取职业守门员的扑救技术，帮助业余爱好者学习。 Matthew Wear,Ryan Beal,Tim Matthews,Tim Norman,Sarvapali Ramchurn cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Jash Shah,Sagar Kamat
title: A Method for Waste Segregation using Convolutional Neural Networks
title_zh: 一种利用卷积神经网络进行垃圾分类的方法
abstract: Segregation of garbage is a primary concern in many nations across the world. Even though we are in the modern era, many people still do not know how to distinguish between organic and recyclable waste. It is because of this that the world is facing a major crisis of waste disposal. In this paper, we try to use deep learning algorithms to help solve this problem of waste classification. The waste is classified into two categories like organic and recyclable. Our proposed model achieves an accuracy of 94.9%. Although the other two models also show promising results, the Proposed Model stands out with the greatest accuracy. With the help of deep learning, one of the greatest obstacles to efficient waste management can finally be removed.
summary: Segregation of garbage is a primary concern in many nations across the world. Even though we are in the modern era, many people still do not know how to distinguish between organic and recyclable waste. It is because of this that the world is facing a major crisis of waste disposal. In this paper, we try to use deep learning algorithms to help solve this problem of waste classification. The waste is classified into two categories like organic and recyclable. Our proposed model achieves an accuracy of 94.9%. Although the other two models also show promising results, the Proposed Model stands out with the greatest accuracy. With the help of deep learning, one of the greatest obstacles to efficient waste management can finally be removed.
abstract_zh: 垃圾分类是世界上许多国家的主要关注点。尽管我们处于现代，许多人仍然不知道如何区分有机废物和可回收废物。正因为如此，世界正面临着垃圾处理的重大危机。在本文中，我们尝试使用深度学习算法来帮助解决垃圾分类的问题。废物分为有机废物和可回收废物两类。我们提出的模型的准确率达到 94.9%。尽管其他两个模型也显示出有希望的结果，但提议的模型以最高的准确度脱颖而出。在深度学习的帮助下，高效废物管理的最大障碍之一终于可以消除。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于卷积神经网络的垃圾分类方法，将垃圾分为有机和可回收两类。
AI.motivation: 当前垃圾分类困难导致废物处理危机，需通过深度学习提供高效解决方案。
AI.method: 采用卷积神经网络构建分类模型，对垃圾图像进行二分类处理。
AI.result: 所提模型在测试中达到94.9%的分类准确率，优于其他对比模型。
AI.conclusion: 深度学习技术能有效解决垃圾分类难题，为废物管理效率提升提供可行方案。

authors_text: Federico Simonetta,Federico Avanzini,Stavros Ntalampiras
title: A Perceptual Measure for Evaluating the Resynthesis of Automatic Music Transcriptions
title_zh: 评估自动音乐转录重新合成的感知测量
comment: Accepted by Multimedia Tools and Applications (2022); supplementary materials are in the latex sources
comments: Accepted by Multimedia Tools and Applications (2022); supplementary materials are in the latex sources
abstract: This study focuses on the perception of music performances when contextual factors, such as room acoustics and instrument, change. We propose to distinguish the concept of "performance" from the one of "interpretation", which expresses the "artistic intention". Towards assessing this distinction, we carried out an experimental evaluation where 91 subjects were invited to listen to various audio recordings created by resynthesizing MIDI data obtained through Automatic Music Transcription (AMT) systems and a sensorized acoustic piano. During the resynthesis, we simulated different contexts and asked listeners to evaluate how much the interpretation changes when the context changes. Results show that: (1) MIDI format alone is not able to completely grasp the artistic intention of a music performance; (2) usual objective evaluation measures based on MIDI data present low correlations with the average subjective evaluation. To bridge this gap, we propose a novel measure which is meaningfully correlated with the outcome of the tests. In addition, we investigate multimodal machine learning by providing a new score-informed AMT method and propose an approximation algorithm for the $p$-dispersion problem.
summary: This study focuses on the perception of music performances when contextual factors, such as room acoustics and instrument, change. We propose to distinguish the concept of "performance" from the one of "interpretation", which expresses the "artistic intention". Towards assessing this distinction, we carried out an experimental evaluation where 91 subjects were invited to listen to various audio recordings created by resynthesizing MIDI data obtained through Automatic Music Transcription (AMT) systems and a sensorized acoustic piano. During the resynthesis, we simulated different contexts and asked listeners to evaluate how much the interpretation changes when the context changes. Results show that: (1) MIDI format alone is not able to completely grasp the artistic intention of a music performance; (2) usual objective evaluation measures based on MIDI data present low correlations with the average subjective evaluation. To bridge this gap, we propose a novel measure which is meaningfully correlated with the outcome of the tests. In addition, we investigate multimodal machine learning by providing a new score-informed AMT method and propose an approximation algorithm for the $p$-dispersion problem.
abstract_zh: 这项研究的重点是当环境因素（例如房间声学和乐器）发生变化时对音乐表演的感知。我们建议将“表演”的概念与表达“艺术意图”的“解释”概念区分开来。为了评估这种区别，我们进行了一项实验评估，邀请 91 名受试者聆听通过重新合成通过自动音乐转录 (AMT) 系统和传感原声钢琴获得的 MIDI 数据而创建的各种录音。在重新合成过程中，我们模拟了不同的情境，并要求听众评估当情境发生变化时，解释会发生多大的变化。结果表明：（1）仅靠MIDI格式并不能完全把握音乐表演的艺术意图； (2)通常基于MIDI数据的客观评价指标与平均主观评价的相关性较低。为了弥补这一差距，我们提出了一种与测试结果有意义相关的新颖措施。此外，我们通过提供一种新的分数通知 AMT 方法来研究多模态机器学习，并提出一种针对 $p$ 离散问题的近似算法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种感知度量方法，用于评估自动音乐转录（AMT）系统生成的音频重合成音乐表演的感知质量。
AI.motivation: 现有基于MIDI数据的客观评价指标无法有效反映音乐表演的艺术意图，且与主观评价相关性低，需开发更符合人类感知的新度量方法。
AI.method: 通过实验让91名受试者聆听不同上下文（如房间声学、乐器）下的重合成音频，评估艺术意图变化；提出新型感知度量方法，并改进多模态机器学习的AMT方法及p-分散问题近似算法。
AI.result: MIDI格式无法完整捕捉艺术意图，传统指标与主观评价相关性低；新度量方法与实验结果显著相关，同时提出新的AMT方法和算法。
AI.conclusion: 新感知度量方法有效弥补了客观指标与主观评价的差距，并为AMT和音乐重合成提供了改进方向。

Towards assessing this distinction, we carried out an experimental evaluation where 91 subjects were invited to listen to various audio recordings created by resynthesizing MIDI data obtained through Automatic Music Transcription (AMT) systems and a sensorized acoustic piano. During the resynthesis, we simulated different contexts and asked listeners to evaluate how much the interpretation changes when the context changes. Results show that: (1) MIDI format alone is not able to completely grasp the artistic intention of a music performance; (2) usual objective evaluation measures based on MIDI data present low correlations with the average subjective evaluation. To bridge this gap, we propose a novel measure which is meaningfully correlated with the outcome of the tests.
