authors_text: Kaining Ying,Zhenhua Wang,Cong Bai,Pengfei Zhou
title: ISDA: Position-Aware Instance Segmentation with Deformable Attention
title_zh: ISDA：具有可变形注意力的位置感知实例分割
abstract: Most instance segmentation models are not end-to-end trainable due to either the incorporation of proposal estimation (RPN) as a pre-processing or non-maximum suppression (NMS) as a post-processing. Here we propose a novel end-to-end instance segmentation method termed ISDA. It reshapes the task into predicting a set of object masks, which are generated via traditional convolution operation with learned position-aware kernels and features of objects. Such kernels and features are learned by leveraging a deformable attention network with multi-scale representation. Thanks to the introduced set-prediction mechanism, the proposed method is NMS-free. Empirically, ISDA outperforms Mask R-CNN (the strong baseline) by 2.6 points on MS-COCO, and achieves leading performance compared with recent models. Code will be available soon.
summary: Most instance segmentation models are not end-to-end trainable due to either the incorporation of proposal estimation (RPN) as a pre-processing or non-maximum suppression (NMS) as a post-processing. Here we propose a novel end-to-end instance segmentation method termed ISDA. It reshapes the task into predicting a set of object masks, which are generated via traditional convolution operation with learned position-aware kernels and features of objects. Such kernels and features are learned by leveraging a deformable attention network with multi-scale representation. Thanks to the introduced set-prediction mechanism, the proposed method is NMS-free. Empirically, ISDA outperforms Mask R-CNN (the strong baseline) by 2.6 points on MS-COCO, and achieves leading performance compared with recent models. Code will be available soon.
abstract_zh: 大多数实例分割模型不是端到端可训练的，因为要么将提议估计（RPN）合并为预处理，要么将非极大值抑制（NMS）合并为后处理。在这里，我们提出了一种新颖的端到端实例分割方法，称为 ISDA。它将任务重塑为预测一组对象掩码，这些对象掩码是通过传统的卷积运算与学习的位置感知内核和对象特征生成的。这些内核和特征是通过利用具有多尺度表示的可变形注意网络来学习的。由于引入了集合预测机制，所提出的方法是无 NMS 的。从经验来看，ISDA 在 MS-COCO 上的性能比 Mask R-CNN（强基线）高 2.6 个点，与最新模型相比取得了领先的性能。代码即将发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需非极大值抑制（NMS）的端到端实例分割方法ISDA，通过可变形注意力网络学习位置感知的卷积核和特征，直接预测物体掩码。
AI.motivation: 现有实例分割模型因依赖区域提议网络（RPN）或NMS等预处理/后处理模块，难以实现真正的端到端训练。
AI.method: 利用可变形注意力网络提取多尺度特征，结合位置感知卷积核直接生成物体掩码，通过集合预测机制替代NMS实现端到端训练。
AI.result: 在MS-COCO数据集上，ISDA较Mask R-CNN提升2.6个百分点，优于近期主流模型。

search_text: ISDA: Position-Aware Instance Segmentation with Deformable Attention ISDA：具有可变形注意力的位置感知实例分割 Most instance segmentation models are not end-to-end trainable due to either the incorporation of proposal estimation (RPN) as a pre-processing or non-maximum suppression (NMS) as a post-processing. Here we propose a novel end-to-end instance segmentation method termed ISDA. It reshapes the task into predicting a set of object masks, which are generated via traditional convolution operation with learned position-aware kernels and features of objects. Such kernels and features are learned by leveraging a deformable attention network with multi-scale representation. Thanks to the introduced set-prediction mechanism, the proposed method is NMS-free. Empirically, ISDA outperforms Mask R-CNN (the strong baseline) by 2.6 points on MS-COCO, and achieves leading performance compared with recent models. Code will be available soon. 大多数实例分割模型不是端到端可训练的，因为要么将提议估计（RPN）合并为预处理，要么将非极大值抑制（NMS）合并为后处理。在这里，我们提出了一种新颖的端到端实例分割方法，称为 ISDA。它将任务重塑为预测一组对象掩码，这些对象掩码是通过传统的卷积运算与学习的位置感知内核和对象特征生成的。这些内核和特征是通过利用具有多尺度表示的可变形注意网络来学习的。由于引入了集合预测机制，所提出的方法是无 NMS 的。从经验来看，ISDA 在 MS-COCO 上的性能比 Mask R-CNN（强基线）高 2.6 个点，与最新模型相比取得了领先的性能。代码即将发布。 本文提出一种无需非极大值抑制（NMS）的端到端实例分割方法ISDA，通过可变形注意力网络学习位置感知的卷积核和特征，直接预测物体掩码。 Kaining Ying,Zhenhua Wang,Cong Bai,Pengfei Zhou cs.CV

authors_text: Md. Saif Hassan Onim,Hussain Nyeem,Koushik Roy,Mahmudul Hasan,Abtahi Ishmam,Md. Akiful Hoque Akif,Tareque Bashar Ovi
title: BLPnet: A new DNN model and Bengali OCR engine for Automatic License Plate Recognition
title_zh: BLPnet：用于自动车牌识别的新 DNN 模型和孟加拉语 OCR 引擎
abstract: The development of the Automatic License Plate Recognition (ALPR) system has received much attention for the English license plate. However, despite being the sixth largest population around the world, no significant progress can be tracked in the Bengali language countries or states for the ALPR system addressing their more alarming traffic management with inadequate road-safety measures. This paper reports a computationally efficient and reasonably accurate Automatic License Plate Recognition (ALPR) system for Bengali characters with a new end-to-end DNN model that we call Bengali License Plate Network(BLPnet). The cascaded architecture for detecting vehicle regions prior to vehicle license plate (VLP) in the model is proposed to eliminate false positives resulting in higher detection accuracy of VLP. Besides, a lower set of trainable parameters is considered for reducing the computational cost making the system faster and more compatible for a real-time application. With a Computational Neural Network (CNN)based new Bengali OCR engine and word-mapping process, the model is characters rotation invariant, and can readily extract, detect and output the complete license plate number of a vehicle. The model feeding with17 frames per second (fps) on real-time video footage can detect a vehicle with the Mean Squared Error (MSE) of 0.0152, and the mean license plate character recognition accuracy of 95%. While compared to the other models, an improvement of 5% and 20% were recorded for the BLPnetover the prominent YOLO-based ALPR model and the Tesseract model for the number-plate detection accuracy and time requirement, respectively.
summary: The development of the Automatic License Plate Recognition (ALPR) system has received much attention for the English license plate. However, despite being the sixth largest population around the world, no significant progress can be tracked in the Bengali language countries or states for the ALPR system addressing their more alarming traffic management with inadequate road-safety measures. This paper reports a computationally efficient and reasonably accurate Automatic License Plate Recognition (ALPR) system for Bengali characters with a new end-to-end DNN model that we call Bengali License Plate Network(BLPnet). The cascaded architecture for detecting vehicle regions prior to vehicle license plate (VLP) in the model is proposed to eliminate false positives resulting in higher detection accuracy of VLP. Besides, a lower set of trainable parameters is considered for reducing the computational cost making the system faster and more compatible for a real-time application. With a Computational Neural Network (CNN)based new Bengali OCR engine and word-mapping process, the model is characters rotation invariant, and can readily extract, detect and output the complete license plate number of a vehicle. The model feeding with17 frames per second (fps) on real-time video footage can detect a vehicle with the Mean Squared Error (MSE) of 0.0152, and the mean license plate character recognition accuracy of 95%. While compared to the other models, an improvement of 5% and 20% were recorded for the BLPnetover the prominent YOLO-based ALPR model and the Tesseract model for the number-plate detection accuracy and time requirement, respectively.
abstract_zh: 英文车牌自动车牌识别（ALPR）系统的开发备受关注。然而，尽管孟加拉语国家或地区的人口数量位居世界第六，但 ALPR 系统在解决道路安全措施不足的情况下更令人担忧的交通管理方面却没有取得重大进展。本文报告了一种计算高效且相当准确的孟加拉语字符自动车牌识别 (ALPR) 系统，该系统采用新的端到端 DNN 模型，我们将其称为孟加拉语车牌网络 (BLPnet)。提出了在模型中检测车辆牌照（VLP）之前的车辆区域的级联架构，以消除误报，从而提高 VLP 的检测精度。此外，考虑使用较少的可训练参数集来降低计算成本，使系统更快、更兼容实时应用。该模型采用基于计算神经网络（CNN）的新型孟加拉语 OCR 引擎和字映射过程，具有字符旋转不变性，可以轻松提取、检测和输出车辆的完整车牌号。该模型以每秒 17 帧 (fps) 的速度输入实时视频片段，检测车辆的均方误差 (MSE) 为 0.0152，平均车牌字符识别准确率为 95%。与其他模型相比，BLPnet 的车牌检测精度和时间要求分别比著名的基于 YOLO 的 ALPR 模型和 Tesseract 模型提高了 5% 和 20%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为BLPnet的新深度神经网络模型和孟加拉语OCR引擎，用于自动车牌识别（ALPR）系统，以解决孟加拉语国家和地区在交通管理中的车牌识别难题。
AI.motivation: 尽管孟加拉语国家人口众多，但现有ALPR系统在该地区的研究进展有限，难以应对交通管理中缺乏道路安全措施的挑战，因此需要开发针对孟加拉语车牌的高效识别系统。
AI.method: 采用级联架构先检测车辆区域再定位车牌，结合CNN-based OCR引擎与词映射技术，实现字符旋转不变性；通过减少可训练参数降低计算成本，提升实时性。
AI.result: BLPnet在实时视频中以17帧/秒处理速度实现车牌检测均方误差0.0152，字符识别准确率95%，相较YOLO和Tesseract模型分别提升5%和20%的检测准确率与处理效率。
AI.conclusion: BLPnet通过优化架构与计算效率，在孟加拉语车牌识别任务中展现出更高的准确率与实时性，为相关地区的交通管理提供了有效技术方案。

search_text: BLPnet: A new DNN model and Bengali OCR engine for Automatic License Plate Recognition BLPnet：用于自动车牌识别的新 DNN 模型和孟加拉语 OCR 引擎 The development of the Automatic License Plate Recognition (ALPR) system has received much attention for the English license plate. However, despite being the sixth largest population around the world, no significant progress can be tracked in the Bengali language countries or states for the ALPR system addressing their more alarming traffic management with inadequate road-safety measures. This paper reports a computationally efficient and reasonably accurate Automatic License Plate Recognition (ALPR) system for Bengali characters with a new end-to-end DNN model that we call Bengali License Plate Network(BLPnet). The cascaded architecture for detecting vehicle regions prior to vehicle license plate (VLP) in the model is proposed to eliminate false positives resulting in higher detection accuracy of VLP. Besides, a lower set of trainable parameters is considered for reducing the computational cost making the system faster and more compatible for a real-time application. With a Computational Neural Network (CNN)based new Bengali OCR engine and word-mapping process, the model is characters rotation invariant, and can readily extract, detect and output the complete license plate number of a vehicle. The model feeding with17 frames per second (fps) on real-time video footage can detect a vehicle with the Mean Squared Error (MSE) of 0.0152, and the mean license plate character recognition accuracy of 95%. authors_text: Laurence Likforman-Sulem,Anna Esposito,Marcos Faundez-Zanuy,Stephan Clemençon,Gennaro Cordasco
title: EMOTHAW: A novel database for emotional state recognition from handwriting
title_zh: EMOTHAW：一种用于识别手写情绪状态的新型数据库
abstract: The detection of negative emotions through daily activities such as handwriting is useful for promoting well-being. The spread of human-machine interfaces such as tablets makes the collection of handwriting samples easier. In this context, we present a first publicly available handwriting database which relates emotional states to handwriting, that we call EMOTHAW. This database includes samples of 129 participants whose emotional states, namely anxiety, depression and stress, are assessed by the Depression Anxiety Stress Scales (DASS) questionnaire. Seven tasks are recorded through a digitizing tablet: pentagons and house drawing, words copied in handprint, circles and clock drawing, and one sentence copied in cursive writing. Records consist in pen positions, on-paper and in-air, time stamp, pressure, pen azimuth and altitude. We report our analysis on this database. From collected data, we first compute measurements related to timing and ductus. We compute separate measurements according to the position of the writing device: on paper or in-air. We analyse and classify this set of measurements (referred to as features) using a random forest approach. This latter is a machine learning method [2], based on an ensemble of decision trees, which includes a feature ranking process. We use this ranking process to identify the features which best reveal a targeted emotional state. We then build random forest classifiers associated to each emotional state. Our results, obtained from cross-validation experiments, show that the targeted emotional states can be identified with accuracies ranging from 60% to 71%.
summary: The detection of negative emotions through daily activities such as handwriting is useful for promoting well-being. The spread of human-machine interfaces such as tablets makes the collection of handwriting samples easier. In this context, we present a first publicly available handwriting database which relates emotional states to handwriting, that we call EMOTHAW. This database includes samples of 129 participants whose emotional states, namely anxiety, depression and stress, are assessed by the Depression Anxiety Stress Scales (DASS) questionnaire. Seven tasks are recorded through a digitizing tablet: pentagons and house drawing, words copied in handprint, circles and clock drawing, and one sentence copied in cursive writing. Records consist in pen positions, on-paper and in-air, time stamp, pressure, pen azimuth and altitude. We report our analysis on this database. From collected data, we first compute measurements related to timing and ductus. We compute separate measurements according to the position of the writing device: on paper or in-air. We analyse and classify this set of measurements (referred to as features) using a random forest approach. This latter is a machine learning method [2], based on an ensemble of decision trees, which includes a feature ranking process. We use this ranking process to identify the features which best reveal a targeted emotional state. We then build random forest classifiers associated to each emotional state. Our results, obtained from cross-validation experiments, show that the targeted emotional states can be identified with accuracies ranging from 60% to 71%.
abstract_zh: 通过书写等日常活动检测负面情绪有助于促进幸福感。平板电脑等人机界面的普及使得手写样本的收集变得更加容易。在这种背景下，我们提出了第一个公开可用的手写数据库，它将情绪状态与手写相关联，我们称之为 EMOTHAW。该数据库包含 129 名参与者的样本，他们的情绪状态，即焦虑、抑郁和压力，通过抑郁焦虑压力量表 (DASS) 问卷进行评估。通过数字化平板电脑记录了七项任务：五边形和房屋绘图，手写抄写的单词，圆圈和时钟绘制，以及草书抄写的一个句子。记录包括笔位置、纸上位置和空中位置、时间戳、压力、笔方位角和高度。我们报告对此数据库的分析。根据收集的数据，我们首先计算与时间和导管相关的测量值。我们根据书写设备的位置（在纸上或在空中）计算单独的测量结果。我们使用随机森林方法对这组测量值（称为特征）进行分析和分类。后者是一种基于决策树集合的机器学习方法 [2]，其中包括特征排序过程。我们使用这个排名过程来识别最能揭示目标情绪状态的特征。然后，我们构建与每种情绪状态相关的随机森林分类器。我们从交叉验证实验中获得的结果表明，目标情绪状态的识别准确度在 60% 到 71% 之间。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个名为EMOTHAW的新数据库，通过手写样本识别情绪状态，包括焦虑、抑郁和压力。
AI.motivation: 通过日常活动（如手写）检测负面情绪有助于促进心理健康，而平板等设备的普及使手写样本收集更加便捷。
AI.method: 收集129名参与者的手写样本，通过数字化平板记录笔的位置、时间戳、压力等数据，利用随机森林算法分析特征并分类情绪状态。
AI.result: 通过交叉验证实验，目标情绪状态识别准确率在60%至71%之间。
AI.conclusion: EMOTHAW数据库为情绪识别研究提供了重要资源，且识别出的特征可助力开发情绪检测系统。

search_text: EMOTHAW: A novel database for emotional state recognition from handwriting EMOTHAW：一种用于识别手写情绪状态的新型数据库 The detection of negative emotions through daily activities such as handwriting is useful for promoting well-being. The spread of human-machine interfaces such as tablets makes the collection of handwriting samples easier. In this context, we present a first publicly available handwriting database which relates emotional states to handwriting, that we call EMOTHAW. This database includes samples of 129 participants whose emotional states, namely anxiety, depression and stress, are assessed by the Depression Anxiety Stress Scales (DASS) questionnaire. Seven tasks are recorded through a digitizing tablet: pentagons and house drawing, words copied in handprint, circles and clock drawing, and one sentence copied in cursive writing. Records consist in pen positions, on-paper and in-air, time stamp, pressure, pen azimuth and altitude. We report our analysis on this database. From collected data, we first compute measurements related to timing and ductus. We compute separate measurements according to the position of the writing device: on paper or in-air. We analyse and classify this set of measurements (referred to as features) using a random forest approach. This latter is a machine learning method [2], based on an ensemble of decision trees, which includes a feature ranking process. We use this ranking process to identify the features which best reveal a targeted emotional state. We then build random forest classifiers associated to each emotional state. Our results, obtained from cross-validation experiments, show that the targeted emotional states can be identified with accuracies ranging from 60% to 71%. 通过书写等日常活动检测负面情绪有助于促进幸福感。平板电脑等人机界面的普及使得手写样本的收集变得更加容易。在这种背景下，我们提出了第一个公开可用的手写数据库，它将情绪状态与手写相关联，我们称之为 EMOTHAW。该数据库包含 129 名参与者的样本，他们的情绪状态，即焦虑、抑郁和压力，通过抑郁焦虑压力量表 (DASS) 问卷进行评估。通过数字化平板电脑记录了七项任务：五边形和房屋绘图，手写抄写的单词，圆圈和时钟绘制，以及草书抄写的一个句子。记录包括笔位置、纸上位置和空中位置、时间戳、压力、笔方位角和高度。我们报告对此数据库的分析。根据收集的数据，我们首先计算与时间和导管相关的测量值。我们根据书写设备的位置（在纸上或在空中）计算单独的测量结果。我们使用随机森林方法对这组测量值（称为特征）进行分析和分类。后者是一种基于决策树集合的机器学习方法 [2]，其中包括特征排序过程。我们使用这个排名过程来识别最能揭示目标情绪状态的特征。然后，我们构建与每种情绪状态相关的随机森林分类器。我们从交叉验证实验中获得的结果表明，目标情绪状态的识别准确度在 60% 到 71% 之间。 本文提出一个名为EMOTHAW的新数据库，通过手写样本识别情绪状态，包括焦虑、抑郁和压力。 Laurence Likforman-Sulem,Anna Esposito,Marcos Faundez-Zanuy,Stephan Clemençon,Gennaro Cordasco cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Nutan Chen,Djalel Benbouzid,Francesco Ferroni,Mathis Nitschke,Luciano Pinna,Patrick van der Smagt
title: Flat Latent Manifolds for Human-machine Co-creation of Music
title_zh: 用于人机共同创作音乐的平坦潜在流形
abstract: The use of machine learning in artistic music generation leads to controversial discussions of the quality of art, for which objective quantification is nonsensical. We therefore consider a music-generating algorithm as a counterpart to a human musician, in a setting where reciprocal interplay is to lead to new experiences, both for the musician and the audience. To obtain this behaviour, we resort to the framework of recurrent Variational Auto-Encoders (VAE) and learn to generate music, seeded by a human musician. In the learned model, we generate novel musical sequences by interpolation in latent space. Standard VAEs however do not guarantee any form of smoothness in their latent representation. This translates into abrupt changes in the generated music sequences. To overcome these limitations, we regularise the decoder and endow the latent space with a flat Riemannian manifold, i.e., a manifold that is isometric to the Euclidean space. As a result, linearly interpolating in the latent space yields realistic and smooth musical changes that fit the type of machine--musician interactions we aim for. We provide empirical evidence for our method via a set of experiments on music datasets and we deploy our model for an interactive jam session with a professional drummer. The live performance provides qualitative evidence that the latent representation can be intuitively interpreted and exploited by the drummer to drive the interplay. Beyond the musical application, our approach showcases an instance of human-centred design of machine-learning models, driven by interpretability and the interaction with the end user.
summary: The use of machine learning in artistic music generation leads to controversial discussions of the quality of art, for which objective quantification is nonsensical. We therefore consider a music-generating algorithm as a counterpart to a human musician, in a setting where reciprocal interplay is to lead to new experiences, both for the musician and the audience. To obtain this behaviour, we resort to the framework of recurrent Variational Auto-Encoders (VAE) and learn to generate music, seeded by a human musician. In the learned model, we generate novel musical sequences by interpolation in latent space. Standard VAEs however do not guarantee any form of smoothness in their latent representation. This translates into abrupt changes in the generated music sequences. To overcome these limitations, we regularise the decoder and endow the latent space with a flat Riemannian manifold, i.e., a manifold that is isometric to the Euclidean space. As a result, linearly interpolating in the latent space yields realistic and smooth musical changes that fit the type of machine--musician interactions we aim for. We provide empirical evidence for our method via a set of experiments on music datasets and we deploy our model for an interactive jam session with a professional drummer. The live performance provides qualitative evidence that the latent representation can be intuitively interpreted and exploited by the drummer to drive the interplay. Beyond the musical application, our approach showcases an instance of human-centred design of machine-learning models, driven by interpretability and the interaction with the end user.
abstract_zh: 机器学习在艺术音乐生成中的使用引发了对艺术质量的争议性讨论，对此客观量化是毫无意义的。因此，我们将音乐生成算法视为人类音乐家的对应物，在相互影响的环境中为音乐家和观众带来新的体验。为了获得这种行为，我们采用循环变分自动编码器（VAE）框架并学习生成由人类音乐家播种的音乐。在学习模型中，我们通过在潜在空间中插值来生成新颖的音乐序列。然而，标准 VAE 并不保证其潜在表示具有任何形式的平滑性。这会转化为生成的音乐序列的突然变化。为了克服这些限制，我们对解码器进行正则化，并赋予潜在空间一个平坦的黎曼流形，即与欧几里得空间等距的流形。因此，在潜在空间中进行线性插值会产生真实且平滑的音乐变化，适合我们目标的机器-音乐家交互类型。我们通过一系列音乐数据集实验为我们的方法提供了经验证据，并将我们的模型部署到与专业鼓手的互动即兴演奏中。现场表演提供了定性证据，表明鼓手可以直观地解释和利用潜在表征来驱动相互作用。除了音乐应用程序之外，我们的方法还展示了以人为本的机器学习模型设计的实例，该模型由可解释性和与最终用户的交互驱动。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于平坦黎曼流形的变分自编码器（VAE）框架，用于实现人类与机器在音乐创作中的协同交互，通过在潜在空间中进行线性插值生成平滑的音乐序列。
AI.motivation: 传统VAE的潜在空间缺乏平滑性，导致生成音乐出现突兀变化，难以满足人机协同创作中对自然过渡的需求。需通过结构化潜在空间提升音乐生成的可解释性与交互性。
AI.method: 采用递归VAE架构，对解码器进行正则化约束，并为潜在空间赋予平坦黎曼流形结构，使潜在空间中的线性插值对应音乐的平滑变化。
AI.result: 在音乐数据集上的实验验证了方法有效性，并通过与专业鼓手的实时即兴演奏展示了鼓手能直观利用潜在空间进行创作交互。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为机器学习模型的人机协同设计提供了范例，通过可解释的潜在空间结构促进创作交互，具有超越音乐领域的应用价值。

authors_text: Joan Fabregas,Marcos Faundez-Zanuy
title: On-line signature verification system with failure to enroll managing
title_zh: 在线签名验证系统，无法注册管理
abstract: In this paper we simulate a real biometric verification system based on on-line signatures. For this purpose we have split the MCYT signature database in three subsets: one for classifier training, another for system adjustment and a third one for system testing simulating enrollment and verification. This context corresponds to a real operation, where a new user tries to enroll an existing system and must be automatically guided by the system in order to detect the failure to enroll situations. The main contribution of this work is the management of failure to enroll situations by means of a new proposal, called intelligent enrollment, which consists of consistency checking in order to automatically reject low quality samples. This strategy lets to enhance the verification errors up to 22% when leaving out 8% of the users. In this situation 8% of the people cannot be enrolled in the system and must be verified by other biometrics or by human abilities. These people are identified with intelligent enrollment and the situation can be thus managed. In addition we also propose a DCT-based feature extractor with threshold coding and discriminability criteria.
summary: In this paper we simulate a real biometric verification system based on on-line signatures. For this purpose we have split the MCYT signature database in three subsets: one for classifier training, another for system adjustment and a third one for system testing simulating enrollment and verification. This context corresponds to a real operation, where a new user tries to enroll an existing system and must be automatically guided by the system in order to detect the failure to enroll situations. The main contribution of this work is the management of failure to enroll situations by means of a new proposal, called intelligent enrollment, which consists of consistency checking in order to automatically reject low quality samples. This strategy lets to enhance the verification errors up to 22% when leaving out 8% of the users. In this situation 8% of the people cannot be enrolled in the system and must be verified by other biometrics or by human abilities. These people are identified with intelligent enrollment and the situation can be thus managed. In addition we also propose a DCT-based feature extractor with threshold coding and discriminability criteria.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们模拟了一个基于在线签名的真实生物特征验证系统。为此，我们将 MCYT 签名数据库分为三个子集：一个用于分类器训练，另一个用于系统调整，第三个用于模拟注册和验证的系统测试。此上下文对应于实际操作，其中新用户尝试注册现有系统并且必须由系统自动引导以检测注册失败的情况。这项工作的主要贡献是通过一项称为智能注册的新提案来管理未能注册的情况，其中包括一致性检查，以自动拒绝低质量样本。当遗漏 8% 的用户时，该策略可以将验证错误率提高高达 22%。在这种情况下，8%的人无法加入系统，必须通过其他生物识别或人类能力进行验证。通过智能登记识别这些人，从而可以管理情况。此外，我们还提出了一种基于 DCT 的特征提取器，具有阈值编码和判别标准。

AI.tldr: 本文设计了一个在线签名验证系统，并提出了一种管理用户无法注册情况的智能注册策略。
AI.motivation: 现有生物特征验证系统在处理用户注册失败情况时缺乏有效解决方案，导致验证错误率较高。
AI.method: 将MCYT数据库分为训练集、调整集和测试集，提出智能注册策略进行一致性检查，并设计基于DCT的特征提取器。
AI.result: 验证错误率提升22%，成功识别出8%无法注册用户，需通过其他生物特征或人工验证。
AI.conclusion: 智能注册策略有效管理了用户注册失败问题，同时提出的特征提取方法提升了系统性能。

ai_content.tldr: 本文设计了一个在线签名验证系统，并提出了一种管理用户无法注册情况的智能注册策略。
ai_content.motivation: 现有生物特征验证系统在处理用户注册失败情况时缺乏有效解决方案，导致验证错误率较高。
ai_content.method: 将MCYT数据库分为训练集、调整集和测试集，提出智能注册策略进行一致性检查，并设计基于DCT的特征提取器。
ai_content.result: 验证错误率提升22%，成功识别出8%无法注册用户，需通过其他生物特征或人工验证。
ai_content.conclusion: 智能注册策略有效管理了用户注册失败问题，同时提出的特征提取方法提升了系统性能。

search_text: On-line signature verification system with failure to enroll managing 在线签名验证系统，无法注册管理 In this paper we simulate a real biometric verification system based on on-line signatures. For this purpose we have split the MCYT signature database in three subsets: one for classifier training, another for system adjustment and a third one for system testing simulating enrollment and verification. This context corresponds to a real operation, where a new user tries to enroll an existing system and must be automatically guided by the system in order to detect the failure to enroll situations. The main contribution of this work is the management of failure to enroll situations by means of a new proposal, called intelligent enrollment, which consists of consistency checking in order to automatically reject low quality samples. This strategy lets to enhance the verification errors up to 22% when leaving out 8% of the users. In this situation 8% of the people cannot be enrolled in the system and must be verified by other biometrics or by human abilities. These people are identified with intelligent enrollment and the situation can be thus managed. In addition we also propose a DCT-based feature extractor with threshold coding and discriminability criteria. 在本文中，我们模拟了一个基于在线签名的真实生物特征验证系统。为此，我们将 MCYT 签名数据库分为三个子集：一个用于分类器训练，另一个用于系统调整，第三个用于模拟注册和验证的系统测试。此上下文对应于实际操作，其中新用户尝试注册现有系统并且必须由系统自动引导以检测注册失败的情况。这项工作的主要贡献是通过一项称为智能注册的新提案来管理未能注册的情况，其中包括一致性检查，以自动拒绝低质量样本。当遗漏 8% 的用户时，该策略可以将验证错误率提高高达 22%。在这种情况下，8%的人无法加入系统，必须通过其他生物识别或人类能力进行验证。通过智能登记识别这些人，从而可以管理情况。此外，我们还提出了一种基于 DCT 的特征提取器，具有阈值编码和判别标准。 本文设计了一个在线签名验证系统，并提出了一种管理用户无法注册情况的智能注册策略。 Joan Fabregas,Marcos Faundez-Zanuy cs.CV,cs.CR,cs.LG

authors_text: Carlos Alonso-Martinez,Marcos Faundez-Zanuy,Jiri Mekyska
title: A comparative study of in-air trajectories at short and long distances in online handwriting
title_zh: 在线手写短距离和长距离空中轨迹对比研究
abstract: Introduction Existing literature about online handwriting analysis to support pathology diagnosis has taken advantage of in-air trajectories. A similar situation occurred in biometric security applications where the goal is to identify or verify an individual using his signature or handwriting. These studies do not consider the distance of the pen tip to the writing surface. This is due to the fact that current acquisition devices do not provide height formation. However, it is quite straightforward to differentiate movements at two different heights: a) short distance: height lower or equal to 1 cm above a surface of digitizer, the digitizer provides x and y coordinates. b) long distance: height exceeding 1 cm, the only information available is a time stamp that indicates the time that a specific stroke has spent at long distance. Although short distance has been used in several papers, long distances have been ignored and will be investigated in this paper. Methods In this paper, we will analyze a large set of databases (BIOSECURID, EMOTHAW, PaHaW, Oxygen-Therapy and SALT), which contain a total amount of 663 users and 17951 files. We have specifically studied: a) the percentage of time spent on-surface, in-air at short distance, and in-air at long distance for different user profiles (pathological and healthy users) and different tasks; b) The potential use of these signals to improve classification rates. Results and conclusions Our experimental results reveal that long-distance movements represent a very small portion of the total execution time (0.5 % in the case of signatures and 10.4% for uppercase words of BIOSECUR-ID, which is the largest database). In addition, significant differences have been found in the comparison of pathological versus control group for letter l in PaHaW database (p=0.0157) and crossed pentagons in SALT database (p=0.0122)

abstract_zh: 简介 现有的有关在线笔迹分析以支持病理诊断的文献利用了空中轨迹。类似的情况也发生在生物识别安全应用程序中，其目标是使用签名或笔迹来识别或验证个人。这些研究没有考虑笔尖到书写表面的距离。这是因为当前的采集设备不提供高度形成。然而，区分两个不同高度的运动非常简单： a) 短距离：高度低于或等于数字化仪表面上方 1 厘米，数字化仪提供 x 和 y 坐标。 b)长距离：高度超过1厘米，唯一可用的信息是时间戳，指示特定击球在长距离上花费的时间。尽管短距离已在多篇论文中使用，但长距离已被忽略，并将在本文中进行研究。方法在本文中，我们将分析一组大型数据库（BIOSECURID、EMOTHAW、PaHaW、Oxygen-Therapy 和 SALT），其中总共包含 663 个用户和 17951 个文件。我们专门研究了： a) 不同用户类型（病态用户和健康用户）和不同任务在地面、短距离空中和长距离空中花费的时间百分比； b) 这些信号的潜在用途是提高分类率。结果和结论 我们的实验结果表明，长距离移动只占总执行时间的一小部分（签名情况下为 0.5%，BIOSECUR-ID 大写字（最大的数据库）为 10.4%）。此外，在PaHaW数据库中的字母l（p=0.0157）和SALT数据库中的交叉五边形（p=0.0122）的病理组与对照组的比较中发现了显着差异。

AI.tldr: 本论文对比研究了在线手写识别中短距离和长距离空中的轨迹特征。
AI.motivation: 现有研究未考虑笔尖与书写表面的距离对在线手写分析的影响，而长距离空中的轨迹信息可能对病理诊断和生物特征识别有潜在价值。
AI.method: 分析了包含663名用户、17951个文件的多个数据库（如BIOSECURID、PaHaW等），统计不同用户群体（病患与健康人）在不同任务中的表面接触、短距离空中和长距离空中时间占比，并验证这些信号对分类准确率的提升效果。
AI.result: 长距离空中运动仅占总时间的0.5%（签名）至10.4%（大写字母），但PaHaW数据库字母'l'和SALT数据库交叉五边形任务中，病患组与对照组存在显著差异（p<0.02）。
AI.conclusion: 长距离空中轨迹虽占比小，但可作为区分病理与健康用户的潜在特征，未来研究需进一步探索其在分类任务中的应用价值。

authors_text: Hemlata Tak,Massimiliano Todisco,Xin Wang,Jee-weon Jung,Junichi Yamagishi,Nicholas Evans
title: Automatic speaker verification spoofing and deepfake detection using wav2vec 2.0 and data augmentation
title_zh: 使用 wav2vec 2.0 和数据增强进行自动说话人验证欺骗和深度伪造检测
abstract: The performance of spoofing countermeasure systems depends fundamentally upon the use of sufficiently representative training data. With this usually being limited, current solutions typically lack generalisation to attacks encountered in the wild. Strategies to improve reliability in the face of uncontrolled, unpredictable attacks are hence needed. We report in this paper our efforts to use self-supervised learning in the form of a wav2vec 2.0 front-end with fine tuning. Despite initial base representations being learned using only bona fide data and no spoofed data, we obtain the lowest equal error rates reported in the literature for both the ASVspoof 2021 Logical Access and Deepfake databases. When combined with data augmentation,these results correspond to an improvement of almost 90% relative to our baseline system.
summary: The performance of spoofing countermeasure systems depends fundamentally upon the use of sufficiently representative training data. With this usually being limited, current solutions typically lack generalisation to attacks encountered in the wild. Strategies to improve reliability in the face of uncontrolled, unpredictable attacks are hence needed. We report in this paper our efforts to use self-supervised learning in the form of a wav2vec 2.0 front-end with fine tuning. Despite initial base representations being learned using only bona fide data and no spoofed data, we obtain the lowest equal error rates reported in the literature for both the ASVspoof 2021 Logical Access and Deepfake databases. When combined with data augmentation,these results correspond to an improvement of almost 90% relative to our baseline system.
abstract_zh: 欺骗对策系统的性能从根本上取决于是否使用具有足够代表性的训练数据。由于这通常是有限的，当前的解决方案通常缺乏对野外遇到的攻击的概括。因此，需要采取策略来提高面对不受控制、不可预测的攻击时的可靠性。我们在本文中报告了我们以具有微调功能的 wav2vec 2.0 前端的形式使用自监督学习的努力。尽管仅使用真实数据而不是欺骗数据来学习初始基本表示，但我们在 ASVspoof 2021 逻辑访问和 Deepfake 数据库中获得了文献中报告的最低同等错误率。当与数据增强相结合时，这些结果相对于我们的基线系统提高了近 90%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用wav2vec 2.0自监督学习框架结合数据增强技术，提升自动说话人验证系统对欺骗攻击和深度伪造的检测能力。
AI.motivation: 现有反欺骗系统因训练数据不足导致对野外不可预测攻击的泛化能力较差，亟需提升检测可靠性。
AI.method: 采用wav2vec 2.0模型仅使用真实语音数据预训练，通过微调和数据增强技术优化模型参数。
AI.result: 在ASVspoof 2021 Logical Access和Deepfake数据库上取得最低等错误率，性能较基线系统提升近90%。
AI.conclusion: 自监督学习结合数据增强显著提升检测效果，为应对复杂攻击提供了有效解决方案。

tldr: 本文提出使用wav2vec 2.0自监督学习框架结合数据增强技术，提升自动说话人验证系统对欺骗攻击和深度伪造的检测能力。
motivation: 现有反欺骗系统因训练数据不足导致对野外不可预测攻击的泛化能力较差，亟需提升检测可靠性。
method: 采用wav2vec 2.0模型仅使用真实语音数据预训练，通过微调和数据增强技术优化模型参数。
result: 在ASVspoof 2021 Logical Access和Deepfake数据库上取得最低等错误率，性能较基线系统提升近90%。
conclusion: 自监督学习结合数据增强显著提升检测效果，为应对复杂攻击提供了有效解决方案。
search_text: Automatic speaker verification spoofing and deepfake detection using wav2vec 2.0 and data augmentation 使用 wav2vec 2.0 和数据增强进行自动说话人验证欺骗和深度伪造检测 The performance of spoofing countermeasure systems depends fundamentally upon the use of sufficiently representative training data. With this usually being limited, current solutions typically lack generalisation to attacks encountered in the wild. Strategies to improve reliability in the face of uncontrolled, unpredictable attacks are hence needed. We report in this paper our efforts to use self-supervised learning in the form of a wav2vec 2.0 front-end with fine tuning. Despite initial base representations being learned using only bona fide data and no spoofed data, we obtain the lowest equal error rates reported in the literature for both the ASVspoof 2021 Logical Access and Deepfake databases. When combined with data augmentation,these results correspond to an improvement of almost 90% relative to our baseline system. 欺骗对策系统的性能从根本上取决于是否使用具有足够代表性的训练数据。由于这通常是有限的，当前的解决方案通常缺乏对野外遇到的攻击的概括。因此，需要采取策略来提高面对不受控制、不可预测的攻击时的可靠性。我们在本文中报告了我们以具有微调功能的 wav2vec 2.0 前端的形式使用自监督学习的努力。尽管仅使用真实数据而不是欺骗数据来学习初始基本表示，但我们在 ASVspoof 2021 逻辑访问和 Deepfake 数据库中获得了文献中报告的最低同等错误率。当与数据增强相结合时，这些结果相对于我们的基线系统提高了近 90%。 本文提出使用wav2vec 2.0自监督学习框架结合数据增强技术，提升自动说话人验证系统对欺骗攻击和深度伪造的检测能力。 Hemlata Tak,Massimiliano Todisco,Xin Wang,Jee-weon Jung,Junichi Yamagishi,Nicholas Evans eess.AS,cs.SD

authors_text: Ron Mokady,Michal Yarom,Omer Tov,Oran Lang,Daniel Cohen-Or,Tali Dekel,Michal Irani,Inbar Mosseri
title: Self-Distilled StyleGAN: Towards Generation from Internet Photos
title_zh: 自提风格GAN：走向互联网照片的一代
abstract: StyleGAN is known to produce high-fidelity images, while also offering unprecedented semantic editing. However, these fascinating abilities have been demonstrated only on a limited set of datasets, which are usually structurally aligned and well curated. In this paper, we show how StyleGAN can be adapted to work on raw uncurated images collected from the Internet. Such image collections impose two main challenges to StyleGAN: they contain many outlier images, and are characterized by a multi-modal distribution. Training StyleGAN on such raw image collections results in degraded image synthesis quality. To meet these challenges, we proposed a StyleGAN-based self-distillation approach, which consists of two main components: (i) A generative-based self-filtering of the dataset to eliminate outlier images, in order to generate an adequate training set, and (ii) Perceptual clustering of the generated images to detect the inherent data modalities, which are then employed to improve StyleGAN's "truncation trick" in the image synthesis process. The presented technique enables the generation of high-quality images, while minimizing the loss in diversity of the data. Through qualitative and quantitative evaluation, we demonstrate the power of our approach to new challenging and diverse domains collected from the Internet. New datasets and pre-trained models are available at https://self-distilled-stylegan.github.io/ .
summary: StyleGAN is known to produce high-fidelity images, while also offering unprecedented semantic editing. However, these fascinating abilities have been demonstrated only on a limited set of datasets, which are usually structurally aligned and well curated. In this paper, we show how StyleGAN can be adapted to work on raw uncurated images collected from the Internet. Such image collections impose two main challenges to StyleGAN: they contain many outlier images, and are characterized by a multi-modal distribution. Training StyleGAN on such raw image collections results in degraded image synthesis quality. To meet these challenges, we proposed a StyleGAN-based self-distillation approach, which consists of two main components: (i) A generative-based self-filtering of the dataset to eliminate outlier images, in order to generate an adequate training set, and (ii) Perceptual clustering of the generated images to detect the inherent data modalities, which are then employed to improve StyleGAN's "truncation trick" in the image synthesis process. The presented technique enables the generation of high-quality images, while minimizing the loss in diversity of the data. Through qualitative and quantitative evaluation, we demonstrate the power of our approach to new challenging and diverse domains collected from the Internet. New datasets and pre-trained models are available at https://self-distilled-stylegan.github.io/ .
abstract_zh: StyleGAN 以生成高保真图像而闻名，同时还提供前所未有的语义编辑。然而，这些令人着迷的能力仅在有限的数据集上得到了证明，这些数据集通常在结构上是一致的并且经过精心策划。在本文中，我们展示了如何调整 StyleGAN 来处理从互联网收集的原始未经整理的图像。此类图像集合给 StyleGAN 带来了两个主要挑战：它们包​​含许多离群图像，并且具有多模态分布的特征。在此类原始图像集合上训练 StyleGAN 会导致图像合成质量下降。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了一种基于 StyleGAN 的自蒸馏方法，该方法由两个主要部分组成：（i）基于生成的数据集自过滤以消除异常图像，以生成足够的训练集；（ii）对生成的图像进行感知聚类以检测固有的数据模态，然后用于改进 StyleGAN 在图像合成过程中的“截断技巧”。所提出的技术能够生成高质量图像，同时最大限度地减少数据多样性的损失。通过定性和定量评估，我们展示了我们的方法对从互联网收集的新的具有挑战性和多样化领域的力量。新数据集和预训练模型可在 https://self-distilled-stylegan.github.io/ 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于自蒸馏的StyleGAN方法，以处理来自互联网的未经筛选的图像，生成高质量且多样化的图像。
AI.motivation: StyleGAN在结构化数据集上表现优异，但难以处理互联网上大量存在异常值和多模态分布的未筛选图像，导致生成质量下降。
AI.method: 提出两阶段自蒸馏方法：（i）通过生成模型过滤异常图像以构建高质量训练集；（ii）利用感知聚类检测数据模态，优化StyleGAN的截断技巧。
AI.result: 在多个互联网收集的复杂数据集上实现高质量图像生成，同时保持数据多样性，实验验证优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了互联网图像的多模态和异常值问题，扩展了StyleGAN在真实场景中的应用潜力。

authors_text: Kyle Hamilton,Aparna Nayak,Bojan Božić,Luca Longo
title: Is Neuro-Symbolic AI Meeting its Promise in Natural Language Processing? A Structured Review
title_zh: 神经符号人工智能是否兑现了其在自然语言处理方面的承诺？结构化审查
abstract: Advocates for Neuro-Symbolic Artificial Intelligence (NeSy) assert that combining deep learning with symbolic reasoning will lead to stronger AI than either paradigm on its own. As successful as deep learning has been, it is generally accepted that even our best deep learning systems are not very good at abstract reasoning. And since reasoning is inextricably linked to language, it makes intuitive sense that Natural Language Processing (NLP), would be a particularly well-suited candidate for NeSy. We conduct a structured review of studies implementing NeSy for NLP, with the aim of answering the question of whether NeSy is indeed meeting its promises: reasoning, out-of-distribution generalization, interpretability, learning and reasoning from small data, and transferability to new domains. We examine the impact of knowledge representation, such as rules and semantic networks, language structure and relational structure, and whether implicit or explicit reasoning contributes to higher promise scores. We find that systems where logic is compiled into the neural network lead to the most NeSy goals being satisfied, while other factors such as knowledge representation, or type of neural architecture do not exhibit a clear correlation with goals being met. We find many discrepancies in how reasoning is defined, specifically in relation to human level reasoning, which impact decisions about model architectures and drive conclusions which are not always consistent across studies. Hence we advocate for a more methodical approach to the application of theories of human reasoning as well as the development of appropriate benchmarks, which we hope can lead to a better understanding of progress in the field. We make our data and code available on github for further analysis.
summary: Advocates for Neuro-Symbolic Artificial Intelligence (NeSy) assert that combining deep learning with symbolic reasoning will lead to stronger AI than either paradigm on its own. As successful as deep learning has been, it is generally accepted that even our best deep learning systems are not very good at abstract reasoning. And since reasoning is inextricably linked to language, it makes intuitive sense that Natural Language Processing (NLP), would be a particularly well-suited candidate for NeSy. We conduct a structured review of studies implementing NeSy for NLP, with the aim of answering the question of whether NeSy is indeed meeting its promises: reasoning, out-of-distribution generalization, interpretability, learning and reasoning from small data, and transferability to new domains. We examine the impact of knowledge representation, such as rules and semantic networks, language structure and relational structure, and whether implicit or explicit reasoning contributes to higher promise scores. We find that systems where logic is compiled into the neural network lead to the most NeSy goals being satisfied, while other factors such as knowledge representation, or type of neural architecture do not exhibit a clear correlation with goals being met. We find many discrepancies in how reasoning is defined, specifically in relation to human level reasoning, which impact decisions about model architectures and drive conclusions which are not always consistent across studies. Hence we advocate for a more methodical approach to the application of theories of human reasoning as well as the development of appropriate benchmarks, which we hope can lead to a better understanding of progress in the field. We make our data and code available on github for further analysis.
abstract_zh: 神经符号人工智能（NeSy）的倡导者声称，将深度学习与符号推理相结合将产生比任何一种范式本身更强大的人工智能。尽管深度学习取得了成功，但人们普遍认为，即使是我们最好的深度学习系统也不太擅长抽象推理。由于推理与语言有着千丝万缕的联系，从直觉上看，自然语言处理 (NLP) 将是 NeSy 的特别合适的候选者。我们对 NeSy 用于 NLP 的研究进行了结构化审查，目的是回答 NeSy 是否确实兑现了其承诺：推理、分布外泛化、可解释性、从小数据学习和推理以及向新领域的可迁移性。我们研究了知识表示的影响，例如规则和语义网络、语言结构和关系结构，以及隐式或显式推理是否有助于提高承诺分数。我们发现，将逻辑编译到神经网络中的系统可以满足大多数 NeSy 目标，而其他因素（例如知识表示或神经架构类型）与满足的目标没有表现出明显的相关性。我们发现推理的定义方式存在许多差异，特别是与人类水平推理相关的差异，这会影响有关模型架构的决策并得出在研究中并不总是一致的结论。因此，我们主张采用更有条理的方法来应用人类推理理论以及制定适当的基准，我们希望这能够更好地理解该领域的进展。我们在 github 上提供数据和代码以供进一步分析。

AI.tldr: 本文通过结构化综述分析神经符号AI（NeSy）在自然语言处理中的应用，评估其是否实现预期目标，如推理、泛化能力、可解释性等。
AI.motivation: 深度学习虽在NLP中表现优异，但缺乏抽象推理能力，而符号推理能弥补这一缺陷。NeSy结合两者可能提升AI性能，但其实际效果尚需验证。
AI.method: 系统回顾NeSy在NLP中的研究，分析知识表示、语言结构、推理类型等因素对目标达成的影响，并评估不同系统设计的关联性。
AI.result: 逻辑编译入神经网络的系统最能满足NeSy目标，但知识表示形式或神经架构与目标达成无明显关联；不同研究对推理的定义存在分歧，影响结论一致性。
AI.conclusion: 需建立更系统的人类推理理论应用框架及基准测试，以推动NeSy在NLP领域的进步，并开源数据与代码供进一步研究。

We examine the impact of knowledge representation, such as rules and semantic networks, language structure and relational structure, and whether implicit or explicit reasoning contributes to higher promise scores. We find that systems where logic is compiled into the neural network lead to the most NeSy goals being satisfied, while other factors such as knowledge representation, or type of neural architecture do not exhibit a clear correlation with goals being met. We find many discrepancies in how reasoning is defined, specifically in relation to human level reasoning, which impact decisions about model architectures and drive conclusions which are not always consistent across studies. Hence we advocate for a more methodical approach to the application of theories of human reasoning as well as the development of appropriate benchmarks, which we hope can lead to a better understanding of progress in the field. We make our data and code available on github for further analysis. 神经符号人工智能（NeSy）的倡导者声称，将深度学习与符号推理相结合将产生比任何一种范式本身更强大的人工智能。尽管深度学习取得了成功，但人们普遍认为，即使是我们最好的深度学习系统也不太擅长抽象推理。由于推理与语言有着千丝万缕的联系，从直觉上看，自然语言处理 (NLP) 将是 NeSy 的特别合适的候选者。我们对 NeSy 用于 NLP 的研究进行了结构化审查，目的是回答 NeSy 是否确实兑现了其承诺：推理、分布外泛化、可解释性、从小数据学习和推理以及向新领域的可迁移性。我们研究了知识表示的影响，例如规则和语义网络、语言结构和关系结构，以及隐式或显式推理是否有助于提高承诺分数。我们发现，将逻辑编译到神经网络中的系统可以满足大多数 NeSy 目标，而其他因素（例如知识表示或神经架构类型）与满足的目标没有表现出明显的相关性。我们发现推理的定义方式存在许多差异，特别是与人类水平推理相关的差异，这会影响有关模型架构的决策并得出在研究中并不总是一致的结论。因此，我们主张采用更有条理的方法来应用人类推理理论以及制定适当的基准，我们希望这能够更好地理解该领域的进展。我们在 github 上提供数据和代码以供进一步分析。 本文通过结构化综述分析神经符号AI（NeSy）在自然语言处理中的应用，评估其是否实现预期目标，如推理、泛化能力、可解释性等。 Kyle Hamilton,Aparna Nayak,Bojan Božić,Luca Longo cs.AI,cs.CL,cs.LG

authors_text: Hriday Bavle,Jose Luis Sanchez-Lopez,Muhammad Shaheer,Javier Civera,Holger Voos
title: Situational Graphs for Robot Navigation in Structured Indoor Environments
title_zh: 结构化室内环境中机器人导航的情景图
abstract: Mobile robots should be aware of their situation, comprising the deep understanding of their surrounding environment along with the estimation of its own state, to successfully make intelligent decisions and execute tasks autonomously in real environments. 3D scene graphs are an emerging field of research that propose to represent the environment in a joint model comprising geometric, semantic and relational/topological dimensions. Although 3D scene graphs have already been combined with SLAM techniques to provide robots with situational understanding, further research is still required to effectively deploy them on-board mobile robots. To this end, we present in this paper a novel, real-time, online built Situational Graph (S-Graph), which combines in a single optimizable graph, the representation of the environment with the aforementioned three dimensions, together with the robot pose. Our method utilizes odometry readings and planar surfaces extracted from 3D LiDAR scans, to construct and optimize in real-time a three layered S-Graph that includes (1) a robot tracking layer where the robot poses are registered, (2) a metric-semantic layer with features such as planar walls and (3) our novel topological layer constraining the planar walls using higher-level features such as corridors and rooms. Our proposal does not only demonstrate state-of-the-art results for pose estimation of the robot, but also contributes with a metric-semantic-topological model of the environment
summary: Mobile robots should be aware of their situation, comprising the deep understanding of their surrounding environment along with the estimation of its own state, to successfully make intelligent decisions and execute tasks autonomously in real environments. 3D scene graphs are an emerging field of research that propose to represent the environment in a joint model comprising geometric, semantic and relational/topological dimensions. Although 3D scene graphs have already been combined with SLAM techniques to provide robots with situational understanding, further research is still required to effectively deploy them on-board mobile robots. To this end, we present in this paper a novel, real-time, online built Situational Graph (S-Graph), which combines in a single optimizable graph, the representation of the environment with the aforementioned three dimensions, together with the robot pose. Our method utilizes odometry readings and planar surfaces extracted from 3D LiDAR scans, to construct and optimize in real-time a three layered S-Graph that includes (1) a robot tracking layer where the robot poses are registered, (2) a metric-semantic layer with features such as planar walls and (3) our novel topological layer constraining the planar walls using higher-level features such as corridors and rooms. Our proposal does not only demonstrate state-of-the-art results for pose estimation of the robot, but also contributes with a metric-semantic-topological model of the environment
abstract_zh: 移动机器人应该了解自己的处境，包括对周围环境的深入了解以及对自身状态的估计，以便在真实环境中成功做出智能决策并自主执行任务。 3D 场景图是一个新兴的研究领域，它提出在包含几何、语义和关系/拓扑维度的联合模型中表示环境。尽管3D场景图已经与SLAM技术相结合，为机器人提供情境理解，但仍需要进一步研究以将其有效地部署在移动机器人上。为此，我们在本文中提出了一种新颖的、实时的、在线构建的情境图（S-Graph），它将具有上述三个维度的环境表示以及机器人姿态组合在单个可优化图中。我们的方法利用从 3D LiDAR 扫描中提取的里程计读数和平面，实时构建和优化三层 S-Graph，其中包括 (1) 注册机器人姿势的机器人跟踪层，(2) 具有平面墙壁等特征的度量语义层，以及 (3) 我们新颖的拓扑层，使用走廊和房间等更高级别的特征来约束平面墙壁。我们的建议不仅展示了机器人姿态估计的最先进结果，而且还为环境的度量语义拓扑模型做出了贡献

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种实时构建的三层情境图（S-Graph），用于增强结构化室内环境中机器人的导航能力，整合几何、语义和拓扑信息。
AI.motivation: 现有3D场景图与SLAM技术结合后仍难以有效部署于移动机器人，需更高效的在线构建方法以实现环境与机器人状态的联合建模。
AI.method: 基于里程计和3D激光雷达数据，构建包含机器人跟踪层、度量-语义层及拓扑约束层的三层S-Graph，实时优化环境与机器人姿态的联合表示。
AI.result: 在机器人定位任务中达到最先进水平，并提供首个融合度量-语义-拓扑的环境模型，提升结构化场景下的导航鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: S-Graph方法通过多维信息融合有效支持机器人自主导航，为复杂室内环境下的情境感知提供了新范式。

authors_text: Tasos Asonitis,Richard Allmendinger,Matt Benatan,Ricardo Climent
title: SonOpt: Sonifying Bi-objective Population-Based Optimization Algorithms
title_zh: SonOpt：可听化双目标基于群体的优化算法
abstract: We propose SonOpt, the first (open source) data sonification application for monitoring the progress of bi-objective population-based optimization algorithms during search, to facilitate algorithm understanding. SonOpt provides insights into convergence/stagnation of search, the evolution of the approximation set shape, location of recurring points in the approximation set, and population diversity. The benefits of data sonification have been shown for various non-optimization related monitoring tasks. However, very few attempts have been made in the context of optimization and their focus has been exclusively on single-objective problems. In comparison, SonOpt is designed for bi-objective optimization problems, relies on objective function values of non-dominated solutions only, and is designed with the user (listener) in mind; avoiding convolution of multiple sounds and prioritising ease of familiarizing with the system. This is achieved using two sonification paths relying on the concepts of wavetable and additive synthesis. This paper motivates and describes the architecture of SonOpt, and then validates SonOpt for two popular multi-objective optimization algorithms (NSGA-II and MOEA/D). Experience SonOpt yourself via https://github.com/tasos-a/SonOpt-1.0 .
summary: We propose SonOpt, the first (open source) data sonification application for monitoring the progress of bi-objective population-based optimization algorithms during search, to facilitate algorithm understanding. SonOpt provides insights into convergence/stagnation of search, the evolution of the approximation set shape, location of recurring points in the approximation set, and population diversity. The benefits of data sonification have been shown for various non-optimization related monitoring tasks. However, very few attempts have been made in the context of optimization and their focus has been exclusively on single-objective problems. In comparison, SonOpt is designed for bi-objective optimization problems, relies on objective function values of non-dominated solutions only, and is designed with the user (listener) in mind; avoiding convolution of multiple sounds and prioritising ease of familiarizing with the system. This is achieved using two sonification paths relying on the concepts of wavetable and additive synthesis. This paper motivates and describes the architecture of SonOpt, and then validates SonOpt for two popular multi-objective optimization algorithms (NSGA-II and MOEA/D). Experience SonOpt yourself via https://github.com/tasos-a/SonOpt-1.0 .
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 SonOpt，这是第一个（开源）数据声音化应用程序，用于在搜索过程中监控基于双目标群体的优化算法的进度，以促进算法理解。 SonOpt 提供了对搜索收敛/停滞、近似集形状的演变、近似集中重复点的位置以及群体多样性的见解。数据超声处理的优势已在各种非优化相关的监控任务中得到体现。然而，在优化方面的尝试很少，而且他们的重点仅集中在单目标问题上。相比之下，SonOpt 是为双目标优化问题而设计的，仅依赖于非支配解的目标函数值，并且在设计时考虑了用户（听众）；避免多个声音的卷积并优先考虑易于熟悉系统。这是通过依赖波表和加法合成概念的两个超声路径来实现的。本文激发并描述了 SonOpt 的架构，然后针对两种流行的多目标优化算法（NSGA-II 和 MOEA/D）验证了 SonOpt。通过 https://github.com/tasos-a/SonOpt-1.0 亲自体验 SonOpt。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SonOpt，一种用于监控双目标种群优化算法搜索过程的数据声学化应用，旨在提升算法理解。
AI.motivation: 现有声学化技术多用于非优化任务且侧重单目标问题，缺乏针对双目标优化算法的用户友好型监控工具。
AI.method: 基于波表合成与加法合成技术，通过非支配解的目标函数值构建双声学化路径，避免声音混杂并强调用户熟悉度。
AI.result: 在NSGA-II和MOEA/D算法中验证SonOpt有效性，可监控收敛性、近似集演化及种群多样性等关键信息。
AI.conclusion: SonOpt为双目标优化算法提供了创新的声学化监控方案，开源设计便于实际应用与进一步研究。

authors_text: Zi-Hao Qiu,Quanqi Hu,Yongjian Zhong,Lijun Zhang,Tianbao Yang
title: Large-scale Stochastic Optimization of NDCG Surrogates for Deep Learning with Provable Convergence
title_zh: 用于深度学习的 NDCG 替代物的大规模随机优化，具有可证明的收敛性
abstract: NDCG, namely Normalized Discounted Cumulative Gain, is a widely used ranking metric in information retrieval and machine learning. However, efficient and provable stochastic methods for maximizing NDCG are still lacking, especially for deep models. In this paper, we propose a principled approach to optimize NDCG and its top-$K$ variant. First, we formulate a novel compositional optimization problem for optimizing the NDCG surrogate, and a novel bilevel compositional optimization problem for optimizing the top-$K$ NDCG surrogate. Then, we develop efficient stochastic algorithms with provable convergence guarantees for the non-convex objectives. Different from existing NDCG optimization methods, the per-iteration complexity of our algorithms scales with the mini-batch size instead of the number of total items. To improve the effectiveness for deep learning, we further propose practical strategies by using initial warm-up and stop gradient operator. Experimental results on multiple datasets demonstrate that our methods outperform prior ranking approaches in terms of NDCG. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first time that stochastic algorithms are proposed to optimize NDCG with a provable convergence guarantee. Our proposed methods are implemented in the LibAUC library at https://libauc.org/.

Our proposed methods are implemented in the LibAUC library at https://libauc.org/.
abstract_zh: NDCG，即归一化贴现累积增益，是信息检索和机器学习中广泛使用的排名指标。然而，仍然缺乏有效且可证明的最大化 NDCG 的随机方法，特别是对于深度模型。在本文中，我们提出了一种优化 NDCG 及其 top-$K$ 变体的原则方法。首先，我们制定了一个用于优化 NDCG 代理的新颖的组合优化问题，以及一个用于优化 top-$K$ NDCG 代理的新颖的双层组合优化问题。然后，我们开发高效的随机算法，并为非凸目标提供可证明的收敛保证。与现有的 NDCG 优化方法不同，我们算法的每次迭代复杂度与小批量大小而不是总项目数成比例。为了提高深度学习的有效性，我们通过使用初始预热和停止梯度算子进一步提出了实用策略。多个数据集上的实验结果表明，我们的方法在 NDCG 方面优于先前的排名方法。据我们所知，这是第一次提出随机算法来优化 NDCG，并提供可证明的收敛保证。我们提出的方法在 LibAUC 库（https://libauc.org/）中实现。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于深度学习的可证明收敛的随机优化方法，以优化NDCG及其top-K变体。
AI.motivation: NDCG是信息检索中的重要指标，但现有方法缺乏高效且具有理论保证的随机优化算法，尤其在深度模型中存在挑战。
AI.method: 通过构建复合优化和双层复合优化问题，设计了具有可证明收敛性的随机算法，并引入预热阶段和停止梯度操作以提升深度学习效果。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上实验验证，所提方法在NDCG指标上优于现有排名方法，且为首次提出具有收敛性保证的随机优化算法。
AI.conclusion: 本文首次实现了具有可证明收敛性的NDCG随机优化算法，为深度学习排名任务提供了有效解决方案。

search_text: Large-scale Stochastic Optimization of NDCG Surrogates for Deep Learning with Provable Convergence 用于深度学习的 NDCG 替代物的大规模随机优化，具有可证明的收敛性 NDCG, namely Normalized Discounted Cumulative Gain, is a widely used ranking metric in information retrieval and machine learning. However, efficient and provable stochastic methods for maximizing NDCG are still lacking, especially for deep models. In this paper, we propose a principled approach to optimize NDCG and its top-$K$ variant. First, we formulate a novel compositional optimization problem for optimizing the NDCG surrogate, and a novel bilevel compositional optimization problem for optimizing the top-$K$ NDCG surrogate. Then, we develop efficient stochastic algorithms with provable convergence guarantees for the non-convex objectives. Different from existing NDCG optimization methods, the per-iteration complexity of our algorithms scales with the mini-batch size instead of the number of total items. To improve the effectiveness for deep learning, we further propose practical strategies by using initial warm-up and stop gradient operator. Experimental results on multiple datasets demonstrate that our methods outperform prior ranking approaches in terms of NDCG. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first time that stochastic algorithms are proposed to optimize NDCG with a provable convergence guarantee. Our proposed methods are implemented in the LibAUC library at https://libauc.org/. authors_text: Xinlong Wang,Zhiding Yu,Shalini De Mello,Jan Kautz,Anima Anandkumar,Chunhua Shen,Jose M. Alvarez
title: FreeSOLO: Learning to Segment Objects without Annotations
title_zh: FreeSOLO：学习在没有注释的情况下分割对象
comment: 13 pages. Accepted to IEEE/CVF Conf. Comp. Vision Pattern Recognition (CVPR) 2022
comments: 13 pages. Accepted to IEEE/CVF Conf. Comp. Vision Pattern Recognition (CVPR) 2022
abstract: Instance segmentation is a fundamental vision task that aims to recognize and segment each object in an image. However, it requires costly annotations such as bounding boxes and segmentation masks for learning. In this work, we propose a fully unsupervised learning method that learns class-agnostic instance segmentation without any annotations. We present FreeSOLO, a self-supervised instance segmentation framework built on top of the simple instance segmentation method SOLO. Our method also presents a novel localization-aware pre-training framework, where objects can be discovered from complicated scenes in an unsupervised manner. FreeSOLO achieves 9.8% AP_{50} on the challenging COCO dataset, which even outperforms several segmentation proposal methods that use manual annotations. For the first time, we demonstrate unsupervised class-agnostic instance segmentation successfully. FreeSOLO's box localization significantly outperforms state-of-the-art unsupervised object detection/discovery methods, with about 100% relative improvements in COCO AP. FreeSOLO further demonstrates superiority as a strong pre-training method, outperforming state-of-the-art self-supervised pre-training methods by +9.8% AP when fine-tuning instance segmentation with only 5% COCO masks. Code is available at: github.com/NVlabs/FreeSOLO
summary: Instance segmentation is a fundamental vision task that aims to recognize and segment each object in an image. However, it requires costly annotations such as bounding boxes and segmentation masks for learning. In this work, we propose a fully unsupervised learning method that learns class-agnostic instance segmentation without any annotations. We present FreeSOLO, a self-supervised instance segmentation framework built on top of the simple instance segmentation method SOLO. Our method also presents a novel localization-aware pre-training framework, where objects can be discovered from complicated scenes in an unsupervised manner. FreeSOLO achieves 9.8% AP_{50} on the challenging COCO dataset, which even outperforms several segmentation proposal methods that use manual annotations. For the first time, we demonstrate unsupervised class-agnostic instance segmentation successfully. FreeSOLO's box localization significantly outperforms state-of-the-art unsupervised object detection/discovery methods, with about 100% relative improvements in COCO AP. FreeSOLO further demonstrates superiority as a strong pre-training method, outperforming state-of-the-art self-supervised pre-training methods by +9.8% AP when fine-tuning instance segmentation with only 5% COCO masks. Code is available at: github.com/NVlabs/FreeSOLO
abstract_zh: 实例分割是一项基本的视觉任务，旨在识别和分割图像中的每个对象。然而，它需要昂贵的注释，例如用于学习的边界框和分割掩模。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种完全无监督的学习方法，可以在没有任何注释的情况下学习与类无关的实例分割。我们提出了 FreeSOLO，这是一个建立在简单实例分割方法 SOLO 之上的自监督实例分割框架。我们的方法还提出了一种新颖的本地化感知预训练框架，可以以无监督的方式从复杂的场景中发现对象。 FreeSOLO 在具有挑战性的 COCO 数据集上实现了 9.8% AP_{50}，甚至优于几种使用手动注释的分割建议方法。我们第一次成功地演示了无监督的与类无关的实例分割。 FreeSOLO 的框定位显着优于最先进的无监督对象检测/发现方法，与 COCO AP 相比大约有 100% 的相对改进。 FreeSOLO 进一步展示了作为强大的预训练方法的优越性，当仅使用 5% COCO 掩模微调实例分割时，其性能比最先进的自监督预训练方法高出 +9.8% AP。代码位于：github.com/NVlabs/FreeSOLO

AI.tldr: 本文提出FreeSOLO，一种无需标注的类不可知实例分割方法，通过自监督学习实现复杂场景中的对象发现。
AI.motivation: 传统实例分割依赖昂贵的标注数据（如边界框和分割掩码），而本文旨在消除对人工标注的依赖，实现完全无监督的学习。
AI.method: 基于SOLO框架构建自监督实例分割框架FreeSOLO，引入定位感知预训练机制，通过无监督方式从复杂场景中发现对象。
AI.result: 在COCO数据集上达到9.8% AP50，超越部分使用人工标注的分割提案方法，且在仅使用5%标注数据微调时优于现有自监督预训练方法+9.8% AP。
AI.conclusion: FreeSOLO首次成功实现无监督类不可知实例分割，其定位能力显著优于现有方法，并证明了其作为强预训练模型的有效性。

authors_text: Hans Hohenfeld,Dirk Heimann,Felix Wiebe,Frank Kirchner
title: Quantum Deep Reinforcement Learning for Robot Navigation Tasks
title_zh: 用于机器人导航任务的量子深度强化学习
comment: 22 pages, 14 figure. Accepeted for publication in IEEE Access
comments: 22 pages, 14 figure. Accepeted for publication in IEEE Access
abstract: We utilize hybrid quantum deep reinforcement learning to learn navigation tasks for a simple, wheeled robot in simulated environments of increasing complexity. For this, we train parameterized quantum circuits (PQCs) with two different encoding strategies in a hybrid quantum-classical setup as well as a classical neural network baseline with the double deep Q network (DDQN) reinforcement learning algorithm. Quantum deep reinforcement learning (QDRL) has previously been studied in several relatively simple benchmark environments, mainly from the OpenAI gym suite. However, scaling behavior and applicability of QDRL to more demanding tasks closer to real-world problems e. g., from the robotics domain, have not been studied previously. Here, we show that quantum circuits in hybrid quantum-classic reinforcement learning setups are capable of learning optimal policies in multiple robotic navigation scenarios with notably fewer trainable parameters compared to a classical baseline. Across a large number of experimental configurations, we find that the employed quantum circuits outperform the classical neural network baselines when equating for the number of trainable parameters. Yet, the classical neural network consistently showed better results concerning training times and stability, with at least one order of magnitude of trainable parameters more than the best-performing quantum circuits. However, validating the robustness of the learning methods in a large and dynamic environment, we find that the classical baseline produces more stable and better performing policies overall.
summary: We utilize hybrid quantum deep reinforcement learning to learn navigation tasks for a simple, wheeled robot in simulated environments of increasing complexity. For this, we train parameterized quantum circuits (PQCs) with two different encoding strategies in a hybrid quantum-classical setup as well as a classical neural network baseline with the double deep Q network (DDQN) reinforcement learning algorithm. Quantum deep reinforcement learning (QDRL) has previously been studied in several relatively simple benchmark environments, mainly from the OpenAI gym suite. However, scaling behavior and applicability of QDRL to more demanding tasks closer to real-world problems e. g., from the robotics domain, have not been studied previously. Here, we show that quantum circuits in hybrid quantum-classic reinforcement learning setups are capable of learning optimal policies in multiple robotic navigation scenarios with notably fewer trainable parameters compared to a classical baseline. Across a large number of experimental configurations, we find that the employed quantum circuits outperform the classical neural network baselines when equating for the number of trainable parameters. Yet, the classical neural network consistently showed better results concerning training times and stability, with at least one order of magnitude of trainable parameters more than the best-performing quantum circuits. However, validating the robustness of the learning methods in a large and dynamic environment, we find that the classical baseline produces more stable and better performing policies overall.
abstract_zh: 我们利用混合量子深度强化学习来学习简单轮式机器人在日益复杂的模拟环境中的导航任务。为此，我们在混合量子经典设置中使用两种不同的编码策略来训练参数化量子电路（PQC），并使用双深度 Q 网络（DDQN）强化学习算法来训练经典神经网络基线。量子深度强化学习（QDRL）之前已经在几个相对简单的基准环境中进行了研究，主要来自 OpenAI 健身房套件。然而，QDRL 的扩展行为和适用性对更接近现实世界问题的更苛刻任务的适用性。 g.，来自机器人领域，以前没有被研究过。在这里，我们表明，混合量子经典强化学习设置中的量子电路能够在多个机器人导航场景中学习最优策略，与经典基线相比，可训练参数明显更少。在大量的实验配置中，我们发现当可训练参数的数量相等时，所使用的量子电路优于经典神经网络基线。然而，经典神经网络在训练时间和稳定性方面始终表现出更好的结果，可训练参数比性能最佳的量子电路至少多一个数量级。然而，在大型动态环境中验证学习方法的稳健性时，我们发现经典基线总体上产生更稳定、性能更好的策略。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了量子深度强化学习在机器人导航任务中的应用，通过对比量子和经典方法的性能。
AI.motivation: 尽管量子深度强化学习（QDRL）在一些简单基准环境中已被研究，但其在更复杂的现实任务中的适用性和扩展性尚未得到充分验证。
AI.method: 作者使用混合量子-经典强化学习框架，训练参数化量子电路（PQCs）并采用两种编码策略，同时使用经典双深度Q网络（DDQN）作为基线进行对比。
AI.result: 在多个机器人导航场景中，量子电路在较少可训练参数的情况下表现出优于经典基线的性能，但经典神经网络在训练时间、稳定性以及参数数量上表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 量子电路在参数效率上优于经典方法，但在训练稳定性与实际应用中仍需进一步优化，经典方法在复杂动态环境中更具优势。

search_text: Quantum Deep Reinforcement Learning for Robot Navigation Tasks 用于机器人导航任务的量子深度强化学习 We utilize hybrid quantum deep reinforcement learning to learn navigation tasks for a simple, wheeled robot in simulated environments of increasing complexity. For this, we train parameterized quantum circuits (PQCs) with two different encoding strategies in a hybrid quantum-classical setup as well as a classical neural network baseline with the double deep Q network (DDQN) reinforcement learning algorithm. Quantum deep reinforcement learning (QDRL) has previously been studied in several relatively simple benchmark environments, mainly from the OpenAI gym suite. However, scaling behavior and applicability of QDRL to more demanding tasks closer to real-world problems e. g., from the robotics domain, have not been studied previously. Here, we show that quantum circuits in hybrid quantum-classic reinforcement learning setups are capable of learning optimal policies in multiple robotic navigation scenarios with notably fewer trainable parameters compared to a classical baseline. Across a large number of experimental configurations, we find that the employed quantum circuits outperform the classical neural network baselines when equating for the number of trainable parameters. Yet, the classical neural network consistently showed better results concerning training times and stability, with at least one order of magnitude of trainable parameters more than the best-performing quantum circuits. However, validating the robustness of the learning methods in a large and dynamic environment, we find that the classical baseline produces more stable and better performing policies overall. 我们利用混合量子深度强化学习来学习简单轮式机器人在日益复杂的模拟环境中的导航任务。为此，我们在混合量子经典设置中使用两种不同的编码策略来训练参数化量子电路（PQC），并使用双深度 Q 网络（DDQN）强化学习算法来训练经典神经网络基线。量子深度强化学习（QDRL）之前已经在几个相对简单的基准环境中进行了研究，主要来自 OpenAI 健身房套件。然而，QDRL 的扩展行为和适用性对更接近现实世界问题的更苛刻任务的适用性。 g.，来自机器人领域，以前没有被研究过。在这里，我们表明，混合量子经典强化学习设置中的量子电路能够在多个机器人导航场景中学习最优策略，与经典基线相比，可训练参数明显更少。在大量的实验配置中，我们发现当可训练参数的数量相等时，所使用的量子电路优于经典神经网络基线。然而，经典神经网络在训练时间和稳定性方面始终表现出更好的结果，可训练参数比性能最佳的量子电路至少多一个数量级。然而，在大型动态环境中验证学习方法的稳健性时，我们发现经典基线总体上产生更稳定、性能更好的策略。 本文研究了量子深度强化学习在机器人导航任务中的应用，通过对比量子和经典方法的性能。 Hans Hohenfeld,Dirk Heimann,Felix Wiebe,Frank Kirchner cs.RO,cs.LG,quant-ph

authors_text: Yunfan Ren,Fangcheng Zhu,Wenyi Liu,Zhepei Wang,Yi Lin,Fei Gao,Fu Zhang
title: Bubble Planner: Planning High-speed Smooth Quadrotor Trajectories using Receding Corridors
title_zh: Bubble Planner：使用后退走廊规划高速平滑四旋翼飞行器轨迹
abstract: Quadrotors are agile platforms. With human experts, they can perform extremely high-speed flights in cluttered environments. However, fully autonomous flight at high speed remains a significant challenge. In this work, we propose a motion planning algorithm based on the corridor-constrained minimum control effort trajectory optimization (MINCO) framework. Specifically, we use a series of overlapping spheres to represent the free space of the environment and propose two novel designs that enable the algorithm to plan high-speed quadrotor trajectories in real-time. One is a sampling-based corridor generation method that generates spheres with large overlapped areas (hence overall corridor size) between two neighboring spheres. The second is a Receding Horizon Corridors (RHC) strategy, where part of the previously generated corridor is reused in each replan. Together, these two designs enlarge the corridor spaces in accordance with the quadrotor's current state and hence allow the quadrotor to maneuver at high speeds. We benchmark our algorithm against other state-of-the-art planning methods to show its superiority in simulation. Comprehensive ablation studies are also conducted to show the necessity of the two designs. The proposed method is finally evaluated on an autonomous LiDAR-navigated quadrotor UAV in woods environments, achieving flight speeds over 13.7 m/s without any prior map of the environment or external localization facility.
summary: Quadrotors are agile platforms. With human experts, they can perform extremely high-speed flights in cluttered environments. However, fully autonomous flight at high speed remains a significant challenge. In this work, we propose a motion planning algorithm based on the corridor-constrained minimum control effort trajectory optimization (MINCO) framework. Specifically, we use a series of overlapping spheres to represent the free space of the environment and propose two novel designs that enable the algorithm to plan high-speed quadrotor trajectories in real-time. One is a sampling-based corridor generation method that generates spheres with large overlapped areas (hence overall corridor size) between two neighboring spheres. The second is a Receding Horizon Corridors (RHC) strategy, where part of the previously generated corridor is reused in each replan. Together, these two designs enlarge the corridor spaces in accordance with the quadrotor's current state and hence allow the quadrotor to maneuver at high speeds. We benchmark our algorithm against other state-of-the-art planning methods to show its superiority in simulation. Comprehensive ablation studies are also conducted to show the necessity of the two designs. The proposed method is finally evaluated on an autonomous LiDAR-navigated quadrotor UAV in woods environments, achieving flight speeds over 13.7 m/s without any prior map of the environment or external localization facility.
abstract_zh: 四旋翼飞行器是灵活的平台。在人类专家的帮助下，它们可以在杂乱的环境中执行极高速的飞行。然而，高速完全自主飞行仍然是一个重大挑战。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于走廊约束最小控制努力轨迹优化（MINCO）框架的运动规划算法。具体来说，我们使用一系列重叠的球体来表示环境的自由空间，并提出了两种新颖的设计，使算法能够实时规划高速四旋翼飞行器轨迹。一种是基于采样的走廊生成方法，该方法在两个相邻球体之间生成具有大重叠区域（因此整体走廊尺寸）的球体。第二种是后退地平线走廊 (RHC) 策略，其中先前生成的走廊的一部分在每次重新规划中重复使用。这两种设计结合在一起，根据四旋翼飞行器的当前状态扩大了走廊空间，从而允许四旋翼飞行器高速机动。我们将我们的算法与其他最先进的规划方法进行基准测试，以显示其在模拟方面的优越性。还进行了全面的消融研究以证明这两种设计的必要性。所提出的方法最终在树林环境中的自主 LiDAR 导航四旋翼无人机上进行了评估，在没有任何事先环境地图或外部定位设施的情况下实现了超过 13.7 m/s 的飞行速度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于走廊约束的最小控制努力轨迹优化框架，用于规划高速四旋翼飞行器的轨迹。
AI.motivation: 四旋翼飞行器在复杂环境中能够高速飞行，但实现完全自主的高速飞行仍是一个挑战。因此，需要一种能够实时规划高速轨迹的算法。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种基于走廊约束的最小控制努力轨迹优化（MINCO）框架，包括基于采样的走廊生成方法和滑动窗口走廊（RHC）策略，以实现实时高速轨迹规划。
AI.result: 该算法在仿真中优于其他先进方法，并在无地图和外部定位设备的情况下，实现了在森林环境中的自主LiDAR导航四旋翼飞行器，飞行速度超过13.7 m/s。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的算法能够有效规划高速四旋翼飞行器的轨迹，适用于复杂环境下的自主飞行任务。

authors_text: Alain Andres,Esther Villar-Rodriguez,Javier Del Ser
title: Collaborative Training of Heterogeneous Reinforcement Learning Agents in Environments with Sparse Rewards: What and When to Share?
title_zh: 稀疏奖励环境中异构强化学习代理的协作训练：共享什么以及何时共享？
abstract: In the early stages of human life, babies develop their skills by exploring different scenarios motivated by their inherent satisfaction rather than by extrinsic rewards from the environment. This behavior, referred to as intrinsic motivation, has emerged as one solution to address the exploration challenge derived from reinforcement learning environments with sparse rewards. Diverse exploration approaches have been proposed to accelerate the learning process over single- and multi-agent problems with homogeneous agents. However, scarce studies have elaborated on collaborative learning frameworks between heterogeneous agents deployed into the same environment, but interacting with different instances of the latter without any prior knowledge. Beyond the heterogeneity, each agent's characteristics grant access only to a subset of the full state space, which may hide different exploration strategies and optimal solutions. In this work we combine ideas from intrinsic motivation and transfer learning. Specifically, we focus on sharing parameters in actor-critic model architectures and on combining information obtained through intrinsic motivation with the aim of having a more efficient exploration and faster learning. We test our strategies through experiments performed over a modified ViZDooM's My Way Home scenario, which is more challenging than its original version and allows evaluating the heterogeneity between agents. Our results reveal different ways in which a collaborative framework with little additional computational cost can outperform an independent learning process without knowledge sharing. Additionally, we depict the need for modulating correctly the importance between the extrinsic and intrinsic rewards to avoid undesired agent behaviors.

This behavior, referred to as intrinsic motivation, has emerged as one solution to address the exploration challenge derived from reinforcement learning environments with sparse rewards. In this work we combine ideas from intrinsic motivation and transfer learning. Specifically, we focus on sharing parameters in actor-critic model architectures and on combining information obtained through intrinsic motivation with the aim of having a more efficient exploration and faster learning. Our results reveal different ways in which a collaborative framework with little additional computational cost can outperform an independent learning process without knowledge sharing. Additionally, we depict the need for modulating correctly the importance between the extrinsic and intrinsic rewards to avoid undesired agent behaviors.
abstract_zh: 在人类生命的早期阶段，婴儿通过探索不同的场景来发展他们的技能，这些场景的动机是他们内在的满足感，而不是环境的外在奖励。这种行为被称为内在动机，已成为解决奖励稀疏的强化学习环境所带来的探索挑战的一种解决方案。人们提出了多种探索方法来加速同质智能体的单智能体和多智能体问题的学习过程。然而，很少有研究详细阐述部署到同一环境中的异构代理之间的协作学习框架，但在没有任何先验知识的情况下与后者的不同实例进行交互。除了异构性之外，每个代理的特征仅允许访问完整状态空间的子集，这可能隐藏不同的探索策略和最优解决方案。在这项工作中，我们结合了内在动机和迁移学习的想法。具体来说，我们专注于共享演员-评论家模型架构中的参数，并结合通过内在动机获得的信息，以实现更有效的探索和更快的学习。我们通过在修改后的 ViZDooM 的 My Way Home 场景上进行的实验来测试我们的策略，该场景比原始版本更具挑战性，并且允许评估代理之间的异质性。我们的结果揭示了不同的方式，其中几乎没有额外计算成本的协作框架可以超越没有知识共享的独立学习过程。此外，我们描述了正确调节外在奖励和内在奖励之间的重要性以避免不良代理行为的需要。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在稀疏奖励环境中，如何通过协作训练异构强化学习代理以提高探索效率和学习速度。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多聚焦于同质代理的探索策略，而异构代理在部分可观测状态空间下的协作学习框架尚未充分探索，需解决稀疏奖励下的有效知识共享问题。
AI.method: 结合内在动机与迁移学习，通过共享Actor-Critic模型参数，并融合内在动机获得的信息，设计协作学习框架。
AI.result: 实验表明协作框架在较低计算成本下优于独立学习，且正确调节内外在奖励权重可避免不良行为。
AI.conclusion: 异构代理协作学习需平衡知识共享与奖励权重，未来需进一步优化参数共享机制与奖励调制策略。

search_text: Collaborative Training of Heterogeneous Reinforcement Learning Agents in Environments with Sparse Rewards: What and When to Share? 稀疏奖励环境中异构强化学习代理的协作训练：共享什么以及何时共享？ In the early stages of human life, babies develop their skills by exploring different scenarios motivated by their inherent satisfaction rather than by extrinsic rewards from the environment. This behavior, referred to as intrinsic motivation, has emerged as one solution to address the exploration challenge derived from reinforcement learning environments with sparse rewards. Diverse exploration approaches have been proposed to accelerate the learning process over single- and multi-agent problems with homogeneous agents. However, scarce studies have elaborated on collaborative learning frameworks between heterogeneous agents deployed into the same environment, but interacting with different instances of the latter without any prior knowledge. Beyond the heterogeneity, each agent's characteristics grant access only to a subset of the full state space, which may hide different exploration strategies and optimal solutions. In this work we combine ideas from intrinsic motivation and transfer learning. Specifically, we focus on sharing parameters in actor-critic model architectures and on combining information obtained through intrinsic motivation with the aim of having a more efficient exploration and faster learning. We test our strategies through experiments performed over a modified ViZDooM's My Way Home scenario, which is more challenging than its original version and allows evaluating the heterogeneity between agents. Our results reveal different ways in which a collaborative framework with little additional computational cost can outperform an independent learning process without knowledge sharing. Additionally, we depict the need for modulating correctly the importance between the extrinsic and intrinsic rewards to avoid undesired agent behaviors. 在人类生命的早期阶段，婴儿通过探索不同的场景来发展他们的技能，这些场景的动机是他们内在的满足感，而不是环境的外在奖励。这种行为被称为内在动机，已成为解决奖励稀疏的强化学习环境所带来的探索挑战的一种解决方案。人们提出了多种探索方法来加速同质智能体的单智能体和多智能体问题的学习过程。然而，很少有研究详细阐述部署到同一环境中的异构代理之间的协作学习框架，但在没有任何先验知识的情况下与后者的不同实例进行交互。除了异构性之外，每个代理的特征仅允许访问完整状态空间的子集，这可能隐藏不同的探索策略和最优解决方案。在这项工作中，我们结合了内在动机和迁移学习的想法。具体来说，我们专注于共享演员-评论家模型架构中的参数，并结合通过内在动机获得的信息，以实现更有效的探索和更快的学习。我们通过在修改后的 ViZDooM 的 My Way Home 场景上进行的实验来测试我们的策略，该场景比原始版本更具挑战性，并且允许评估代理之间的异质性。我们的结果揭示了不同的方式，其中几乎没有额外计算成本的协作框架可以超越没有知识共享的独立学习过程。此外，我们描述了正确调节外在奖励和内在奖励之间的重要性以避免不良代理行为的需要。 本文研究了在稀疏奖励环境中，如何通过协作训练异构强化学习代理以提高探索效率和学习速度。 Alain Andres,Esther Villar-Rodriguez,Javier Del Ser cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Rajeev Rikhye,Quan Wang,Qiao Liang,Yanzhang He,Ian McGraw
title: Closing the Gap between Single-User and Multi-User VoiceFilter-Lite
title_zh: 缩小单用户和多用户 VoiceFilter-Lite 之间的差距
abstract: VoiceFilter-Lite is a speaker-conditioned voice separation model that plays a crucial role in improving speech recognition and speaker verification by suppressing overlapping speech from non-target speakers. However, one limitation of VoiceFilter-Lite, and other speaker-conditioned speech models in general, is that these models are usually limited to a single target speaker. This is undesirable as most smart home devices now support multiple enrolled users. In order to extend the benefits of personalization to multiple users, we previously developed an attention-based speaker selection mechanism and applied it to VoiceFilter-Lite. However, the original multi-user VoiceFilter-Lite model suffers from significant performance degradation compared with single-user models. In this paper, we devised a series of experiments to improve the multi-user VoiceFilter-Lite model. By incorporating a dual learning rate schedule and by using feature-wise linear modulation (FiLM) to condition the model with the attended speaker embedding, we successfully closed the performance gap between multi-user and single-user VoiceFilter-Lite models on single-speaker evaluations. At the same time, the new model can also be easily extended to support any number of users, and significantly outperforms our previously published model on multi-speaker evaluations.
summary: VoiceFilter-Lite is a speaker-conditioned voice separation model that plays a crucial role in improving speech recognition and speaker verification by suppressing overlapping speech from non-target speakers. However, one limitation of VoiceFilter-Lite, and other speaker-conditioned speech models in general, is that these models are usually limited to a single target speaker. This is undesirable as most smart home devices now support multiple enrolled users. In order to extend the benefits of personalization to multiple users, we previously developed an attention-based speaker selection mechanism and applied it to VoiceFilter-Lite. However, the original multi-user VoiceFilter-Lite model suffers from significant performance degradation compared with single-user models. In this paper, we devised a series of experiments to improve the multi-user VoiceFilter-Lite model. By incorporating a dual learning rate schedule and by using feature-wise linear modulation (FiLM) to condition the model with the attended speaker embedding, we successfully closed the performance gap between multi-user and single-user VoiceFilter-Lite models on single-speaker evaluations. At the same time, the new model can also be easily extended to support any number of users, and significantly outperforms our previously published model on multi-speaker evaluations.
abstract_zh: VoiceFilter-Lite 是一种以说话人为条件的语音分离模型，通过抑制非目标说话人的重叠语音，在改进语音识别和说话人验证方面发挥着至关重要的作用。然而，VoiceFilter-Lite 和其他说话人调节语音模型的一个局限性是，这些模型通常仅限于单个目标说话人。这是不可取的，因为大多数智能家居设备现在支持多个注册用户。为了将个性化的好处扩展到多个用户，我们之前开发了一种基于注意力的说话人选择机制并将其应用于 VoiceFilter-Lite。然而，与单用户模型相比，原始的多用户 VoiceFilter-Lite 模型的性能明显下降。在本文中，我们设计了一系列实验来改进多用户 VoiceFilter-Lite 模型。通过结合双学习率计划并使用特征线性调制 (FiLM) 来调节具有有人值守的说话人嵌入的模型，我们成功地缩小了多用户和单用户 VoiceFilter-Lite 模型在单说话人评估中的性能差距。同时，新模型还可以轻松扩展以支持任意数量的用户，并且在多说话人评估方面显着优于我们之前发布的模型。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在改进多用户VoiceFilter-Lite模型，缩小其与单用户模型的性能差距。
AI.motivation: 现有VoiceFilter-Lite模型仅支持单用户语音分离，无法满足智能家居多用户需求，且多用户模型存在显著性能下降问题。
AI.method: 引入双学习率调度策略，并采用特征级线性调制（FiLM）结合注意力机制的说话人嵌入条件化方法。
AI.result: 成功消除单用户与多用户模型的性能差距，在单说话人测试中表现持平，多说话人测试中显著优于原有模型。
AI.conclusion: 新方法有效解决了多用户语音分离的性能瓶颈，模型可灵活扩展支持任意数量用户。
