authors_text: Kelei He,Chen Gan,Zhuoyuan Li,Islem Rekik,Zihao Yin,Wen Ji,Yang Gao,Qian Wang,Junfeng Zhang,Dinggang Shen
title: Transformers in Medical Image Analysis: A Review
title_zh: 医学图像分析中的变革：回顾
abstract: Transformers have dominated the field of natural language processing, and recently impacted the computer vision area. In the field of medical image analysis, Transformers have also been successfully applied to full-stack clinical applications, including image synthesis/reconstruction, registration, segmentation, detection, and diagnosis. Our paper aims to promote awareness and application of Transformers in the field of medical image analysis. Specifically, we first overview the core concepts of the attention mechanism built into Transformers and other basic components. Second, we review various Transformer architectures tailored for medical image applications and discuss their limitations. Within this review, we investigate key challenges revolving around the use of Transformers in different learning paradigms, improving the model efficiency, and their coupling with other techniques. We hope this review can give a comprehensive picture of Transformers to the readers in the field of medical image analysis.
summary: Transformers have dominated the field of natural language processing, and recently impacted the computer vision area. In the field of medical image analysis, Transformers have also been successfully applied to full-stack clinical applications, including image synthesis/reconstruction, registration, segmentation, detection, and diagnosis. Our paper aims to promote awareness and application of Transformers in the field of medical image analysis. Specifically, we first overview the core concepts of the attention mechanism built into Transformers and other basic components. Second, we review various Transformer architectures tailored for medical image applications and discuss their limitations. Within this review, we investigate key challenges revolving around the use of Transformers in different learning paradigms, improving the model efficiency, and their coupling with other techniques. We hope this review can give a comprehensive picture of Transformers to the readers in the field of medical image analysis.
abstract_zh: Transformer 主导了自然语言处理领域，最近还影响了计算机视觉领域。在医学图像分析领域，Transformers也成功应用于全栈临床应用，包括图像合成/重建、配准、分割、检测和诊断。我们的论文旨在提高 Transformers 在医学图像分析领域的认识和应用。具体来说，我们首先概述 Transformer 和其他基本组件中内置的注意力机制的核心概念。其次，我们回顾了为医学图像应用量身定制的各种 Transformer 架构，并讨论了它们的局限性。在这篇综述中，我们研究了围绕在不同学习范式中使用 Transformer、提高模型效率以及它们与其他技术的耦合的关键挑战。我们希望这篇综述能让医学图像分析领域的读者对变形金刚有一个全面的了解。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了Transformers在医学图像分析领域的应用，涵盖图像合成、分割、检测等任务，并探讨其挑战与改进方向。
AI.motivation: Transformers在医学图像分析中展现出巨大潜力，但缺乏系统性总结，需明确其核心机制、架构差异及应用限制。
AI.method: 通过概述Transformer的注意力机制核心概念，回顾针对医学图像的专用架构，分析不同学习范式下的挑战及效率优化方法。
AI.result: 全面梳理了Transformers在医学图像分析中的技术进展，明确了当前模型效率、跨模态融合等关键问题。
AI.conclusion: Transformers为医学图像分析提供新思路，未来需聚焦模型轻量化、多模态整合及临床验证以推动实际应用。

search_text: Transformers in Medical Image Analysis: A Review 医学图像分析中的变革：回顾 Transformers have dominated the field of natural language processing, and recently impacted the computer vision area. In the field of medical image analysis, Transformers have also been successfully applied to full-stack clinical applications, including image synthesis/reconstruction, registration, segmentation, detection, and diagnosis. Our paper aims to promote awareness and application of Transformers in the field of medical image analysis. Specifically, we first overview the core concepts of the attention mechanism built into Transformers and other basic components. Second, we review various Transformer architectures tailored for medical image applications and discuss their limitations. Within this review, we investigate key challenges revolving around the use of Transformers in different learning paradigms, improving the model efficiency, and their coupling with other techniques. We hope this review can give a comprehensive picture of Transformers to the readers in the field of medical image analysis. Transformer 主导了自然语言处理领域，最近还影响了计算机视觉领域。在医学图像分析领域，Transformers也成功应用于全栈临床应用，包括图像合成/重建、配准、分割、检测和诊断。我们的论文旨在提高 Transformers 在医学图像分析领域的认识和应用。具体来说，我们首先概述 Transformer 和其他基本组件中内置的注意力机制的核心概念。其次，我们回顾了为医学图像应用量身定制的各种 Transformer 架构，并讨论了它们的局限性。在这篇综述中，我们研究了围绕在不同学习范式中使用 Transformer、提高模型效率以及它们与其他技术的耦合的关键挑战。我们希望这篇综述能让医学图像分析领域的读者对变形金刚有一个全面的了解。 本文综述了Transformers在医学图像分析领域的应用，涵盖图像合成、分割、检测等任务，并探讨其挑战与改进方向。 Kelei He,Chen Gan,Zhuoyuan Li,Islem Rekik,Zihao Yin,Wen Ji,Yang Gao,Qian Wang,Junfeng Zhang,Dinggang Shen cs.CV

authors_text: Quan Wang,Yang Yu,Jason Pelecanos,Yiling Huang,Ignacio Lopez Moreno
title: Attentive Temporal Pooling for Conformer-based Streaming Language Identification in Long-form Speech
title_zh: 用于长篇语音中基于一致性的流式语言识别的注意力时间池
abstract: In this paper, we introduce a novel language identification system based on conformer layers. We propose an attentive temporal pooling mechanism to allow the model to carry information in long-form audio via a recurrent form, such that the inference can be performed in a streaming fashion. Additionally, we investigate two domain adaptation approaches to allow adapting an existing language identification model without retraining the model parameters for a new domain. We perform a comparative study of different model topologies under different constraints of model size, and find that conformer-based models significantly outperform LSTM and transformer based models. Our experiments also show that attentive temporal pooling and domain adaptation improve model accuracy.
summary: In this paper, we introduce a novel language identification system based on conformer layers. We propose an attentive temporal pooling mechanism to allow the model to carry information in long-form audio via a recurrent form, such that the inference can be performed in a streaming fashion. Additionally, we investigate two domain adaptation approaches to allow adapting an existing language identification model without retraining the model parameters for a new domain. We perform a comparative study of different model topologies under different constraints of model size, and find that conformer-based models significantly outperform LSTM and transformer based models. Our experiments also show that attentive temporal pooling and domain adaptation improve model accuracy.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们介绍了一种基于构象层的新型语言识别系统。我们提出了一种专注的时间池机制，允许模型通过循环形式携带长格式音频中的信息，以便可以以流方式执行推理。此外，我们研究了两种领域适应方法，以允许适应现有的语言识别模型，而无需重新训练新领域的模型参数。我们对不同模型大小约束下的不同模型拓扑进行了比较研究，发现基于一致性的模型显着优于基于 LSTM 和 Transformer 的模型。我们的实验还表明，细心的时间池和域适应可以提高模型的准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于Conformer层的流式语言识别系统，用于长语音处理。
AI.motivation: 现有模型在长语音流式处理和领域适应上存在效率与准确率不足的问题。
AI.method: 设计注意力时间池化机制实现循环信息传递，并提出两种无需重训练的领域适应方法，对比不同模型结构。
AI.result: Conformer模型在模型大小受限下显著优于LSTM和Transformer，注意力池化与领域适应提升准确率。
AI.conclusion: Conformer结合注意力机制和领域适应有效提升流式语言识别性能，未来可优化模型规模。

authors_text: Spyridon Mouselinos,Henryk Michalewski,Mateusz Malinowski
title: Measuring CLEVRness: Blackbox testing of Visual Reasoning Models
title_zh: 衡量聪明度：视觉推理模型的黑盒测试
abstract: How can we measure the reasoning capabilities of intelligence systems? Visual question answering provides a convenient framework for testing the model's abilities by interrogating the model through questions about the scene. However, despite scores of various visual QA datasets and architectures, which sometimes yield even a super-human performance, the question of whether those architectures can actually reason remains open to debate. To answer this, we extend the visual question answering framework and propose the following behavioral test in the form of a two-player game. We consider black-box neural models of CLEVR. These models are trained on a diagnostic dataset benchmarking reasoning. Next, we train an adversarial player that re-configures the scene to fool the CLEVR model. We show that CLEVR models, which otherwise could perform at a human level, can easily be fooled by our agent. Our results put in doubt whether data-driven approaches can do reasoning without exploiting the numerous biases that are often present in those datasets. Finally, we also propose a controlled experiment measuring the efficiency of such models to learn and perform reasoning.
summary: How can we measure the reasoning capabilities of intelligence systems? Visual question answering provides a convenient framework for testing the model's abilities by interrogating the model through questions about the scene. However, despite scores of various visual QA datasets and architectures, which sometimes yield even a super-human performance, the question of whether those architectures can actually reason remains open to debate. To answer this, we extend the visual question answering framework and propose the following behavioral test in the form of a two-player game. We consider black-box neural models of CLEVR. These models are trained on a diagnostic dataset benchmarking reasoning. Next, we train an adversarial player that re-configures the scene to fool the CLEVR model. We show that CLEVR models, which otherwise could perform at a human level, can easily be fooled by our agent. Our results put in doubt whether data-driven approaches can do reasoning without exploiting the numerous biases that are often present in those datasets. Finally, we also propose a controlled experiment measuring the efficiency of such models to learn and perform reasoning.
abstract_zh: 我们如何衡量智能系统的推理能力？视觉问答提供了一个方便的框架，通过有关场景的问题询问模型来测试模型的能力。然而，尽管有大量各种视觉 QA 数据集和架构，有时甚至能产生超人的性能，但这些架构是否真正能够推理的问题仍然存在争议。为了回答这个问题，我们扩展了视觉问答框架，并以两人游戏的形式提出了以下行为测试。我们考虑 CLEVR 的黑盒神经模型。这些模型是根据诊断数据集基准推理进行训练的。接下来，我们训练一个对抗性玩家，重新配置场景来欺骗 CLEVR 模型。我们证明了 CLEVR 模型本来可以在人类水平上执行，但很容易被我们的智能体愚弄。我们的结果令人怀疑数据驱动的方法是否可以在不利用这些数据集中经常存在的众多偏见的情况下进行推理。最后，我们还提出了一个对照实验来衡量此类模型学习和执行推理的效率。

AI.tldr: 本文通过黑盒测试评估视觉推理模型（如CLEVR）的推理能力，提出对抗性场景重构方法检验模型是否依赖数据偏差而非真实推理。
AI.motivation: 尽管现有视觉问答模型表现优异，但其是否具备真正推理能力仍存争议，需设计更严格的测试方法验证模型行为。
AI.method: 扩展视觉问答框架，构建两人游戏测试：训练对抗性玩家通过场景重构欺骗CLEVR模型，观察其表现并设计控制实验。
AI.result: CLEVR模型在对抗场景下易被欺骗，表明其可能依赖数据集偏差而非真实推理能力，而非真正理解场景逻辑。
AI.conclusion: 数据驱动模型可能通过利用数据偏差达到高分，而非实际推理；需更严谨的评估方法区分真实推理与数据依赖性。

authors_text: Kien Do,Haripriya Harikumar,Hung Le,Dung Nguyen,Truyen Tran,Santu Rana,Dang Nguyen,Willy Susilo,Svetha Venkatesh
title: Towards Effective and Robust Neural Trojan Defenses via Input Filtering
title_zh: 通过输入过滤实现有效且强大的神经木马防御
abstract: Trojan attacks on deep neural networks are both dangerous and surreptitious. Over the past few years, Trojan attacks have advanced from using only a single input-agnostic trigger and targeting only one class to using multiple, input-specific triggers and targeting multiple classes. However, Trojan defenses have not caught up with this development. Most defense methods still make inadequate assumptions about Trojan triggers and target classes, thus, can be easily circumvented by modern Trojan attacks. To deal with this problem, we propose two novel "filtering" defenses called Variational Input Filtering (VIF) and Adversarial Input Filtering (AIF) which leverage lossy data compression and adversarial learning respectively to effectively purify potential Trojan triggers in the input at run time without making assumptions about the number of triggers/target classes or the input dependence property of triggers. In addition, we introduce a new defense mechanism called "Filtering-then-Contrasting" (FtC) which helps avoid the drop in classification accuracy on clean data caused by "filtering", and combine it with VIF/AIF to derive new defenses of this kind. Extensive experimental results and ablation studies show that our proposed defenses significantly outperform well-known baseline defenses in mitigating five advanced Trojan attacks including two recent state-of-the-art while being quite robust to small amounts of training data and large-norm triggers.
summary: Trojan attacks on deep neural networks are both dangerous and surreptitious. Over the past few years, Trojan attacks have advanced from using only a single input-agnostic trigger and targeting only one class to using multiple, input-specific triggers and targeting multiple classes. However, Trojan defenses have not caught up with this development. Most defense methods still make inadequate assumptions about Trojan triggers and target classes, thus, can be easily circumvented by modern Trojan attacks. To deal with this problem, we propose two novel "filtering" defenses called Variational Input Filtering (VIF) and Adversarial Input Filtering (AIF) which leverage lossy data compression and adversarial learning respectively to effectively purify potential Trojan triggers in the input at run time without making assumptions about the number of triggers/target classes or the input dependence property of triggers. In addition, we introduce a new defense mechanism called "Filtering-then-Contrasting" (FtC) which helps avoid the drop in classification accuracy on clean data caused by "filtering", and combine it with VIF/AIF to derive new defenses of this kind. Extensive experimental results and ablation studies show that our proposed defenses significantly outperform well-known baseline defenses in mitigating five advanced Trojan attacks including two recent state-of-the-art while being quite robust to small amounts of training data and large-norm triggers.
abstract_zh: 对深度神经网络的木马攻击既危险又隐蔽。在过去的几年中，特洛伊木马攻击已从仅使用单个与输入无关的触发器并仅针对一个类，发展到使用多个特定于输入的触发器并针对多个类。然而，特洛伊木马防御还没有跟上这一发展。大多数防御方法仍然对木马触发器和目标类别做出不充分的假设，因此很容易被现代木马攻击所规避。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了两种新颖的“过滤”防御措施，称为变分输入过滤（VIF）和对抗性输入过滤（AIF），它们分别利用有损数据压缩和对抗性学习来有效地净化运行时输入中的潜在木马触发器，而无需对触发器/目标类的数量或触发器的输入依赖属性进行假设。此外，我们引入了一种名为“过滤然后对比”（FtC）的新防御机制，有助于避免“过滤”导致的干净数据分类精度下降，并将其与 VIF/AIF 结合派生出此类新的防御。广泛的实验结果和消融研究表明，我们提出的防御措施在缓解五种高级特洛伊木马攻击（包括两种最新的最先进攻击）方面显着优于众所周知的基线防御，同时对少量训练数据和大规范触发相当稳健。

AI.tldr: 本文提出两种基于输入过滤的新型神经网络后门防御方法VIF和AIF，并结合FtC机制以提升分类准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有防御方法对后门触发器和目标类的假设不足，难以应对多触发器、多目标类的现代后门攻击。
AI.method: 通过损失数据压缩（VIF）和对抗学习（AIF）实时净化输入触发器，并引入过滤-对比（FtC）机制减少准确率下降。
AI.result: 在五种先进后门攻击（含两种最新型）中显著优于基线方法，且在小规模训练数据和大范数触发器下保持鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 输入过滤结合对比机制为后门防御提供了有效且通用的新方向。

search_text: Towards Effective and Robust Neural Trojan Defenses via Input Filtering 通过输入过滤实现有效且强大的神经木马防御 Trojan attacks on deep neural networks are both dangerous and surreptitious. Over the past few years, Trojan attacks have advanced from using only a single input-agnostic trigger and targeting only one class to using multiple, input-specific triggers and targeting multiple classes. However, Trojan defenses have not caught up with this development. Most defense methods still make inadequate assumptions about Trojan triggers and target classes, thus, can be easily circumvented by modern Trojan attacks. To deal with this problem, we propose two novel "filtering" defenses called Variational Input Filtering (VIF) and Adversarial Input Filtering (AIF) which leverage lossy data compression and adversarial learning respectively to effectively purify potential Trojan triggers in the input at run time without making assumptions about the number of triggers/target classes or the input dependence property of triggers. In addition, we introduce a new defense mechanism called "Filtering-then-Contrasting" (FtC) which helps avoid the drop in classification accuracy on clean data caused by "filtering", and combine it with VIF/AIF to derive new defenses of this kind. Extensive experimental results and ablation studies show that our proposed defenses significantly outperform well-known baseline defenses in mitigating five advanced Trojan attacks including two recent state-of-the-art while being quite robust to small amounts of training data and large-norm triggers. 对深度神经网络的木马攻击既危险又隐蔽。在过去的几年中，特洛伊木马攻击已从仅使用单个与输入无关的触发器并仅针对一个类，发展到使用多个特定于输入的触发器并针对多个类。然而，特洛伊木马防御还没有跟上这一发展。大多数防御方法仍然对木马触发器和目标类别做出不充分的假设，因此很容易被现代木马攻击所规避。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了两种新颖的“过滤”防御措施，称为变分输入过滤（VIF）和对抗性输入过滤（AIF），它们分别利用有损数据压缩和对抗性学习来有效地净化运行时输入中的潜在木马触发器，而无需对触发器/目标类的数量或触发器的输入依赖属性进行假设。此外，我们引入了一种名为“过滤然后对比”（FtC）的新防御机制，有助于避免“过滤”导致的干净数据分类精度下降，并将其与 VIF/AIF 结合派生出此类新的防御。广泛的实验结果和消融研究表明，我们提出的防御措施在缓解五种高级特洛伊木马攻击（包括两种最新的最先进攻击）方面显着优于众所周知的基线防御，同时对少量训练数据和大规范触发相当稳健。 本文提出两种基于输入过滤的新型神经网络后门防御方法VIF和AIF，并结合FtC机制以提升分类准确性。 Kien Do,Haripriya Harikumar,Hung Le,Dung Nguyen,Truyen Tran,Santu Rana,Dang Nguyen,Willy Susilo,Svetha Venkatesh cs.CR,cs.AI,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Faeze Gholamian Khah,Samaneh Mostafapour,Seyedjafar Shojaerazavi,Nouraddin Abdi-Goushbolagh,Hossein Arabi
title: A novel unsupervised covid lung lesion segmentation based on the lung tissue identification
title_zh: 一种基于肺组织识别的新型无监督新冠肺病灶分割
abstract: This study aimed to evaluate the performance of a novel unsupervised deep learning-based framework for automated infections lesion segmentation from CT images of Covid patients. In the first step, two residual networks were independently trained to identify the lung tissue for normal and Covid patients in a supervised manner. These two models, referred to as DL-Covid and DL-Norm for Covid-19 and normal patients, respectively, generate the voxel-wise probability maps for lung tissue identification. To detect Covid lesions, the CT image of the Covid patient is processed by the DL-Covid and DL-Norm models to obtain two lung probability maps. Since the DL-Norm model is not familiar with Covid infections within the lung, this model would assign lower probabilities to the lesions than the DL-Covid. Hence, the probability maps of the Covid infections could be generated through the subtraction of the two lung probability maps obtained from the DL-Covid and DL-Norm models. Manual lesion segmentation of 50 Covid-19 CT images was used to assess the accuracy of the unsupervised lesion segmentation approach. The Dice coefficients of 0.985 and 0.978 were achieved for the lung segmentation of normal and Covid patients in the external validation dataset, respectively. Quantitative results of infection segmentation by the proposed unsupervised method showed the Dice coefficient and Jaccard index of 0.67 and 0.60, respectively. Quantitative evaluation of the proposed unsupervised approach for Covid-19 infectious lesion segmentation showed relatively satisfactory results. Since this framework does not require any annotated dataset, it could be used to generate very large training samples for the supervised machine learning algorithms dedicated to noisy and/or weakly annotated datasets.
summary: This study aimed to evaluate the performance of a novel unsupervised deep learning-based framework for automated infections lesion segmentation from CT images of Covid patients. In the first step, two residual networks were independently trained to identify the lung tissue for normal and Covid patients in a supervised manner. These two models, referred to as DL-Covid and DL-Norm for Covid-19 and normal patients, respectively, generate the voxel-wise probability maps for lung tissue identification. To detect Covid lesions, the CT image of the Covid patient is processed by the DL-Covid and DL-Norm models to obtain two lung probability maps. Since the DL-Norm model is not familiar with Covid infections within the lung, this model would assign lower probabilities to the lesions than the DL-Covid. Hence, the probability maps of the Covid infections could be generated through the subtraction of the two lung probability maps obtained from the DL-Covid and DL-Norm models. Manual lesion segmentation of 50 Covid-19 CT images was used to assess the accuracy of the unsupervised lesion segmentation approach. The Dice coefficients of 0.985 and 0.978 were achieved for the lung segmentation of normal and Covid patients in the external validation dataset, respectively. Quantitative results of infection segmentation by the proposed unsupervised method showed the Dice coefficient and Jaccard index of 0.67 and 0.60, respectively. Quantitative evaluation of the proposed unsupervised approach for Covid-19 infectious lesion segmentation showed relatively satisfactory results. Since this framework does not require any annotated dataset, it could be used to generate very large training samples for the supervised machine learning algorithms dedicated to noisy and/or weakly annotated datasets.
abstract_zh: 本研究旨在评估一种新型无监督深度学习框架的性能，该框架可用于从新冠患者的 CT 图像中自动分割感染病灶。第一步，两个残差网络经过独立训练，以监督方式识别正常和新冠患者的肺组织。这两个模型分别针对 Covid-19 和正常患者称为 DL-Covid 和 DL-Norm，生成用于肺组织识别的体素概率图。为了检测Covid病灶，Covid患者的CT图像通过DL-Covid和DL-Norm模型进行处理，以获得两个肺部概率图。由于 DL-Norm 模型不熟悉肺部内的 Covid 感染，因此该模型对病变的概率比 DL-Covid 低。因此，Covid 感染的概率图可以通过从 DL-Covid 和 DL-Norm 模型获得的两个肺部概率图相减来生成。使用 50 张 Covid-19 CT 图像的手动病灶分割来评估无监督病灶分割方法的准确性。外部验证数据集中正常患者和新冠患者肺分割的 Dice 系数分别为 0.985 和 0.978。采用所提出的无监督方法进行感染分割的定量结果显示，Dice 系数和 Jaccard 指数分别为 0.67 和 0.60。对所提出的 Covid-19 感染病灶分割无监督方法的定量评估显示出相对令人满意的结果。由于该框架不需要任何带注释的数据集，因此它可用于为专用于噪声和/或弱注释数据集的监督机器学习算法生成非常大的训练样本。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于肺组织识别的无监督深度学习框架，用于自动分割新冠肺炎患者的CT图像中的感染病灶。
AI.motivation: 现有监督学习方法依赖大量标注数据，而新冠肺炎CT图像标注成本高且数据稀缺，需开发无需标注数据的分割方法。
AI.method: 训练两个残差网络（DL-Covid和DL-Norm）分别识别正常与新冠肺炎患者的肺组织，通过两者生成的概率图差值定位感染病灶。
AI.result: 肺分割Dice系数达0.985（正常）和0.978（新冠肺炎），感染分割Dice系数为0.67，Jaccard指数为0.60。
AI.conclusion: 该无监督框架无需标注数据即可实现感染分割，可为弱标注或噪声数据集生成大规模训练样本。

authors_text: Xihong Yang,Xiaochang Hu,Sihang Zhou,Xinwang Liu,En Zhu
title: Interpolation-based Contrastive Learning for Few-Label Semi-Supervised Learning
title_zh: 基于插值的少标签半监督学习对比学习
abstract: Semi-supervised learning (SSL) has long been proved to be an effective technique to construct powerful models with limited labels. In the existing literature, consistency regularization-based methods, which force the perturbed samples to have similar predictions with the original ones have attracted much attention for their promising accuracy. However, we observe that, the performance of such methods decreases drastically when the labels get extremely limited, e.g., 2 or 3 labels for each category. Our empirical study finds that the main problem lies with the drifting of semantic information in the procedure of data augmentation. The problem can be alleviated when enough supervision is provided. However, when little guidance is available, the incorrect regularization would mislead the network and undermine the performance of the algorithm. To tackle the problem, we (1) propose an interpolation-based method to construct more reliable positive sample pairs; (2) design a novel contrastive loss to guide the embedding of the learned network to change linearly between samples so as to improve the discriminative capability of the network by enlarging the margin decision boundaries. Since no destructive regularization is introduced, the performance of our proposed algorithm is largely improved. Specifically, the proposed algorithm outperforms the second best algorithm (Comatch) with 5.3% by achieving 88.73% classification accuracy when only two labels are available for each class on the CIFAR-10 dataset. Moreover, we further prove the generality of the proposed method by improving the performance of the existing state-of-the-art algorithms considerably with our proposed strategy.
summary: Semi-supervised learning (SSL) has long been proved to be an effective technique to construct powerful models with limited labels. In the existing literature, consistency regularization-based methods, which force the perturbed samples to have similar predictions with the original ones have attracted much attention for their promising accuracy. However, we observe that, the performance of such methods decreases drastically when the labels get extremely limited, e.g., 2 or 3 labels for each category. Our empirical study finds that the main problem lies with the drifting of semantic information in the procedure of data augmentation. The problem can be alleviated when enough supervision is provided. However, when little guidance is available, the incorrect regularization would mislead the network and undermine the performance of the algorithm. To tackle the problem, we (1) propose an interpolation-based method to construct more reliable positive sample pairs; (2) design a novel contrastive loss to guide the embedding of the learned network to change linearly between samples so as to improve the discriminative capability of the network by enlarging the margin decision boundaries. Since no destructive regularization is introduced, the performance of our proposed algorithm is largely improved. Specifically, the proposed algorithm outperforms the second best algorithm (Comatch) with 5.3% by achieving 88.73% classification accuracy when only two labels are available for each class on the CIFAR-10 dataset. Moreover, we further prove the generality of the proposed method by improving the performance of the existing state-of-the-art algorithms considerably with our proposed strategy.
abstract_zh: 半监督学习（SSL）早已被证明是一种利用有限标签构建强大模型的有效技术。在现有文献中，基于一致性正则化的方法迫使扰动样本与原始样本具有相似的预测，因其有希望的准确性而备受关注。然而，我们观察到，当标签极其有限（例如每个类别有 2 或 3 个标签）时，此类方法的性能会急剧下降。我们的实证研究发现，主要问题在于数据增强过程中语义信息的漂移。当提供足够的监督时，这个问题可以得到缓解。然而，当可用的指导很少时，不正确的正则化会误导网络并损害算法的性能。为了解决这个问题，我们（1）提出了一种基于插值的方法来构造更可靠的正样本对； （2）设计一种新颖的对比损失来引导学习网络的嵌入在样本之间线性变化，从而通过扩大边缘决策边界来提高网络的判别能力。由于没有引入破坏性正则化，因此我们提出的算法的性能得到了很大的提高。具体来说，当 CIFAR-10 数据集上每个类只有两个标签可用时，所提出的算法实现了 88.73% 的分类准确率，优于第二佳算法 (Comatch) 5.3%。此外，我们通过使用我们提出的策略显着提高现有最先进算法的性能，进一步证明了该方法的通用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于插值的对比学习方法，旨在解决在极少数标签情况下半监督学习性能下降的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有基于一致性正则化的半监督学习方法在标签极度稀疏（如每类仅2-3个标签）时性能显著下降，主要原因是数据增强过程中语义信息漂移导致错误正则化。
AI.method: （1）通过插值生成更可靠的正样本对；（2）设计新型对比损失函数，使网络嵌入在样本间线性变化，扩大决策边界以提升判别能力。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10数据集上，当每类仅提供两个标签时，该算法达到88.73%分类准确率，较最佳算法Comatch提升5.3%；同时显著提升了现有最先进算法的性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过避免破坏性正则化有效解决了极少数标签场景下的半监督学习问题，且具有良好的通用性。

search_text: Interpolation-based Contrastive Learning for Few-Label Semi-Supervised Learning 基于插值的少标签半监督学习对比学习 Semi-supervised learning (SSL) has long been proved to be an effective technique to construct powerful models with limited labels. In the existing literature, consistency regularization-based methods, which force the perturbed samples to have similar predictions with the original ones have attracted much attention for their promising accuracy. However, we observe that, the performance of such methods decreases drastically when the labels get extremely limited, e.g., 2 or 3 labels for each category. Our empirical study finds that the main problem lies with the drifting of semantic information in the procedure of data augmentation. The problem can be alleviated when enough supervision is provided. However, when little guidance is available, the incorrect regularization would mislead the network and undermine the performance of the algorithm. To tackle the problem, we (1) propose an interpolation-based method to construct more reliable positive sample pairs; (2) design a novel contrastive loss to guide the embedding of the learned network to change linearly between samples so as to improve the discriminative capability of the network by enlarging the margin decision boundaries. Since no destructive regularization is introduced, the performance of our proposed algorithm is largely improved. Specifically, the proposed algorithm outperforms the second best algorithm (Comatch) with 5.3% by achieving 88.73% classification accuracy when only two labels are available for each class on the CIFAR-10 dataset. Moreover, we further prove the generality of the proposed method by improving the performance of the existing state-of-the-art algorithms considerably with our proposed strategy. 半监督学习（SSL）早已被证明是一种利用有限标签构建强大模型的有效技术。在现有文献中，基于一致性正则化的方法迫使扰动样本与原始样本具有相似的预测，因其有希望的准确性而备受关注。然而，我们观察到，当标签极其有限（例如每个类别有 2 或 3 个标签）时，此类方法的性能会急剧下降。我们的实证研究发现，主要问题在于数据增强过程中语义信息的漂移。当提供足够的监督时，这个问题可以得到缓解。然而，当可用的指导很少时，不正确的正则化会误导网络并损害算法的性能。为了解决这个问题，我们（1）提出了一种基于插值的方法来构造更可靠的正样本对； （2）设计一种新颖的对比损失来引导学习网络的嵌入在样本之间线性变化，从而通过扩大边缘决策边界来提高网络的判别能力。由于没有引入破坏性正则化，因此我们提出的算法的性能得到了很大的提高。具体来说，当 CIFAR-10 数据集上每个类只有两个标签可用时，所提出的算法实现了 88.73% 的分类准确率，优于第二佳算法 (Comatch) 5.3%。此外，我们通过使用我们提出的策略显着提高现有最先进算法的性能，进一步证明了该方法的通用性。 本文提出了一种基于插值的对比学习方法，旨在解决在极少数标签情况下半监督学习性能下降的问题。 Xihong Yang,Xiaochang Hu,Sihang Zhou,Xinwang Liu,En Zhu cs.CV

authors_text: Shaochen Wang,Zhangli Zhou,Zhen Kan
title: When Transformer Meets Robotic Grasping: Exploits Context for Efficient Grasp Detection
title_zh: 当变压器遇到机器人抓取时：利用上下文进行有效的抓取检测
abstract: In this paper, we present a transformer-based architecture, namely TF-Grasp, for robotic grasp detection. The developed TF-Grasp framework has two elaborate designs making it well suitable for visual grasping tasks. The first key design is that we adopt the local window attention to capture local contextual information and detailed features of graspable objects. Then, we apply the cross window attention to model the long-term dependencies between distant pixels. Object knowledge, environmental configuration, and relationships between different visual entities are aggregated for subsequent grasp detection. The second key design is that we build a hierarchical encoder-decoder architecture with skip-connections, delivering shallow features from encoder to decoder to enable a multi-scale feature fusion. Due to the powerful attention mechanism, the TF-Grasp can simultaneously obtain the local information (i.e., the contours of objects), and model long-term connections such as the relationships between distinct visual concepts in clutter. Extensive computational experiments demonstrate that the TF-Grasp achieves superior results versus state-of-art grasping convolutional models and attain a higher accuracy of 97.99% and 94.6% on Cornell and Jacquard grasping datasets, respectively. Real-world experiments using a 7DoF Franka Emika Panda robot also demonstrate its capability of grasping unseen objects in a variety of scenarios. The code and pre-trained models will be available at https://github.com/WangShaoSUN/grasp-transformer
summary: In this paper, we present a transformer-based architecture, namely TF-Grasp, for robotic grasp detection. The developed TF-Grasp framework has two elaborate designs making it well suitable for visual grasping tasks. The first key design is that we adopt the local window attention to capture local contextual information and detailed features of graspable objects. Then, we apply the cross window attention to model the long-term dependencies between distant pixels. Object knowledge, environmental configuration, and relationships between different visual entities are aggregated for subsequent grasp detection. The second key design is that we build a hierarchical encoder-decoder architecture with skip-connections, delivering shallow features from encoder to decoder to enable a multi-scale feature fusion. Due to the powerful attention mechanism, the TF-Grasp can simultaneously obtain the local information (i.e., the contours of objects), and model long-term connections such as the relationships between distinct visual concepts in clutter. Extensive computational experiments demonstrate that the TF-Grasp achieves superior results versus state-of-art grasping convolutional models and attain a higher accuracy of 97.99% and 94.6% on Cornell and Jacquard grasping datasets, respectively. Real-world experiments using a 7DoF Franka Emika Panda robot also demonstrate its capability of grasping unseen objects in a variety of scenarios. The code and pre-trained models will be available at https://github.com/WangShaoSUN/grasp-transformer
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种基于 Transformer 的架构，即 TF-Grasp，用于机器人抓取检测。开发的 TF-Grasp 框架有两个精心设计，使其非常适合视觉抓取任务。第一个关键设计是我们采用局部窗口注意力来捕获局部上下文信息和可抓取对象的详细特征。然后，我们应用跨窗口注意力来建模远处像素之间的长期依赖性。对象知识、环境配置和不同视觉实体之间的关系被聚合以用于后续的抓取检测。第二个关键设计是，我们构建了一个具有跳跃连接的分层编码器-解码器架构，将浅层特征从编码器传递到解码器，以实现多尺度特征融合。由于强大的注意力机制，TF-Grasp 可以同时获取局部信息（即对象的轮廓），并建模长期连接，例如杂乱中不同视觉概念之间的关系。大量的计算实验表明，与最先进的抓取卷积模型相比，TF-Grasp 取得了更好的结果，并且在 Cornell 和 Jacquard 抓取数据集上分别获得了 97.99% 和 94.6% 的更高准确度。使用 7DoF Franka Emika Panda 机器人进行的现实实验也证明了其在各种场景下抓取看不见的物体的能力。代码和预训练模型将在 https://github.com/WangShaoSUN/grasp-transformer 提供

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于Transformer的架构TF-Grasp，用于机器人抓取检测。
AI.motivation: 传统的卷积模型在抓取检测任务中存在局限性，难以同时捕捉局部细节和长距离依赖关系，因此需要一种更高效的模型。
AI.method: 本文设计了TF-Grasp框架，采用局部窗口注意力捕获局部上下文信息，并通过跨窗口注意力建模长距离依赖关系。此外，还构建了带有跳跃连接的分层编码器-解码器架构，实现多尺度特征融合。
AI.result: TF-Grasp在Cornell和Jacquard数据集上分别达到了97.99%和94.6%的准确率，并在实际场景中成功抓取了未见过的物体。
AI.conclusion: TF-Grasp通过结合局部和全局信息，显著提升了抓取检测的性能，展示了其在复杂场景中的有效性。

authors_text: Thibault Gauthier,Josef Urban
title: Learning Program Synthesis for Integer Sequences from Scratch
title_zh: 从头开始学习整数序列的程序综合
abstract: We present a self-learning approach for synthesizing programs from integer sequences. Our method relies on a tree search guided by a learned policy. Our system is tested on the On-Line Encyclopedia of Integer Sequences. There, it discovers, on its own, solutions for 27987 sequences starting from basic operators and without human-written training examples.
summary: We present a self-learning approach for synthesizing programs from integer sequences. Our method relies on a tree search guided by a learned policy. Our system is tested on the On-Line Encyclopedia of Integer Sequences. There, it discovers, on its own, solutions for 27987 sequences starting from basic operators and without human-written training examples.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种从整数序列合成程序的自学习方法。我们的方法依赖于由学习策略引导的树搜索。我们的系统在整数序列在线百科全书中进行了测试。在那里，它自己发现 27987 个序列的解决方案，从基本运算符开始，无需人工编写训练示例。

AI.tldr: 提出一种自学习方法，从整数序列中合成程序，无需人工训练示例。
AI.motivation: 传统程序合成方法依赖人工设计规则或标注数据，需开发无需人工干预的自动化解决方案。
AI.method: 基于树搜索的策略学习框架，通过强化学习策略指导搜索过程，从基础算子组合生成程序。
AI.result: 在OEIS数据库中自主发现27987个整数序列的程序表示，覆盖多种数学模式。
AI.conclusion: 证明了基于策略学习的程序合成方法可有效解决大规模整数序列问题，具备良好泛化能力。

ai_content_json.method: 基于树搜索的策略学习框架，通过强化学习策略指导搜索过程，从基础算子组合生成程序。
ai_content_json.result: 在OEIS数据库中自主发现27987个整数序列的程序表示，覆盖多种数学模式。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 证明了基于策略学习的程序合成方法可有效解决大规模整数序列问题，具备良好泛化能力。

search_text: Learning Program Synthesis for Integer Sequences from Scratch 从头开始学习整数序列的程序综合 We present a self-learning approach for synthesizing programs from integer sequences. Our method relies on a tree search guided by a learned policy. Our system is tested on the On-Line Encyclopedia of Integer Sequences. There, it discovers, on its own, solutions for 27987 sequences starting from basic operators and without human-written training examples. 我们提出了一种从整数序列合成程序的自学习方法。我们的方法依赖于由学习策略引导的树搜索。我们的系统在整数序列在线百科全书中进行了测试。在那里，它自己发现 27987 个序列的解决方案，从基本运算符开始，无需人工编写训练示例。 提出一种自学习方法，从整数序列中合成程序，无需人工训练示例。 Thibault Gauthier,Josef Urban cs.AI,cs.SC

authors_text: Georgios Georgakis,Bernadette Bucher,Anton Arapin,Karl Schmeckpeper,Nikolai Matni,Kostas Daniilidis
title: Uncertainty-driven Planner for Exploration and Navigation
title_zh: 用于探索和导航的不确定性驱动规划器
abstract: We consider the problems of exploration and point-goal navigation in previously unseen environments, where the spatial complexity of indoor scenes and partial observability constitute these tasks challenging. We argue that learning occupancy priors over indoor maps provides significant advantages towards addressing these problems. To this end, we present a novel planning framework that first learns to generate occupancy maps beyond the field-of-view of the agent, and second leverages the model uncertainty over the generated areas to formulate path selection policies for each task of interest. For point-goal navigation the policy chooses paths with an upper confidence bound policy for efficient and traversable paths, while for exploration the policy maximizes model uncertainty over candidate paths. We perform experiments in the visually realistic environments of Matterport3D using the Habitat simulator and demonstrate: 1) Improved results on exploration and map quality metrics over competitive methods, and 2) The effectiveness of our planning module when paired with the state-of-the-art DD-PPO method for the point-goal navigation task.
summary: We consider the problems of exploration and point-goal navigation in previously unseen environments, where the spatial complexity of indoor scenes and partial observability constitute these tasks challenging. We argue that learning occupancy priors over indoor maps provides significant advantages towards addressing these problems. To this end, we present a novel planning framework that first learns to generate occupancy maps beyond the field-of-view of the agent, and second leverages the model uncertainty over the generated areas to formulate path selection policies for each task of interest. For point-goal navigation the policy chooses paths with an upper confidence bound policy for efficient and traversable paths, while for exploration the policy maximizes model uncertainty over candidate paths. We perform experiments in the visually realistic environments of Matterport3D using the Habitat simulator and demonstrate: 1) Improved results on exploration and map quality metrics over competitive methods, and 2) The effectiveness of our planning module when paired with the state-of-the-art DD-PPO method for the point-goal navigation task.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑在以前未见过的环境中进行探索和点目标导航的问题，其中室内场景的空间复杂性和部分可观察性使这些任务具有挑战性。我们认为，学习室内地图的占用先验为解决这些问题提供了显着的优势。为此，我们提出了一种新颖的规划框架，该框架首先学习生成超出代理视野的占用图，然后利用生成区域的模型不确定性来为每个感兴趣的任务制定路径选择策略。对于点目标导航，策略选择具有上置信限策略的路径，以获得有效且可遍历的路径，而对于探索，策略最大化候选路径的模型不确定性。我们使用 Habitat 模拟器在 Matterport3D 的视觉逼真环境中进行实验，并证明：1）与竞争方法相比，探索和地图质量指标的结果得到了改进，2）我们的规划模块与用于点目标导航任务的最先进的 DD-PPO 方法配合使用时的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于不确定性的规划框架，用于解决未知室内环境中的探索与导航问题。
AI.motivation: 室内环境的空间复杂性和部分可观测性使得探索与导航任务极具挑战性，现有方法难以有效处理不确定性。
AI.method: 框架分两阶段：1）学习生成视野外的占用地图；2）基于模型不确定性制定路径策略（导航用上置信界策略，探索用不确定性最大化策略）。
AI.result: 在Matterport3D环境中，探索效率和地图质量优于现有方法，且与DD-PPO结合在点目标导航任务中表现有效。
AI.conclusion: 不确定性驱动的规划框架能有效提升复杂环境下的探索与导航性能，且模块化设计便于与其他方法结合。

For point-goal navigation the policy chooses paths with an upper confidence bound policy for efficient and traversable paths, while for exploration the policy maximizes model uncertainty over candidate paths. authors_text: Klaus Jansen,Arindam Khan,Marvin Lira,K. V. N. Sreenivas
title: A PTAS for Packing Hypercubes into a Knapsack
title_zh: 将超立方体装入背包的 PTAS
abstract: We study the d-dimensional hypercube knapsack problem where we are given a set of d-dimensional hypercubes with associated profits, and a knapsack which is a unit d-dimensional hypercube. The goal is to find an axis-aligned non-overlapping packing of a subset of hypercubes such that the profit of the packed hypercubes is maximized. For this problem, Harren (ICALP'06) gave an algorithm with an approximation ratio of (1+1/2^d+epsilon). For d=2, Jansen and Solis-Oba (IPCO'08) showed that the problem admits a polynomial-time approximation scheme (PTAS); Heydrich and Wiese (SODA'17) further improved the running time and gave an efficient polynomial-time approximation scheme (EPTAS). Both the results use structural properties of 2-D packing, which do not generalize to higher dimensions. For d>2, it remains open to obtain a PTAS, and in fact, there has been no improvement since Harren's result. We settle the problem by providing a PTAS. Our main technical contribution is a structural lemma which shows that any packing of hypercubes can be converted into another structured packing such that a high profitable subset of hypercubes is packed into a constant number of special hypercuboids, called V-Boxes and N-Boxes. As a side result, we give an almost optimal algorithm for a variant of the strip packing problem in higher dimensions. This might have applications for other multidimensional geometric packing problems.
summary: We study the d-dimensional hypercube knapsack problem where we are given a set of d-dimensional hypercubes with associated profits, and a knapsack which is a unit d-dimensional hypercube. The goal is to find an axis-aligned non-overlapping packing of a subset of hypercubes such that the profit of the packed hypercubes is maximized. For this problem, Harren (ICALP'06) gave an algorithm with an approximation ratio of (1+1/2^d+epsilon). For d=2, Jansen and Solis-Oba (IPCO'08) showed that the problem admits a polynomial-time approximation scheme (PTAS); Heydrich and Wiese (SODA'17) further improved the running time and gave an efficient polynomial-time approximation scheme (EPTAS). Both the results use structural properties of 2-D packing, which do not generalize to higher dimensions. For d>2, it remains open to obtain a PTAS, and in fact, there has been no improvement since Harren's result. We settle the problem by providing a PTAS. Our main technical contribution is a structural lemma which shows that any packing of hypercubes can be converted into another structured packing such that a high profitable subset of hypercubes is packed into a constant number of special hypercuboids, called V-Boxes and N-Boxes. As a side result, we give an almost optimal algorithm for a variant of the strip packing problem in higher dimensions. This might have applications for other multidimensional geometric packing problems.
abstract_zh: 我们研究 d 维超立方体背包问题，其中给定一组具有相关利润的 d 维超立方体，以及一个单位 d 维超立方体的背包。目标是找到超立方体子集的轴对齐非重叠打包，使得打包超立方体的利润最大化。对于这个问题，Harren (ICALP'06)给出了一个近似比为(1+1/2^d+epsilon)的算法。对于 d=2，Jansen 和 Solis-Oba (IPCO'08) 表明该问题采用多项式时间近似方案 (PTAS)； Heydrich 和 Wiese (SODA'17) 进一步改进了运行时间并给出了有效的多项式时间近似方案 (EPTAS)。这两个结果都使用了二维堆积的结构特性，这不能推广到更高的维度。对于 d>2，获得 PTAS 仍然是开放的，事实上，自 Harren 的结果以来没有任何改进。我们通过提供 PTAS 来解决这个问题。我们的主要技术贡献是一个结构引理，它表明任何超立方体包装都可以转换为另一种结构化包装，从而将高利润的超立方体子集包装成恒定数量的特殊超立方体，称为 V 盒和 N 盒。作为一个附带结果，我们针对更高维度的带状堆积问题的变体给出了几乎最优的算法。这可能适用于其他多维几何堆积问题。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了d维超立方体背包问题，提出了一个适用于任意维度的多项式时间近似方案（PTAS）。
AI.motivation: 尽管二维情况下已有PTAS，但高维情形长期缺乏有效算法，现有方法无法推广至更高维度。
AI.method: 通过结构引理将任意超立方体装箱转化为特定的V-Box和N-Box结构，结合几何分组技术实现近似优化。
AI.result: 为任意维度d设计了PTAS，并改进了高维条带装箱问题的算法，可能推动其他多维几何装箱问题的研究。
AI.conclusion: 解决了高维超立方体背包问题的PTAS难题，为多维几何优化提供了新思路和工具。
